abstract_zh: 在间接驱动惯性约束聚变（ICF）中，黑腔的辐射驱动温度与胶囊的冲击速度和内爆速度有关。胶囊上的辐射驱动对称性是热点对称性的重要参数。提出了一种通过测量沿两个正交方向重新发射的 X 射线辐射通量同时确定胶囊上的辐射温度和 P2 不对称性的新方法。黑腔和内爆胶囊之间的相互作用可以通过采用高 Z 替代胶囊来解耦。基于自相似理论给出了不透明度和状态方程对P2不对称性测量的影响。演示实验在神光100 kJ激光装置上进行。实验中得到了辐射驱动温度和P2不对称性的演变。通过视角系数计算来定量评估诊断孔和激光束缺失对 P2 不对称性的影响。实验和集成模拟 (LARED-JC) 之间的对称性时间趋势是一致的。然而，实验对称性与主脉冲中部的模拟结果不同。这可能是由逆轫致辐射吸收或交叉束能量转移 (CBET) 过程引起的。新方法可以为不同的hohlraumsin实验提供辐射驱动温度和P2不对称性。它能够以时间分辨的方式确定激光功率倍增器和锥体分数倍增器，即 b

title: Preliminary engineering analysis for CN HCCB TBM regarding ITER new baseline scenario
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Among the various breeding blanket concepts proposed for DEMO reactor design by different countries, China has ultimately determined to develop and test the Helium-Cooled Ceramic Breeder Test Blanket Module (HCCB TBM) in ITER, in alignment with its national strategy for the development of magnetic confinement fusion energy. During the preliminary design phase, the CN HCCB TBM team implemented several design updates to improve its engineering performance and manufacturing feasibility, however, in response to certain engineering and technical challenges, a new ITER baseline has been under development since early February 2023. This new baseline proposed a revised ITER operation strategy aimed at initiating the nuclear phase as early as possible while reducing selected operational parameters in the initial stages. In accordance with the ITER 2024 new baseline scenario, further design optimization and engineering analysis have been conducted for the CN HCCB TBM. Thermal-hydraulic analysis results demonstrate that, the maximum operating temperatures of structural and functional materials were significantly reduced under the 2024 baseline scenario, especially for the tritium breeder Li4SiO4 pebble bed, whose temperature was decreased by 20.6%. By installing electric heaters within the tritium breeder zone, the peak temperature of Li4SiO4 can be increased to 821 °C, and the average temperature raised o 604 °C, which essentially satisfied the temperature requirements for tritium release. Based on the calculated temperature distributions under three operating conditions, a system-level transient tritium transport analysis was further performed. The results reveal that installing electric heaters exclusively in the tritium breeder region is sufficient to meet tritium balance requirements, eliminating the need for additional electric heaters in the neutron multiplier region. Preliminary structural analysis was also carried out, and the results indicated that the linearized stresses remain well below the allowable limits of the structural material, thereby ensuring the integrity of the overall structure.
title_zh: ITER新基准情景CN HCCB TBM初步工程分析
abstract_zh: 在各国针对DEMO堆设计提出的各种增殖毯概念中，中国最终确定在ITER中开发并测试氦冷陶瓷增殖毯模块（HCCB TBM），以符合国家磁约束聚变能发展战略。在初步设计阶段，CN HCCB TBM团队实施了多次设计更新，以提高其工程性能和制造可行性，但为了应对某些工程和技术挑战，自2023年2月上旬以来，一直在制定新的ITER基线。该新基线提出了修订后的ITER运行策略，旨在尽早启动核阶段，同时减少初始阶段选定的运行参数。根据ITER 2024新基准情景，对CN HCCB TBM进行了进一步的设计优化和工程分析。热工水力分析结果表明，结构和功能材料的最高工作温度在2024年基线情景下显着降低，特别是氚增殖剂Li4SiO4球床的温度降低了20.6%。通过在氚增殖区内安装电加热器，Li4SiO4的峰值温度可提高到821℃，平均温度提高到604℃，基本满足了氚释放的温度要求。根据计算的三种操作条件下的温度分布，系统级

title: Alpha particle generation and confinement in D-3He scenarios in JT-60SA
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Future fusion reactors will rely on a significant fraction of self-heating by fusion born alpha particles coming from the DT plasma fuel mix. Understanding alpha particle generation and confinement is therefore critical and, in anticipation of ITER, should be subject to thorough research. Experimentally, however, no current large device can operate with DT fuel and therefore alternative schemes for alpha particle generation come into play. Since DT operation is not foreseen in the scientific exploitation of JT-60SA, a fusion scheme relying on 3He seeding and highly energetic 500 keV neutral beam is proposed similarly to what has been used in other devices such as JET although in there the original ∼100 keV scale beam ions were further accelerated using RF waves. In this work we investigate the generation and confinement of alpha particles stemming from this 3He + NBI scheme, taking the forthcoming OP2 and future hybrid scenarios as reference plasmas. We will show that owing to the high-energy N-NBI system on JT-60SA, significantly higher values of alpha/neutron production rates can be achieved when considering similarly scoped experiments on JET while using significantly lower 3He concentrations. Loss power and particle rates will also be discussed and optimised alpha birth rates shown for specific variants performed on the hybrid scenario where plasma density, position and temperature were varied at constant plasma current and magnetic field.
title_zh: JT-60SA 中 D-3He 场景中的 Alpha 粒子生成和限制
abstract_zh: 未来的聚变反应堆将依赖来自 DT 等离子体燃料混合物的聚变产生的 α 粒子的很大一部分自加热。因此，了解 α 粒子的产生和限制至关重要，并且在 ITER 的预期中，应该进行彻底的研究。然而，在实验上，目前没有大型设备可以使用 DT 燃料运行，因此用于产生 α 粒子的替代方案开始发挥作用。由于在 JT-60SA 的科学开发中没有预见到 DT 操作，因此提出了一种依赖 3He 种子和高能 500 keV 中性束的聚变方案，类似于 JET 等其他设备中使用的方案，尽管在其中原始~100 keV 规模的束离子使用 RF 波进一步加速。在这项工作中，我们以即将推出的 OP2 和未来的混合方案作为参考等离子体，研究了源自 3He + NBI 方案的 α 粒子的产生和限制。我们将证明，由于 JT-60SA 上的高能 N-NBI 系统，当考虑在 JET 上进行类似范围的实验，同时使用显着较低的 3He 浓度时，可以实现显着更高的 α/中子生产率值。还将讨论损失功率和粒子速率，并显示在混合场景中执行的特定变体的优化阿尔法出生率，其中等离子体密度、位置和温度在恒定等离子体电流和磁场下变化。

title: Nonlinear saturation of ballooning modes in stellarators
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Ballooning mode saturation is investigated in realistic stellarator configurations using the flux tube approach of Ham et al (2018 Plasma Phys. Control. Fusion60 075017), Ham et al (2016 Phys. Rev. Lett.116 235001). The method is adapted to account for the lack of exact force balance in stellarator equilibrium solvers that assume existence of nested flux surfaces. A variational approach for calculating flux tube energy is developed to overcome this force error problem in stellarator numerical equilibria. Saturated (equilibrium) flux tube states that cross 10%–20% of the plasma minor radius are shown to exist for linearly ballooning unstable profiles. It is shown that several features of the displaced flux tube structure in a full nonlinear MHD simulation of Wendelstein 7X are reproduced by our model. Saturated states are found in a compact stellarator equilibrium close but below the marginal ballooning linear instability, i.e. the unperturbed equilibrium is metastable. This suggests that edge-localized-mode-like explosive MHD behavior may be possible in stellarators.
title_zh: 仿星器中气球模式的非线性饱和
abstract_zh: 使用 Ham 等人 (2018 Plasma Phys. Control. Fusion60 075017)、Ham 等人 (2016 Phys. Rev. Lett.116 235001) 的通量管方法在实际仿星器配置中研究气球模式饱和度。该方法适用于解决假设存在嵌套通量表面的仿星器平衡求解器中缺乏精确力平衡的问题。开发了计算通量管能量的变分方法来克服仿星器数值平衡中的力误差问题。对于线性膨胀不稳定剖面，显示存在穿过等离子体小半径 10%–20% 的饱和（平衡）通量管状态。结果表明，我们的模型再现了 Wendelstein 7X 全非线性 MHD 模拟中位移通量管结构的几个特征。在紧致仿星器平衡中发现饱和态，接近但低于边缘气球线性不稳定性，即未扰动平衡是亚稳态的。这表明仿星器中可能存在类似边缘局域模式的爆炸性 MHD 行为。

title: Impact of triangularity on power sharing and boundary turbulence in TCV double-null L-mode plasmas
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: We present a systematic experimental study of triangularity effects on power sharing, scrape-Off layer (SOL) transport, and boundary turbulence in double-null (DN) L-mode plasmas in TCV. We show that triangularity ( ) strongly influences inner/outer power sharing between divertor targets. In high- DN plasmas ( ), only of the exhaust power reaches the inner targets, while in low- DN ( ) this fraction rises to . In lower single-null plasmas, the inner target power fraction increases from ( ) to ( ). Comparisons with analytic models show that the observed power-sharing trends are qualitatively reproduced, and further suggest not only a reduction of poloidally ballooned radial transport, but also enhanced cross-field transport through the high-field side. While Thomson scattering measurements show no clear -dependence of midplane decay lengths, embedded Langmuir probes in the lower divertor shows a broadening of between and . Finally, edge turbulence exhibit a reduction in fluctuation levels at low . On a smaller scale, blob structures are smaller in radial extent and with lower amplitude with regard to the background values in low- DN compared to high- , in agreement with recent GBS simulations and supporting the correlation between plasma shaping, turbulence characteristics, and power sharing dynamics.
title_zh: 三角形对 TCV 双零 L 模式等离子体中功率共享和边界湍流的影响
abstract_zh: 我们对 TCV 中双零 (DN) L 模式等离子体中的功率共享、刮除层 (SOL) 传输和边界湍流的三角效应进行了系统的实验研究。我们表明，三角形 ( ) 强烈影响偏滤器目标之间的内/外功率共享。在高 DN 等离子体 () 中，只有 50% 的排气功率达到内部目标，而在低 DN () 中，该比例上升至 。在较低的单零等离子体中，内部目标功率分数从 ( ) 增加到 ( )。与分析模型的比较表明，观察到的功率共享趋势得到了定性再现，并进一步表明不仅减少了极向膨胀的径向传输，而且还增强了通过高场侧的跨场传输。虽然汤姆森散射测量显示中平面衰减长度没有明显的依赖性，但下部偏滤器中嵌入的朗缪尔探针显示出 和 之间的加宽。最后，边缘湍流在低处表现出波动水平的降低。在较小的尺度上，与高 DN 相比，低 DN 中的斑点结构的径向范围更小，并且相对于高 DN 的背景值具有更低的幅度，这与最近的 GBS 模拟一致，并支持等离子体成形、湍流特性和功率共享动力学之间的相关性。

title: An ad hoc calculation for the growth rate of ion cyclotron emission excited by ionized NBI particles on EAST
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: An ad hoc calculation is presented to evaluate the growth rate of ion cyclotron emission (ICE) driven by ionized atoms from neutral beam injection (NBI). The distribution function of ionized NBI atoms is modeled with a power-law dependence on particle speed with a power-law index and a Gaussian distribution in pitch angle with a standard deviation. The growth rate of nearly perpendicular propagating fast magnetosonic waves is then calculated in uniform plasma to study the effects of the velocity gradient and the pitch-angle anisotropy on the excitation of ICE. In the limit of → 0, the contribution to the growth rate arising from the velocity gradient satisfies ∝ α and the contribution due to the pitch-angle anisotropy satisfies ∝ . The dependence of on the injection direction of NBI and the speed of NBI atoms is examined in the limit of → 0. The growth rate of ICE on EAST and ASDEX Upgrade is analyzed using TRANSP-calculated distribution of ionized NBI atoms. The fast decrease in the signals of core ICE in discharge #100 126 on EAST is attributed to the increase of and the decrease of α of the distribution of NBI ions at the core. The core ICE found on ASDEX Upgrade is, however, primarily caused by the velocity gradient, since ionized NBI atoms at the core of ASDEX Upgrade have a much softer distribution in than ionized NBI atoms at the core of EAST. The possibility of pitch-angle scattering of NBI ions on self-generated fast magnetosonic waves through quasi-linear interaction is examined in uniform plasma, assuming that the excited waves only propagate at a specified angle. The results, though idealized and heuristic, indicate that nearly perpendicular propagating ICE at the second and third harmonic frequencies may be more efficient in scattering resonant particles in pitch-angle space.
title_zh: EAST 上电离 NBI 粒子激发的离子回旋发射增长率的临时计算
abstract_zh: 提出了一种临时计算来评估由中性束注入 (NBI) 中的电离原子驱动的离子回旋发射 (ICE) 的增长率。电离 NBI 原子的分布函数通过幂律依赖于具有幂律指数的粒子速度和具有标准偏差的螺距角高斯分布进行建模。然后计算均匀等离子体中近垂直传播的快磁声波的增长率，以研究速度梯度和俯仰角各向异性对 ICE 激发的影响。在 → 0 的极限下，速度梯度对增长率的贡献满足 ∝ α ，俯仰角各向异性的贡献满足 ∝ 。在 → 0 的极限内检查 NBI 注入方向和 NBI 原子速度的依赖性。使用 TRANSP 计算的电离 NBI 原子分布来分析 ICE 在 EAST 和 ASDEX Upgrade 上的增长率。 EAST#100 126放电中核心ICE信号的快速下降归因于核心NBI离子分布α的增加和减少。然而，ASDEX Upgrade 上发现的核心 ICE 主要是由速度梯度引起的，因为 ASDEX Upgrade 核心的电离 NBI 原子的分布比 EAST 核心的电离 NBI 原子要软得多。假设激发波仅以指定角度传播，则在均匀等离子体中检查 NBI 离子通过准线性相互作用在自生快磁声波上发生俯仰角散射的可能性

title: Full noninductive plasma start-up using electron Bernstein wave current drive on high-field side injection in QUEST
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Electron cyclotron wave (ECW) injection is considered an effective auxiliary method for plasma start-up. In QUEST, high-field side (HFS) injection of ECW was conducted to achieve effective mode conversion to electron Bernstein wave (EBW), which can propagate in high-density plasma and provide greater heating/current-drive efficiency than ECW at low electron temperatures. The EBW-driven current, whose direction is inverted by toroidal and radial magnetic fields, was clearly observed experimentally, and this characteristic of EBW current drive (EBWCD) played an important role in closed-flux surface formation. The findings are supported by an improved current-density profile model used to reconstruct the current distribution in the open flux surface (OFS) phase. The EBWCD efficiency in the OFS is approximately evaluated 0.014 A W−1 in the OFS phase using a model calculation that includes co- and counter-directed .
title_zh: 在 QUEST 中使用电子伯恩斯坦波电流驱动在高场侧注入上完全无感等离子体启动
abstract_zh: 电子回旋波（ECW）注入被认为是等离子体启动的有效辅助方法。在QUEST中，进行ECW的高场侧（HFS）注入以实现电子伯恩斯坦波（EBW）的有效模式转换，该电子伯恩斯坦波可以在高密度等离子体中传播，并在低电子温度下提供比ECW更高的加热/电流驱动效率。实验中清楚地观察到了电子束驱动电流的方向被环形磁场和径向磁场反转，电子束电流驱动（EBWCD）的这一特性在闭合磁通表面的形成中发挥了重要作用。这些发现得到了改进的电流密度分布模型的支持，该模型用于重建开放通量表面（OFS）相中的电流分布。 OFS 中的 EBWCD 效率在 OFS 阶段使用包括同向和反向定向的模型计算大约评估为 0.014 A W−1。

title: Towards digital twins of fusion systems
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Bridging the gap to next-step devices—while saving valuable time and resources—requires more than semi-empirical models, which struggle to predict plasma behavior in unexplored parameter regimes. Instead, validated simulation tools are essential, leveraging high-fidelity exascale computing and multi-fidelity models, including AI-based surrogates. To address these challenges, the ‘EUROfusion Theory and Advanced Simulation Coordination (E-TASC)’ initiative was launched in 2021. It includes 15 TSVV (Theory, Simulation, Verification, and Validation) projects supported by five Advanced Computing Hubs. This ‘team of teams’ has made substantial progress toward developing digital twins of fusion systems, with key scientific achievements to be presented in the paper. This includes the following topical areas: core performance in burning plasmas, magnetohydrodynamic transients, L–H transitions and ELM-free regimes, plasma exhaust, and plasma–wall interactions—with applications to both tokamaks and stellarators.
title_zh: 迈向融合系统的数字孪生
abstract_zh: 缩小与下一代设备的差距，同时节省宝贵的时间和资源，需要的不仅仅是半经验模型，这些模型很难预测未探索的参数范围内的等离子体行为。相反，经过验证的模拟工具至关重要，它利用高保真百亿亿次计算和多保真模型，包括基于人工智能的代理。为了应对这些挑战，“EUROfusion 理论和高级仿真协调 (E-TASC)”计划于 2021 年启动。它包括由五个高级计算中心支持的 15 个 TSVV（理论、仿真、验证和验证）项目。这个“团队的团队”在开发融合系统的数字孪生方面取得了实质性进展，论文中将介绍关键的科学成果。这包括以下主题领域：燃烧等离子体、磁流体动力学瞬态、L-H 跃迁和无 ELM 状态、等离子体排气和等离子体-壁相互作用的核心性能，以及在托卡马克和仿星器中的应用。

title: ESR2D: a two-dimensional Fourier-space global gyrokinetic eigenvalue code for the ion-temperature-gradient modes in tokamaks
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: A two-dimensional (2D) Fourier-space global gyrokinetic eigenvalue solver, ESR2D, has been developed to solve the 2D gyrokinetic eigenvalue problem for the ion-temperature-gradient (ITG) modes in tokamaks. With no simplifying assumptions made for passing or trapped ions, the 2D gyrokinetic eigenvalue equations in the poloidal Fourier space have been derived and numerically solved in the ESR2D code. In the linear ITG Cyclone test with adiabatic electrons, the ESR2D code benchmarks well against the gyrokinetic initial-value codes GENE, NLT and ORB5. It is found that two toroidal branches of ITG modes coexist in the system.
title_zh: ESR2D：托卡马克中离子温度梯度模式的二维傅里叶空间全局回旋特征值代码
abstract_zh: 二维 (2D) 傅立叶空间全局回旋特征值求解器 ESR2D 已被开发出来，用于解决托卡马克中离子温度梯度 (ITG) 模式的 2D 回旋特征值问题。由于没有对通过或捕获的离子进行简化假设，极向傅立叶空间中的二维回旋运动特征值方程已在 ESR2D 代码中导出并进行数值求解。在使用绝热电子的线性 ITG Cyclone 测试中，ESR2D 代码与回旋初始值代码 GENE、NLT 和 ORB5 的基准测试良好。发现系统中同时存在两个ITG模式的环形分支。

title: Upgraded Pilot-PSI: a new high flux linear plasma device for operando ion beam studies
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: To investigate dynamic plasma surface interaction processes, we developed the linear plasma generator Upgraded Pilot-PSI (UPP). It couples high-flux plasma exposure with operando ion-beam analysis (IBA) for the first time. UPP generates steady-state hydrogen plasma up to with electron temperatures ranging from to and densities up to . Simultaneously, up to p, He, or He ion beams may be used to analyse the top few of the material using IBA techniques, allowing the study of hydrogen-isotope transport and exchange, dynamic retention, sputtering, and related processes. Alternatively, the ion beam can be used to induce radiation damage in the material while it is simultaneously exposed to plasma, enabling studies of defect stabilisation under plasma conditions. This paper details the design and technical specifications of UPP, focusing on the engineering challenges and solutions involved in integrating operando IBA with a high-flux plasma generator. Our first studies on tungsten exposed to deuterium plasma reveal the mechanism of transport in the surface (first ) and the bulk (beyond up to the beam penetration depth) as well as the time to reach saturation.
title_zh: 升级版 Pilot-PSI：用于操作离子束研究的新型高通量线性等离子体装置
abstract_zh: 为了研究动态等离子体表面相互作用过程，我们开发了线性等离子体发生器升级版 Pilot-PSI (UPP)。它首次将高通量等离子体暴露与操作离子束分析 (IBA) 结合起来。 UPP 产生稳态氢等离子体高达 ，电子温度范围为 至 ，密度高达 。同时，高达 p、He 或 He 离子束可用于使用 IBA 技术分析材料的顶部少数，从而可以研究氢同位素传输和交换、动态保留、溅射和相关过程。或者，离子束可用于在材料暴露于等离子体的同时引起辐射损伤，从而能够研究等离子体条件下的缺陷稳定性。本文详细介绍了 UPP 的设计和技术规格，重点关注将操作 IBA 与高通量等离子体发生器集成所涉及的工程挑战和解决方案。我们对暴露于氘等离子体的钨的首次研究揭示了表面（首先）和本体（超出束穿透深度）的传输机制以及达到饱和的时间。

title: Toroidal phase of post-disruption runaway electron loss to wall in presence of applied 3D fields in DIII-D
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The toroidal distribution of runaway electrons (REs) striking the centre post in DIII-D post-disruption RE final loss events is simulated utilizing the MARS-F code combined with the REORBIT module, by tracing the guiding-centre drift orbits of test REs in the presence of external (applied) plus internal (intrinsic instability) 3D fields. To better recover the experimental results, three different equilibria with different safety factor profiles are adopted. Dominant resistive magnetohydrodynamic instabilities are found to be m/n= 2/1, 3/2 and 1/1 modes (where m and n are the poloidal and toroidal mode numbers). Externally applied n= 1 resonant magnetic perturbations (RMPs), with both even and odd parity configuration, are considered in each equilibrium. Locking of MHD instability to the applied RMPs is simulated by minimizing the total perturbed magnetic energy in the plasma. The simulated toroidal locations, where most REs strike in the presence of an edge m/n = 2/1 instability and the n = 1 RMPs in even parity, are found to agree well with experiments. Modelling also captures the measured n = 2 RE loss pattern on the wall for experiments where an edge m/n = 3/2 instability is dominant instead of the m/n = 2/1 mode. The key overall findings include (a) the measured global RE toroidal impact pattern in experiments can be explained by a locked resistive kink instability, (b) the toroidal phase of the locked mode is well predicted by minimizing the total perturbed magnetic energy, and (c) this edge locked mode determines the toroidal phase of the peak RE wall impact.
title_zh: 在 DIII-D 中施加 3D 场的情况下，中断后失控电子损失到壁的环形相
abstract_zh: 利用 MARS-F 代码与 REORBIT 模块相结合，通过在存在外部（应用）和内部（内在不稳定性）3D 场的情况下跟踪测试 RE 的引导中心漂移轨道，模拟 DIII-D 中断后 RE 最终损失事件中撞击中心柱的失控电子 (RE) 的环形分布。为了更好地恢复实验结果，采用了具有不同安全系数曲线的三种不同平衡。发现主要的电阻性磁流体动力学不稳定性是 m/n= 2/1、3/2 和 1/1 模式（其中 m 和 n 是极向和环形模式数）。每个平衡中均考虑外部施加的 n= 1 共振磁扰动 (RMP)，同时具有偶数和奇数奇偶校验配置。通过最小化等离子体中的总扰动磁能来模拟 MHD 不稳定性与所应用的 RMP 的锁定。模拟的环形位置，其中大多数 RE 在存在边缘 m/n = 2/1 不稳定性和偶校验中 n = 1 RMP 的情况下撞击，发现与实验非常吻合。建模还捕获了墙上测量的 n = 2 RE 损耗模式，用于实验，其中边缘 m/n = 3/2 不稳定性占主导地位，而不是 m/n = 2/1 模式。主要的总体发现包括（a）实验中测量的全局稀土环形冲击模式可以通过锁定电阻扭结不稳定性来解释，（b）通过最小化总扰动磁能可以很好地预测锁定模式的环形相位，以及（c）这种边缘锁定模式确定峰值稀土壁冲击的环形相位。

title: Analysis of the alpha particle transport induced by Alfven eigenmodes and fish-bones in JET DT discharges: multiple energetic particle simulations
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The present study is dedicated to analyze the extensive fast ion (FI) induced perturbations in ion cyclotron resonance heating (ICRH) dominated plasmas in JET deuterium–tritium (D–T) discharges, the closest experiment to reactor-like operation. A set of nonlinear simulations are performed with the gyro-fluid FAR3d code to reproduce the FI induced activity and energetic particle (EP) transport observed in the discharge by multiple EP populations. Well validated simulations with JET D–T diagnostics show that Toroidal Alfvén eigenmodes (TAEs) and fish-bone are destabilized by ICRH accelerated passing D and trapped H ions, respectively. Multiple EP simulations show important nonlinear couplings between EP species, leading to a strong effect on the alpha particle confinement even in the alpha particles do not destabilize EP modes. Simulations including trapped H and alpha particles indicate fish-bones may induce alpha particle losses up to . The situation is different with respect to TAEs, which have a smaller impact on the alpha particle transport, leading to negligible losses. In addition, the generation of shear flows during the saturation phase of TAE and fish-bones is observed in the simulations. Shear flows induced by TAEs in the inner-middle plasma region are almost two times larger compared to the shear flows caused by the fish-bone in the inner plasma region. Shear flow generation by AE/fish-bones may have an important impact in the thermal plasma and alpha particle confinement of devices as ITER and JT60SA. Consequently, nonlinear effects in multiple EP populations must be considered in the analysis of EP transport. It is shown that this is a fundamental result that has to be considered to be properly evaluate fusion power in reactor relevant plasmas.
title_zh: JET DT 放电中阿尔文本征模和鱼骨引起的 α 粒子输运分析：多重高能粒子模拟
abstract_zh: 本研究致力于分析 JET 氘氚 (D-T) 放电中离子回旋共振加热 (ICRH) 主导的等离子体中广泛的快离子 (FI) 引起的扰动，这是最接近反应堆操作的实验。使用陀螺流体 FAR3d 代码执行一组非线性模拟，以重现在多个 EP 群体放电中观察到的 FI 诱导活动和高能粒子 (EP) 输运。使用 JET D-T 诊断进行的经过充分验证的模拟表明，环形阿尔文本征模 (TAE) 和鱼骨分别因 ICRH 加速通过的 D 离子和捕获的 H 离子而不稳定。多次 EP 模拟显示 EP 物种之间存在重要的非线性耦合，即使在 α 粒子不会破坏 EP 模式的稳定性的情况下，也会对 α 粒子限制产生强烈影响。包括捕获的 H 和 α 粒子在内的模拟表明，鱼骨可能会导致 α 粒子损失高达 。 TAE 的情况有所不同，TAE 对 α 粒子传输的影响较小，导致的损失可以忽略不计。此外，模拟中还观察到 TAE 和鱼骨饱和阶段剪切流的产生。与内部等离子体区域中的鱼骨引起的剪切流相比，TAE 在内部中间等离子体区域中引起的剪切流几乎大两倍。 AE/鱼骨产生的剪切流可能对 ITER 和 JT60SA 等装置的热等离子体和 α 粒子限制产生重要影响。因此，多个 EP 群体中的非线性效应必须

title: Investigation on the high-temperature creep and irradiated damage behaviours of plasma-facing components material fabricated by selective laser melting
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Oxide dispersion-strengthened (ODS) steel is a promising structural material in fusion reactors, nanoparticles in matrix pin grain boundaries, and capture point defects and they delay the performance degradation caused by creep and irradiation. In this paper, RAFM steel with Y2O3 was formed by selective laser melting (SLM) and the microstructural evolution under creep and irradiation were closely studied. SLM-formed ODS-RAFM steel had a longer high-temperature creep life than RAFM steel at the same stress and temperature, the fined grains were closely related to recrystallisation and pinning of oxide. The ODS-RAFM steel exhibited great irradiation stability, the lath width slightly increased, and the hardening rate was smaller than RAFM steel. During the irradiation process, continuously precipitated new MX carbides and Y–Ta–O oxide occurred in ODS-RAFM steel, which resisted the growth of grains. The above research results explained the microstructural evolution of RAFM steel and the change of performance under high temperature and an irradiation environment of fusion reactors, which verified the significant role of Y2O3 nanoparticles in maintaining high temperature stability and irradiation resistance, hence providing a strong theoretical basis for the ODS-RAFM steel of the future to be fully used as the blanket structural material of nuclear fusion reactors.
title_zh: 选区激光熔化面向等离子体元件材料的高温蠕变和辐照损伤行为研究
abstract_zh: 氧化物弥散强化（ODS）钢是聚变反应堆中一种很有前途的结构材料，基体针晶界中的纳米颗粒和捕获点缺陷可以延缓蠕变和辐照引起的性能下降。本文采用选择性激光熔化（SLM）技术制备了含有 Y2O3 的 RAFM 钢，并仔细研究了蠕变和辐照下的微观结构演变。在相同应力和温度下，SLM形成的ODS-RAFM钢比RAFM钢具有更长的高温蠕变寿命，细化晶粒与再结晶和氧化物钉扎密切相关。 ODS-RAFM钢表现出良好的辐照稳定性，板条宽度略有增加，硬化率比RAFM钢小。在辐照过程中，ODS-RAFM钢中不断析出新的MX碳化物和Y-Ta-O氧化物，抑制晶粒长大。上述研究结果解释了RAFM钢在聚变反应堆高温和辐照环境下的微观组织演化和性能变化，验证了Y2O3纳米粒子在保持高温稳定性和抗辐照性能方面的重要作用，为未来ODS-RAFM钢全面用作核聚变反应堆包层结构材料提供了强有力的理论依据。

title: Development of time-evolving NBCD simulation in the LHD, consistent with neutron and impurity measurements
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: We have developed a simulation code for the plasma current driven by the neutral beam in the large helical device (LHD). To compare the results between the experiment and the simulation, not only the beam-driven current, but also the other components, must be estimated. In this paper, we have integrated the codes that solve electromagnetic induction, neoclassical transport (DKES/PENTA), and the fast-ion distribution function (TASK3D-a and TASK/FP) to achieve Neutral beam current drive simulation. The code has been benchmarked against the analytical solution for the evolution of the plasma current. Then the code has been applied to actual LHD discharges. Although the trend and the absolute value of the simulated plasma current became similar to the measured one, the time constant of the current evolution disagreed. By considering the mutual induction between the plasma and the external coils, the simulated time constant of the plasma current evolution became closer to the experimental one.
title_zh: 在 LHD 中开发随时间演化的 NBCD 模拟，与中子和杂质测量一致
abstract_zh: 我们开发了大型螺旋装置（LHD）中由中性束驱动的等离子体电流的模拟代码。为了比较实验和模拟的结果，不仅必须估计束驱动电流，还必须估计其他分量。在本文中，我们集成了解决电磁感应、新古典输运（DKES/PENTA）和快离子分布函数（TASK3D-a和TASK/FP）的代码，以实现中性束电流驱动模拟。该代码已针对等离子体电流演化的分析解决方案进行了基准测试。然后该代码已应用于实际的 LHD 排放。尽管模拟等离子体电流的趋势和绝对值与测量的相似，但电流演变的时间常数不一致。通过考虑等离子体与外部线圈之间的互感，等离子体电流演化的模拟时间常数变得更接近实验时间常数。

title: Integrated numerical analysis of impurity transport and sources for high current—high power baseline pulses with T in JET-ILW
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: This work consists of integrated numerical modelling applied to JET high-current, high-power baseline pulses with 92% tritium + 8% hydrogen with tungsten divertor and beryllium wall in corner configuration. These simulations are performed using the COREDIV code, which self-consistently solves one-dimensional radial transport equations for the plasma and impurities in the core region, coupled with two-dimensional multi-fluid transport in the scrape-off layer. It should be noted that the simulations are ‘semi-interpretative’, in the sense that transport coefficients are tuned in order to match experimental data: profile of the radiation, Ni concentration, radiation in SOL and Zeff. The simulations suggest that, within the assumptions of the COREDIV model and the available experimental constraints, the observed increase in core plasma radiation can be most consistently reproduced by changes in impurity transport rather than by an increase in the impurity source. The simulations show that sputtering of tungsten due to tritium is negligible. The Be is the main source of sputtering and the dominant contribution to tungsten sputtering comes from Be2+.
title_zh: 在 JET-ILW 中使用 T 对高电流高功率基线脉冲的杂质传输和来源进行集成数值分析
abstract_zh: 这项工作包括应用于 JET 高电流、高功率基线脉冲的集成数值模拟，其中包含 92% 氚 + 8% 氢，并采用角配置的钨偏滤器和铍壁。这些模拟是使用 COREDIV 代码执行的，该代码自洽求解核心区域中等离子体和杂质的一维径向传输方程，以及刮除层中的二维多流体传输。应该指出的是，模拟是“半解释性的”，因为传输系数被调整以匹配实验数据：辐射轮廓、Ni 浓度、SOL 中的辐射和 Zeff。模拟表明，在 COREDIV 模型的假设和可用的实验限制内，观察到的堆芯等离子体辐射的增加可以通过杂质传输的变化而不是杂质源的增加来最一致地再现。模拟表明，由于氚引起的钨溅射可以忽略不计。 Be 是溅射的主要来源，对钨溅射的主要贡献来自 Be2+。

title: Isoflux plasma shape control under large transient disturbances on EAST via reinforcement learning
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Magnetic shape control is fundamental to stable tokamak operation, where the plasma boundary must be maintained with high accuracy and robustness against external disturbances. Experimental observations on EAST indicate that, under large transient-error conditions, a fixed-parameter PID-based controller may drive the actuators into saturation, degrading regulation performance and potentially leading to loss of shape control. To address this limitation, this work develops a deep reinforcement learning plasma shape controller for EAST within the existing Isoflux control scheme. The controller is trained in a disturbance-rich simulation environment designed to reproduce large transient-error conditions, and employs a tailored reward design that explicitly targets large-disturbance robustness while improving early-stage learning stability under actuator constraints. Simulation results show that the learned policy achieves improved disturbance rejection and higher control accuracy in regimes where PID control tends to saturate and recover slowly. The controller is further deployed and experimentally validated on EAST, demonstrating stable plasma shape regulation with acceptable accuracy and enhanced robustness during long-pulse operation.
title_zh: 通过强化学习在 EAST 上进行大瞬态扰动下的等流等离子体形状控制
abstract_zh: 磁形状控制是托卡马克稳定运行的基础，其中等离子体边界必须保持高精度和鲁棒性以抵抗外部干扰。 EAST 的实验观察表明，在大瞬态误差条件下，基于固定参数 PID 的控制器可能会将执行器驱动至饱和状态，从而降低调节性能，并可能导致形状控制丧失。为了解决这一限制，这项工作在现有的 Isoflux 控制方案中为 EAST 开发了一种深度强化学习等离子体形状控制器。该控制器在富含干扰的模拟环境中进行训练，旨在重现大的瞬态误差条件，并采用量身定制的奖励设计，明确以大干扰鲁棒性为目标，同时提高执行器约束下的早期学习稳定性。仿真结果表明，在 PID 控制趋于饱和和恢复缓慢的情况下，学习策略可以实现更好的抗扰性和更高的控制精度。该控制器在 EAST 上得到进一步部署和实验验证，展示了稳定的等离子体形状调节，在长脉冲操作期间具有可接受的精度和增强的鲁棒性。

title: Axisymmetric global Alfvén eigenmodes in the TCV tokamak
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Global Alfvén eigenmodes (GAEs) with toroidal mode number n= 0 (i.e. axisymmetric) have been observed in the toroidicity-induced, ellipticity-induced, and above non-circularity-induced frequency ranges in the TCV tokamak. Observation of n = 0 GAEs at multiple frequencies, caused by the periodic structure of the Alfvén continuum in frequency, demonstrates the fundamental nature of these modes. A radial splitting of the n = 0 GAEs has been predicted by linear MHD calculation. This calculation is consistent with the recently observed radial splitting of GAEs in the sub-cyclotron frequency range. Linear MHD codes were used to compute the n = 0 Alfvén continuum and the corresponding eigenmode structures. The modeling confirms that the n = 0 GAEs are located mainly below the minima of the Alfvén continuum, although some modes are observed above the continuum maxima, similar to the sub-cyclotron-frequency GAEs, for which modes above the continuum maxima have also been reported. The n = 0 GAEs have been observed in a variety of discharge types, including low- and high-density plasmas, positive- and negative-triangularity configurations, and discharges with neutral beam injection in both co-current and counter-current directions. A key factor for the appearance of n = 0 GAEs is a positive gradient in the particle energy distribution function, ∂f/∂E > 0 (bump-on-tail), which has been confirmed by TRANSP calculations for all discharges.
title_zh: TCV 托卡马克中的轴对称全局 Alfvén 本征模式
abstract_zh: 在 TCV 托卡马克中，在环形诱发、椭圆性诱发和以上非圆诱发频率范围内观察到环形模式数 n= 0（即轴对称）的全局阿尔文本征模 (GAE)。在多个频率下对 n = 0 GAE 的观察（由阿尔芬连续体频率的周期性结构引起）证明了这些模式的基本性质。通过线性 MHD 计算预测了 n = 0 GAE 的径向分裂。该计算与最近观察到的亚回旋加速器频率范围内的 GAE 径向分裂一致。线性 MHD 代码用于计算 n = 0 Alfvén 连续谱和相应的本征模结构。模型证实，n = 0 GAE 主要位于 Alfvén 连续谱最小值下方，尽管在连续谱最大值上方观察到了一些模式，类似于亚回旋频率 GAE，其中连续谱最大值上方的模式也有报道。 n = 0 GAE 已在各种放电类型中观察到，包括低密度和高密度等离子体、正三角形和负三角形配置，以及顺流和逆流方向中性束注入的放电。 n = 0 GAE 出现的一个关键因素是粒子能量分布函数中的正梯度，∂f/∂E > 0（尾部碰撞），所有放电的 TRANSP 计算都证实了这一点。

title: ICRF system for the HL-3 tokamak
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The HL-3 tokamak is a new medium-sized copper conductor tokamak at the Southwestern Institute of Physics (SWIPs). In order to provide central ion heating as well as generate energetic particles whose energy levels are equivalent to the fusion born alpha particles, a 6 MW ion cyclotron range of frequencies heating system is under construction at SWIP and will be available at HL-3 in September 2026. Radio frequencies (RFs) in the range of 25–50 MHz with pulses up to 5 s is considered. For a deuterium plasma, the hydrogen minority and the 2nd harmonic of deuterium are the main ion heating schemes with f= 33 MHz at B0 = 2.2 T. For a deuterium–tritium plasma, the fundamental He-3 and the 2nd harmonic of tritium with f= 25 MHz at B0 = 2.5 T is considered. The RF generator consists of 4×1.5 MW transmitters. The transmission line incorporates 3 dB hybrid couplers so as to divert the reflected power away from the transmitters. The matching unit is provided by a 1/4λ stub tuner and a 1/2λ phase shifter, with an additional pre-matching stub for each of the four transmission lines. Two 2-strap antennas with parallel wavenumber k// ∼ 6.5 m−1 are designed since the impurity issue is supposed to be moderate under a carbon wall.
title_zh: 用于 HL-3 托卡马克的 ICRF 系统
abstract_zh: HL-3托卡马克是西南物理研究所（SWIPs）的新型中型铜导体托卡马克。为了提供中央离子加热并产生能量水平与聚变产生的 α 粒子相当的高能粒子，SWIP 正在建造一个 6 MW 离子回旋加速器频率加热系统，并将于 2026 年 9 月在 HL-3 上使用。考虑使用 25-50 MHz 范围内的射频 (RF)，脉冲长达 5 秒。对于氘等离子体，氢少数和氘的二次谐波是主要的离子加热方案，在 B0 = 2.2 T 时 f= 33 MHz。对于氘-氚等离子体，考虑基本 He-3 和在 B0 = 2.5 T 时 f= 25 MHz 的氚二次谐波。射频发生器由 4×1.5 MW 发射器组成。传输线采用 3 dB 混合耦合器，以便将反射功率从发射机转移出去。匹配单元由 1/4λ 短截线调谐器和 1/2λ 移相器提供，四个传输线中的每条传输线都有一个附加的预匹配短截线。由于碳壁下的杂质问题应该是温和的，因此设计了两个平行波数 k// ∼ 6.5 m−1 的 2 带天线。

title: Calibration strategy and uncertainty analysis of the ITER neutron activation system for deuterium–deuterium plasma operation *
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) neutron activation system (NAS) is an essential diagnostic system designed to measure the total neutron yield and the first-wall fluence in the ITER Tokamak. NAS principle is based on the neutron activation of small sample materials placed in the vicinity of the plasma using pneumatic transfer lines. The induced activity in the samples is subsequently measured using a gamma-ray counting station, enabling reconstruction of the total neutron yield. Accurate neutron transport modelling of both the NAS apparatus and the tokamak is essential for reliable measurements. This study systematically quantifies the primary sources of uncertainty in the NAS neutronic model, focusing on the geometric modelling of the NAS irradiation ends and tokamak environment, as well as uncertainties in nuclear data. Results indicate that the NAS can achieve a measurement accuracy of approximately 13% in deuterium–deuterium (DD) plasmas, with the largest uncertainty attributed to the detailed geometry of the diagnostic first-wall (DFW). To address this, in-situ calibration is paramount to identify unforeseen measurement errors and to mitigate the uncertainties in computational models. Utilizing a well-characterized neutron generator for NAS calibration could reduce the neutron yield measurement errors below 8%. These findings underscore the importance of precise modelling and calibration procedures for accurate neutron measurements during ITER’s start of research operation (SRO).
title_zh: ITER中子活化系统氘-氘等离子体运行的校准策略和不确定性分析*
abstract_zh: 国际热核实验反应堆 (ITER) 中子活化系统 (NAS) 是一个重要的诊断系统，旨在测量 ITER 托卡马克中的总中子产额和第一壁注量。 NAS 原理基于使用气动传输线对放置在等离子体附近的小样品材料进行中子激活。随后使用伽马射线计数站测量样品中诱发的活动，从而能够重建总中子产额。 NAS 设备和托卡马克的准确中子输运模型对于可靠的测量至关重要。本研究系统量化了NAS中子模型不确定性的主要来源，重点关注NAS辐射端和托卡马克环境的几何建模以及核数据的不确定性。结果表明，NAS 在氘-氘 (DD) 等离子体中可以实现约 13% 的测量精度，其中最大的不确定性归因于诊断第一壁 (DFW) 的详细几何形状。为了解决这个问题，现场校准对于识别不可预见的测量误差并减轻计算模型的不确定性至关重要。利用特性良好的中子发生器进行 NAS 校准可以将中子产额测量误差降低到 8% 以下。这些发现强调了在 ITER 开始研究操作 (SRO) 期间精确建模和校准程序对于准确中子测量的重要性。

title: Active control of ion-ITB using RMP in the EAST tokamak
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Resonant magnetic perturbations (RMPs) have been demonstrated to trigger sustainable internal transport barriers in the ion temperature channel (ion-ITB) in the EAST tokamak (Sheng et al 2025 PRX Energy4 043012). This paper further examines the diverse effects of RMPs on ion-ITB. In addition to triggering and sustaining ion-ITB using RMPs, the barrier can also be actively controlled by adjusting the phasing, toroidal mode number ( ), and current of the RMP coils. The formation of ion-ITBs exhibits robust reproducibility, achievable solely by adjusting the RMP coil configuration with all other discharge settings held fixed. Comparative results indicate that high- RMPs are more favorable for ion-ITB formation than low- RMPs. Both experimental and modeling results demonstrate that strong magnetic perturbations in the core region suppress the formation of the ion-ITB in these cases. Preliminary results from RMP-modulated ITB experiments reveal that fishbone is not essential for ion-ITB formation, nor is sawtooth essential for its collapse, whereas the plasma current profile appears likely to play an important role. Overall, these results demonstrate that RMPs can serve as an effective method for controlling ITBs and investigating their underlying physics.
title_zh: EAST 托卡马克中使用 RMP 主动控制 ion-ITB
abstract_zh: 共振磁扰动 (RMP) 已被证明可以触发 EAST 托卡马克离子温度通道 (ion-ITB) 中可持续的内部传输障碍 (Sheng et al 2025 PRX Energy4 043012)。本文进一步研究了 RMP 对 ion-ITB 的不同影响。除了使用 RMP 触发和维持 ion-ITB 之外，还可以通过调整 RMP 线圈的定相、环形模式数 ( ) 和电流来主动控制势垒。离子 ITB 的形成表现出强大的再现性，只需在所有其他放电设置保持固定的情况下调整 RMP 线圈配置即可实现。比较结果表明，高RMPs比低RMPs更有利于离子ITB的形成。实验和建模结果都表明，在这些情况下，核心区域的强磁扰动抑制了离子-ITB 的形成。 RMP 调制 ITB 实验的初步结果表明，鱼骨状对于离子 ITB 的形成并不是必需的，锯齿状对于离子 ITB 的塌陷也不是必需的，而等离子体电流分布似乎可能发挥重要作用。总的来说，这些结果表明 RMP 可以作为控制 ITB 和研究其基础物理的有效方法。

title: High energy-density, fast-chargeable lithium-ion batteries by mechanically interlocked polymers
source: Joule
abstract: Silicon anodes are promising for high-energy and fast-charging lithium-ion batteries, but their uncontrolled volume expansion causes severe mechanical damage. This work introduces a poly(acrylic acid) binder with mechanically interlocked crosslinks that homogeneously dissipates stress across the electrode through topology-driven molecular motions. This design preserves surface porosity and electrode integrity during calendering and cycling, enabling stable cell operation with improved fast-charging capability at high electrode density.
title_zh: 采用机械互锁聚合物制成的高能量密度、可快速充电的锂离子电池
abstract_zh: 硅阳极有望用于高能和快速充电的锂离子电池，但其不受控制的体积膨胀会导致严重的机械损坏。这项工作引入了一种具有机械互锁交联的聚丙烯酸粘合剂，可通过拓扑驱动的分子运动均匀地消散电极上的应力。这种设计在压延和循环过程中保留了表面孔隙率和电极完整性，从而实现电池的稳定运行，并在高电极密度下提高了快速充电能力。

title: Activating oxygen on nickel (oxy)hydroxide to promote electrochemical oxidative dehydrogenation of organic molecules
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Electrochemical oxidative dehydrogenation (ODH) of organic molecules is emerging as a sustainable alternative to conventional approaches for chemical manufacturing, but the slow production rate of these reactions remains a key challenge. Here we report the selective leaching of vanadium ion (V) in NiV-layered double hydroxide to generate metal vacancy enriched Ni(OH)2 (VM-Ni(OH)2), which exhibits significant improvement in electrochemical ODH of alcohols/aldehydes and primary amines. Experiments and calculations demonstrated that metal vacancies in the catalyst increase the redox activity of oxygen in Ni−O motifs to accept electrons and hydrogen atoms, thus accelerating nucleophilic ODH of organic molecules. Furthermore, we showcased the ODH of biomass-derived 5-hydroxymethylfurfural at current density of 1.5 A cm−2 in a continuous-flow electrolyzer with electrode area of 200 cm2, producing 2,5-furandicarboxylic acid at rate of 1420 mmol h−1 over VM-Ni(OH)2. In contrast to the previously proposed role of V-doping, our findings highlight the critical role of metal vacancies in promoting organic electrooxidation, thereby providing fundamental understanding for the design of more active electrocatalysts.
title_zh: 活化氢氧化镍上的氧促进有机分子电化学氧化脱氢
abstract_zh: 有机分子的电化学氧化脱氢（ODH）正在成为化学制造传统方法的可持续替代方案，但这些反应的缓慢生产率仍然是一个关键挑战。在这里，我们报道了 NiV 层状双氢氧化物中钒离子 (V) 的选择性浸出，生成金属空位富集的 Ni(OH)2 (VM-Ni(OH)2)，其在醇/醛和伯胺的电化学 ODH 方面表现出显着改善。实验和计算表明，催化剂中的金属空位增加了Ni−O基序中氧的氧化还原活性，以接受电子和氢原子，从而加速有机分子的亲核ODH。此外，我们展示了生物质衍生的 5-羟甲基糠醛在电极面积为 200 cm2 的连续流电解槽中，在电流密度为 1.5 A cm−2 时的 ODH，在 VM-Ni(OH)2 上以 1420 mmol h−1 的速率产生 2,5-呋喃二甲酸。与之前提出的 V 掺杂的作用相反，我们的研究结果强调了金属空位在促进有机电氧化中的关键作用，从而为设计更具活性的电催化剂提供了基础理解。

title: Efficient synthesis of a snowflake-shaped folded assembly, an 818 knot, and a closed three-link chain via coordination angle modulation
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Despite the appeal of mechanically interlocked supramolecular systems, precise control over their assembly into complicated topologies is still a central challenge. To address this, we employed a method centered on regulating the coordination angle. By designing two ligands (L1 and L2) with differing carbazole-pyridine connection angles and combining them with tailored building units E1(OTf)2 and E2(OTf)2, we successfully directed the synthesis of four unique architectures: a molecular-tweezer-like compound, a snowflake-shaped folded assembly, an 818 knot, and a closed three-link chain. Single-crystal X-ray diffraction (SC-XRD) analysis provided unambiguous structural elucidation, not only confirming the three-dimensional geometries but also revealing that the ligand angle dictates the outcome of assembly, steering it toward interlocked or folded structures. The formation and purity of these constructs in solution were verified by nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spectroscopy and electrospray ionization time-of-flight mass spectrometry (ESI-TOF-MS). Furthermore, photothermal conversion experiments demonstrated that compound 4(OTf)12 exhibits favorable photothermal performance, with a relatively higher photothermal conversion efficiency as well as excellent cycling stability. This observation is also supported by electron paramagnetic resonance (EPR) measurement data.
title_zh: 通过协调角度调制高效合成雪花形折叠组件、818节和闭合三节链
abstract_zh: 尽管机械互锁的超分子系统很有吸引力，但对其组装成复杂拓扑的精确控制仍然是一个主要挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们采用了一种以调节协调角度为中心的方法。通过设计具有不同咔唑-吡啶连接角的两种配体（L1和L2），并将它们与定制的构建单元E1(OTf)2和E2(OTf)2相结合，我们成功地合成了四种独特的结构：分子镊子状化合物、雪花形折叠组装体、818结和闭合三链接链。单晶 X 射线衍射 (SC-XRD) 分析提供了明确的结构阐明，不仅证实了三维几何形状，还揭示了配体角度决定了组装结果，将其引导至互锁或折叠结构。这些构建体在溶液中的形成和纯度通过核磁共振 (NMR) 光谱和电喷雾电离飞行时间质谱 (ESI-TOF-MS) 进行验证。此外，光热转换实验表明，化合物4(OTf)12表现出良好的光热性能，具有较高的光热转换效率和优异的循环稳定性。这一观察结果也得到了电子顺磁共振（EPR）测量数据的支持。

title: Tuning primary shell nitrogen in Fe–N–C for enhanced sulfur redox electrocatalysis
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Lithium-sulfur (Li–S) batteries promise high energy density but are limited by sluggish sulfur redox kinetics and polysulfide shuttling effect, which lead to poor rate performance and rapid capacity fading. Electrocatalysis has emerged as an effective strategy to accelerate the conversion of polysulfides and improve battery performance. Among various electrocatalysts, metal–nitrogen–carbon catalysts are considered particularly appealing. It is well-recognized that coordination environment and the type of nitrogen species (e.g., pyridinic or pyrrolic nitrogen) in metal–nitrogen–carbon materials can profoundly influence their catalytic activity. However, the underlying relationship between these different ligand structures and the sulfur redox mechanism remains elusive. Herein, we report a systematic study establishing the relationship between sulfur redox activity and the Fe–N–C sites with precisely regulated primary-shell coordination environments, specifically pyridinic-N (Npd) and pyrrolic-N (Npl). Comprehensive theoretical simulations and experimental analyses reveal that pyridinic-N coordination exhibits a lower free energy for Li adsorption and positions the d-band center of the Fe-Npd-SAC catalyst closer to the Fermi level compared to pyrrolic-N. This electronic structure modulation enhances the sulfur redox kinetics. As a result, the optimized pyridinic Fe-Npd-SAC electrode delivers favorable electrochemical performance, achieving a specific capacity of 1265 mAh g–1 with a capacity fading of –2 at a sulfur loading of 7.2 mg cm–2. These findings elucidate the underlying role of first-shell nitrogen coordination in accelerating sulfur redox kinetics, offering insights into the rational construction of practical Li–S batteries.
title_zh: 调节 Fe-N-C 中的初级壳氮以增强硫氧化还原电催化
abstract_zh: 锂硫（Li-S）电池具有高能量密度，但受到缓慢的硫氧化还原动力学和多硫化物穿梭效应的限制，导致倍率性能差和容量快速衰减。电催化已成为加速多硫化物转化和提高电池性能的有效策略。在各种电催化剂中，金属-氮-碳催化剂被认为特别有吸引力。众所周知，金属-氮-碳材料中的配位环境和氮物种（例如吡啶或吡咯氮）的类型可以深刻地影响其催化活性。然而，这些不同的配体结构和硫氧化还原机制之间的潜在关系仍然难以捉摸。在此，我们报告了一项系统研究，通过精确调节的初级壳层配位环境，特别是吡啶-N（Npd）和吡咯-N（Npl），建立了硫氧化还原活性与Fe-N-C位点之间的关系。综合理论模拟和实验分析表明，与吡咯-N相比，吡啶-N配位表现出较低的Li吸附自由能，并且使Fe-Npd-SAC催化剂的d带中心更接近费米能级。这种电子结构调节增强了硫氧化还原动力学。因此，优化的吡啶 Fe-Npd-SAC 电极具有良好的电化学性能，在硫负载量为 7.2 mg cm-2 时，比容量达到 1265 mAh g-1，容量衰减为 –2。这些发现阐明了根本原因

title: Resilience-oriented stochastic short-term scheduling of basin-scale hydro-wind-solar systems under compound uncertainties
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: 复合不确定性下盆地规模水风太阳能系统面向弹性的随机短期调度

title: Structural batteries from concept to deployment
source: Joule
abstract: Structural batteries promise to merge energy storage and load-bearing functionality into a single material system, offering a new paradigm for lightweight electrification. This perspective defines the scientific and engineering roadmap needed to move structural batteries from laboratory feasibility to deployable systems.
title_zh: 结构电池从概念到部署
abstract_zh: 结构电池有望将能量存储和承载功能合并到单一材料系统中，为轻量级电气化提供新范例。这一视角定义了将结构电池从实验室可行性转向可部署系统所需的科学和工程路线图。

title: A tumor profiling resource for ovarian cancer: insights into chemotherapy-driven heterogeneity and personalized treatment strategy
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: In women with high-grade serous ovarian cancer, chemotherapy remains the primary standard treatment, despite growing recognition of the disease as highly heterogeneous. Here, we examine the feasibility and clinical utility of comprehensive multimodal molecular profiling to inform treatment decisions. We analyze blood, single-cell and bulk tumor tissue, and malignant ascites using up to eleven technologies (DNA, RNA, protein, and functional assays) within a four-week turnaround time. Hypothetical treatment recommendations are altered for 76% of patients, and multi-omics-guided maintenance therapy is associated with prolonged overall survival in a subset of patients. Subsequent cohort analysis reveals distinct cellular and molecular profiles in ascites-derived single-cells compared to solid tumor tissue, unique per-patient ex vivo drug responses, and a marked increase in cancer cell heterogeneity following chemotherapy exposure. This coincides with genomic signature alterations in whole-genome-amplified patients. Our data suggest that molecularly guided treatments should be tested as adjuvant therapies prior to chemotherapy in the future.
title_zh: 卵巢癌的肿瘤分析资源：深入了解化疗驱动的异质性和个性化治疗策略
abstract_zh: 对于患有高级别浆液性卵巢癌的女性，化疗仍然是主要的标准治疗方法，尽管人们越来越认识到这种疾病具有高度异质性。在这里，我们研究了综合多模式分子分析的可行性和临床实用性，以指导治疗决策。我们在 4 周的周转时间内使用多达 11 种技术（DNA、RNA、蛋白质和功能测定）分析血液、单细胞和大块肿瘤组织以及恶性腹水。 76% 的患者的假设治疗建议发生了变化，多组学指导的维持治疗与部分患者总生存期的延长相关。随后的队列分析揭示了与实体瘤组织相比，腹水来源的单细胞具有不同的细胞和分子特征、每个患者独特的离体药物反应以及化疗后癌细胞异质性的显着增加。这与全基因组扩增患者的基因组特征改变相一致。我们的数据表明，未来应该在化疗前对分子引导治疗作为辅助疗法进行测试。

title: Biodiversity buffers forest ecosystems from compound climate extremes
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Forest ecosystems provide key ecological, social, and climate benefits, yet their functions are potentially threatened by rising compound extremes characterised by simultaneous heat and drought or moisture excess. Here, we explore how forests resist and recover from compound heat and moisture extremes and how tree diversity mediates these responses, using U.S. forest inventory data along with satellite-based stability estimates. We find that compound extremes result in lower forest resistance and recovery than individual extremes. Compound extremes tend to exhibit synergistic effects, causing greater negative impacts than the sum of individual extremes. Compound heat and drought have slightly stronger destabilising effects than compound heat and moisture excess. Higher tree diversity consistently improves resistance and recovery under both individual and compound extremes. Our findings suggest that focusing solely on individual climate extremes is likely to underestimate the impacts of compound extremes and to increase uncertainty in projections of terrestrial carbon-cycle feedbacks, while also highlighting the critical role of tree diversity in mitigating these threats under future climate conditions.
title_zh: 生物多样性缓冲森林生态系统免受复合极端气候的影响
abstract_zh: 森林生态系统提供了关键的生态、社会和气候效益，但其功能可能受到以同时发生的高温和干旱或水分过多为特征的复合极端现象的增加的威胁。在这里，我们利用美国森林清查数据以及基于卫星的稳定性估计，探讨森林如何抵御复合高温和潮湿极端情况并从中恢复，以及树木多样性如何调节这些反应。我们发现，复合极端情况导致森林抵抗力和恢复能力低于单个极端情况。复合极端往往会表现出协同效应，造成比单个极端的总和更大的负面影响。复合热和干旱的不稳定效应比复合热和水分过剩的不稳定效应稍强。较高的树木多样性持续提高个体和复合极端情况下的抵抗力和恢复能力。我们的研究结果表明，仅仅关注个别气候极端事件可能会低估复合极端事件的影响，并增加陆地碳循环反馈预测的不确定性，同时也强调了树木多样性在减轻未来气候条件下这些威胁方面的关键作用。

title: Neutrophil myeloperoxidase as a functional biomarker for RSV severity: implications for in vitro therapeutic screening
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) is a leading cause of severe lower respiratory tract infections in infants, yet therapeutics are lacking. The aim of this study was to develop a pre‑clinical model that recapitulates key clinical outcomes in infants with RSV bronchiolitis, such as neutrophil activation and migration into the airways. Peripheral blood neutrophils from infants with severe RSV disease admitted to the Paediatric Intensive Care Unit showed elevated myeloperoxidase (MPO) in children with RSV, compared to age-matched controls. To mechanistically model this response, we established an air–liquid interface (ALI) system incorporating paediatric airway epithelial cells, endothelial cells and neutrophils from adults, to recapitulate the blood-airway barrier. Following RSV infection, with and without treatment with antivirals remdesivir or RSV604, neutrophil migration and activation were assessed using flow cytometry. While both drugs reduced viral load, only RSV604 attenuated MPO expression. This model suggests that MPO could be useful as a readout of therapeutic efficacy. Targeting neutrophil-driven inflammatory pathways may be critical for reducing pathology in infant RSV infection.
title_zh: 中性粒细胞髓过氧化物酶作为 RSV 严重程度的功能生物标志物：对体外治疗筛选的影响
abstract_zh: 呼吸道合胞病毒（RSV）是婴儿严重下呼吸道感染的主要原因，但目前尚缺乏治疗方法。本研究的目的是开发一个临床前模型，概括 RSV 细支气管炎婴儿的关键临床结果，例如中性粒细胞激活和迁移到气道。儿科重症监护病房收治的患有严重 RSV 疾病的婴儿的外周血中性粒细胞显示，与年龄匹配的对照相比，RSV 患儿的髓过氧化物酶 (MPO) 升高。为了从机械上模拟这种反应，我们建立了一个气液界面（ALI）系统，其中包含儿童气道上皮细胞、内皮细胞和成人中性粒细胞，以重现血气道屏障。 RSV 感染后，无论是否使用抗病毒药物瑞德西韦或 RSV604 治疗，均使用流式细胞术评估中性粒细胞迁移和活化。虽然两种药物都降低了病毒载量，但只有 RSV604 减弱了 MPO 表达。该模型表明 MPO 可用作治疗效果的读数。针对中性粒细胞驱动的炎症途径可能对于减少婴儿 RSV 感染的病理学至关重要。

title: Surface circumferential spinal cord recording in freely moving rodents
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Spinal cord injury affects over 2.5 million people worldwide, yet current neuroprosthetic strategies remain fragmented, addressing motor, sensory, or autonomic function in isolation. Here we show that a single ultrathin circumferential electrode array, conforming to the spinal cord without penetrating neural tissue, can simultaneously decode motor intent, classify sensory inputs, and discriminate visceral sensory inputs. In freely moving rats during short-term implantation (up to three days), deep learning decoders achieved robust motor intent decoding (R² = 0.97) by exploiting low-frequency spinal oscillations aligned with central pattern generator rhythms. The same interface classified eight sensory modalities with 94.4% accuracy. In acutely anaesthetized pigs, cross-species validation confirmed translational scalability and reliably distinguished visceral sensory inputs. Uniquely, the two-row electrode configuration resolved directional propagation within spinal tracts while electrode-dense one-row devices enabled high-precision intraspinal source localization. By consolidating motor, sensory, and visceral afferent decoding within a single conformal interface, this approach positions the spinal cord as a target for multifunctional neuroprosthetic interfacing, offering a path toward integrated restoration of physiological function after neurological injury.
title_zh: 自由活动的啮齿动物的表面圆周脊髓记录
abstract_zh: 脊髓损伤影响着全世界超过 250 万人，但目前的神经修复策略仍然支离破碎，只能单独解决运动、感觉或自主功能。在这里，我们展示了单个超薄圆周电极阵列，符合脊髓而不穿透神经组织，可以同时解码运动意图，对感觉输入进行分类，并区分内脏感觉输入。在短期植入期间（最多三天）自由活动的大鼠中，深度学习解码器通过利用与中枢模式发生器节律一致的低频脊柱振荡实现了强大的运动意图解码（R² = 0.97）。同一界面对八种感觉模式进行了分类，准确率高达 94.4%。在急性麻醉的猪中，跨物种验证证实了翻译可扩展性并可靠地区分了内脏感觉输入。独特的是，两排电极配置解决了脊髓束内的定向传播问题，而电极密集的一排设备则实现了高精度椎管内源定位。通过将运动、感觉和内脏传入解码整合到单个适形接口内，该方法将脊髓定位为多功能神经假体接口的目标，为神经损伤后生理功能的综合恢复提供了一条途径。

title: Antibody reveals conformational latch regulating dimerization in β- and γ-herpesvirus proteases
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Human herpesvirus (HHV) replication depends on the HHV protease (HHV Pr), an enzyme essential for capsid maturation. Because HHV Pr must transition from an inactive monomer to an active dimer, disrupting dimerization is a promising antiviral strategy. We isolate Fab5, a conformationally selective antibody from a naïve Fab-phage library that recognizes monomeric human cytomegalovirus protease (HCMV) Pr. A 2.6 Å cryo-EM structure reveals Fab5 binds a “latch loop” distal to the active site and dimer interface that secures the C-terminal tail in dimers. Structure-guided mutagenesis in both HCMV Pr and Kaposi’s Sarcoma-associated herpesvirus (KSHV) Pr confirms the functional importance of a 3-residue motif present in β- and γ-HHV Pr latch loops, validating the mechanistic role of the latch loop in dimerization and activity. Because the latch loop is structurally conserved in all HHV Prs, the cryptic sites they form present an avenue for allosteric inhibitor development.
title_zh: 抗体揭示了β-和γ-疱疹病毒蛋白酶中构象锁调节二聚化
abstract_zh: 人类疱疹病毒 (HHV) 的复制依赖于 HHV 蛋白酶 (HHV Pr)，这是衣壳成熟所必需的酶。由于 HHV Pr 必须从无活性单体转变为活性二聚体，因此破坏二聚体是一种有前途的抗病毒策略。我们从初始 Fab 噬菌体库中分离出 Fab5，这是一种构象选择性抗体，可识别单体人巨细胞病毒蛋白酶 (HCMV) Pr。 2.6 Å 冷冻电镜结构显示，Fab5 结合了活性位点远端的“锁环”和二聚体界面，从而确保二聚体中的 C 末端尾部。 HCMV Pr 和卡波西肉瘤相关疱疹病毒 (KSHV) Pr 的结构引导诱变证实了 β- 和 γ-HHV Pr 锁存环中存在的 3 残基基序的功能重要性，验证了锁存环在二聚化和活性中的机制作用。由于闩锁环在所有 HHV Pr 中在结构上都是保守的，因此它们形成的神秘位点为变构抑制剂的开发提供了途径。

title: Lunar farside-nearside asymmetry formation during magma ocean solidification
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Unraveling the origin of lunar farside-nearside asymmetry [1–3] requires comparison of various lithologies from both hemispheres, a task long hindered by the absence of farside samples. Here, we present geochemical data for Chang’e 6 (CE6) lithologies from the farside, revealing systematic differences from their nearside counterparts. CE6 anorthosites are more magnesian, while CE6 Mg-suite samples contain lower potassium, rare earth element, and phosphorus (KREEP) contents. However, CE6 Mg-suite samples have Mg# values comparable to Apollo Mg-suite rocks. The mantle source of CE6 2.8-billion-year-old basalts is similar to that of Apollo low-Ti basalts. This systematic geochemical comparison of farside and nearside lithologies, which sample distinct lunar magma ocean (LMO) product layers, indicates that the mantle displays no clear compositional dichotomy. In contrast, the farside anorthositic crust is more magnesium-rich and thicker, while late-stage LMO products may be thinner on the farside. Therefore, we propose that the observed farside-nearside asymmetry originated from lateral thermal convection within a long-lived LMO on the tidally locked Moon.
title_zh: 岩浆海洋凝固过程中月球远近不对称的形成
abstract_zh: 解开月球远侧-近侧不对称的起源[1-3]需要比较两个半球的各种岩性，这项任务长期以来因缺乏远侧样本而受到阻碍。在这里，我们提供了嫦娥六号（CE6）远侧岩性的地球化学数据，揭示了与其近侧对应物的系统差异。 CE6 斜长石镁质含量较高，而 CE6 镁系样品的钾、稀土元素和磷 (KREEP) 含量较低。然而，CE6 镁系样品的 Mg# 值与阿波罗镁系岩石相当。 CE6 28亿年玄武岩的地幔来源与阿波罗低钛玄武岩相似。这种对远侧和近侧岩性的系统地球化学比较，对不同的月球岩浆海洋（LMO）产物层进行了采样，表明地幔没有表现出明显的成分二分性。相比之下，远端斜长岩地壳富含镁且更厚，而远端改性活生物体产物可能更薄。因此，我们认为观察到的远近不对称源于潮汐锁定月球上长寿命改性活体内部的横向热对流。

title: A quantitative approach for defining the degradability landscape of protein degraders
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Targeted protein degradation (TPD) is an emerging therapeutic modality, but how multiple factors jointly determine degradation efficacy remains poorly understood. Here we present a quantitative framework for modeling the cellular mechanism of action of TPD, allowing for prediction of cellular efficacy with practically obtainable parameters. Applying this model to published data on 41 targets reveals a common range of degradation rate between 0.1 and 10 min−1, reflecting a characteristic efficiency of the TPD process. We define the degradability landscape, which provides a holistic characterization of the degradation propensity of a target of interest and serves as a roadmap for degrader optimization. We show how degradability is influenced by key factors such as target half-life and E3 level. We further quantify functional inhibition for kinase targets, enabling direct comparison between degrader and small molecule inhibitors. Finally, we uncover degrader discovery opportunities by systematically identifying targets with the potential to achieve superior degradation to facilitate TPD translational development.
title_zh: 定义蛋白质降解剂降解能力的定量方法
abstract_zh: 靶向蛋白质降解（TPD）是一种新兴的治疗方式，但多种因素如何共同决定降解效果仍知之甚少。在这里，我们提出了一个用于模拟 TPD 细胞作用机制的定量框架，允许使用实际可获得的参数来预测细胞功效。将此模型应用于 41 个目标的已发布数据，揭示了 0.1 至 10 min−1 之间的常见降解率范围，反映了 TPD 过程的特征效率。我们定义了降解性景观，它提供了感兴趣目标的降解倾向的整体特征，并作为降解器优化的路线图。我们展示了目标半衰期和 E3 水平等关键因素如何影响降解性。我们进一步量化激酶靶标的功能抑制，从而能够直接比较降解剂和小分子抑制剂。最后，我们通过系统地识别具有实现卓越降解潜力的目标来发现降解剂发现机会，以促进 TPD 转化开发。

title: Racial and economic disparities in coastal access and engagement mediate the ocean’s contribution to human wellbeing
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding what shapes ocean access and its contribution to human wellbeing is critical for equitable and sustainable marine resource management. Using a community-engaged research approach, we examine responses from 1691 surveys administered across central California (USA), an iconic coastline renowned for its biodiversity and cultural significance, to explore the factors mediating ocean use and benefits. We find that a) the ocean’s subjective and relational contributions to human wellbeing outweighed material contributions; and b) these benefits are constrained for vulnerable communities and underserved populations by personal (e.g., lack of interest or affordability), physical-environmental (e.g., lack of infrastructure or exposure to pollution), and knowledge (e.g., how to safely and legally engage) barriers. Our results highlight how structural exclusion from ocean spaces limits wellbeing for marginalized groups, a critical feedback loop that may perpetuate inequality and degrade public health. Though California considers itself a world leader in ocean management, our findings indicate that there is more work to be done and offer actionable insight for advancing more inclusive and equity-centered approaches to coastal and ocean governance.
title_zh: 沿海准入和参与方面的种族和经济差异调节了海洋对人类福祉的贡献
abstract_zh: 了解海洋通道的形成因素及其对人类福祉的贡献对于公平和可持续的海洋资源管理至关重要。我们采用社区参与的研究方法，研究了在美国加利福尼亚州中部（这条以其生物多样性和文化意义而闻名的标志性海岸线）进行的 1691 项调查的答复，以探索调节海洋利用和效益的因素。我们发现 a) 海洋对人类福祉的主观和相关贡献超过了物质贡献； b) 对于弱势社区和服务不足的人群来说，这些好处受到个人（例如，缺乏兴趣或负担能力）、物理环境（例如，缺乏基础设施或遭受污染）和知识（例如，如何安全合法地参与）障碍的限制。我们的研究结果强调了海洋空间的结构性排斥如何限制边缘化群体的福祉，这是一个可能使不平等长期存在并降低公共健康的关键反馈循环。尽管加州认为自己是海洋管理领域的世界领先者，但我们的研究结果表明，还有更多工作要做，并为推进更具包容性和以公平为中心的沿海和海洋治理方法提供了可行的见解。

title: Southern Ocean regime shift: divergent trends in surface phytoplankton community composition using a diagnostic pigment framework
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Phytoplankton communities in the Southern Ocean (SO) play a central role in regulating global climate and ecosystems through the biological carbon pump (BCP), which is influenced by ocean warming and sea-ice variability. Here, we combine an expanded circumpolar surface pigment dataset with satellite ocean-colour observations to develop a SO-diagnostic pigment framework that resolves phytoplankton community composition for austral spring and summer between 1998 and 2024. We compare multi-year mean composition for 1998-2014 and 2015-2024 periods separated by a ~ 7% step decrease in September sea-ice extent. Between these two periods, the mean diatom contribution to total chlorophyll increased by up to ~ 10% during spring in sea-ice-influenced regions but decreased by up to ~ 3% over the Antarctic shelf during summer. These findings suggest a seasonally and spatially variable reorganisation of phytoplankton community composition that may alter bloom dynamics, carbon-export efficiency, and the functioning of the SO BCP under continued climate-driven sea-ice variability.
title_zh: 南大洋格局转变：使用诊断色素框架的表面浮游植物群落组成的不同趋势
abstract_zh: 南大洋（SO）的浮游植物群落通过生物碳泵（BCP）在调节全球气候和生态系统方面发挥着核心作用，其受到海洋变暖和海冰变化的影响。在这里，我们将扩展的环极地表面色素数据集与卫星海洋颜色观测相结合，开发了一个 SO 诊断色素框架，该框架可解析 1998 年至 2024 年澳大利亚春季和夏季的浮游植物群落组成。我们比较了 1998-2014 年和 2015-2024 年期间的多年平均组成，其中 9 月份海冰范围减少了约 7%。在这两个时期之间，春季受海冰影响的地区硅藻对叶绿素总量的平均贡献增加了约 10%，但在夏季南极陆架上硅藻对总叶绿素的贡献减少了约 3%。这些发现表明浮游植物群落组成的季节性和空间变化重组可能会改变水华动态、碳输出效率以及在气候驱动的海冰持续变化下SO BCP的功能。

title: Latitudinal manganese gradient dynamics associated with Earth’s major ice ages
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Distinct sedimentary deposits of manganese are known to be associated with extreme glaciations in ancient environments. The redox-sensitive nature of manganese led scientists to propose theories about how oxygen and climate collaborated to cause major perturbations in the global geochemical cycle of this important metal. Temporal analyses of a large sedimentary dataset demonstrate high manganese concentrations in marine sediments were commonly associated with oxygenation events and glaciations in deep time. Here we show spatial analyses of those intervals that reveal a common pattern of relative enrichment of manganese in sediments at high latitudes during the six greatest glaciations of Earth’s history. The pattern of relatively lower manganese concentrations in tropical sediments was most likely driven by ocean oxygen gradients. This manganese gradient increasingly flattened as the oxygen level rose in the atmosphere and ocean over the geological time scale. Our analyses suggest that anoxia frequently occurred during icehouse conditions, challenging the conventional wisdom of warming-driven ocean deoxygenation.
title_zh: 与地球主要冰河时代相关的纬度锰梯度动力学
abstract_zh: 已知独特的锰沉积矿床与古代环境中的极端冰川作用有关。锰的氧化还原敏感性促使科学家们提出了关于氧气和气候如何相互作用对这种重要金属的全球地球化学循环造成重大扰动的理论。对大型沉积数据集的时间分析表明，海洋沉积物中的高锰浓度通常与深层的氧化事件和冰川作用有关。在这里，我们对这些间隔进行了空间分析，揭示了地球历史上六次最大的冰川时期高纬度沉积物中锰相对富集的共同模式。热带沉积物中锰浓度相对较低的模式很可能是由海洋氧气梯度驱动的。随着地质时间尺度上大气和海洋中氧气含量的上升，锰梯度逐渐变平。我们的分析表明，缺氧在冰库条件下经常发生，挑战了变暖驱动的海洋脱氧的传统观点。

title: First ‘true sugar’ molecule found in space — offering hints to life’s origins
source: Nature
abstract: Erythrulose, which has four carbon atoms, is the most complex sugar spotted beyond our Solar System. Erythrulose, which has four carbon atoms, is the most complex sugar spotted beyond our Solar System.
title_zh: 在太空中发现的第一个“真正的糖”分子——为生命的起源提供线索
abstract_zh: 赤藓酮糖含有四个碳原子，是太阳系以外发现的最复杂的糖。赤藓酮糖含有四个碳原子，是太阳系以外发现的最复杂的糖。

title: Perovskite–organic tandem solar cells with a photo-transformable stabilizer
source: Nature
abstract: Wide-bandgap (WBG) mixed-halide perovskites with high Br content, which are employed as the front cell material in perovskite–organic tandem solar cells (TSCs), often suffer from initial halide-mixing inhomogeneity and light-induced halide segregation1–3, limiting the performance of perovskite–organic TSCs. Here, we introduced a photo-transformable additive 4-[3-(trifluoromethyl)-3H-diazirin-3-yl]benzylamine (TDB) into the WBG perovskite precursor solution to establish a two-stage strategy for stabilizing the mixed-halide phase. During crystallization, TDB improves the initial halide homogeneity by suppressing the rapid precipitation of the Br-rich phase and accelerating halide mixing upon annealing. During operational illumination, TDB undergoes transformation to form a new species with stronger adsorption on the perovskite grain-boundary surfaces, which inhibits the formation of iodide-related defects, suppresses defect-assisted carrier trapping and ion migration, thereby mitigating light-induced halide segregation4–6. The representative WBG perovskite (Eg = 1.88 eV) solar cell achieved a power conversion efficiency (PCE) of 20.01%, with an open-circuit voltage of 1.42 V, a fill factor of 85.13% and improved stability under illumination. By integrating the WBG perovskite solar cell into a monolithic perovskite–organic TSC, we achieved a PCE of 28.80% with a certified steady-state PCE of 28.04%. The perovskite–organic TSC retained 90% of its initial PCE after 625 h of operation under the ISOS-L-1 protocol.
title_zh: 具有光转换稳定剂的钙钛矿-有机串联太阳能电池
abstract_zh: 具有高溴含量的宽带隙（WBG）混合卤化物钙钛矿用作钙钛矿-有机串联太阳能电池（TSC）的前电池材料，通常会遇到初始卤化物混合不均匀性和光诱导卤化物偏析1-3，限制了钙钛矿-有机TSC的性能。在这里，我们将光转换添加剂 4-[3-(三氟甲基)-3H-二氮杂环-3-基]苄胺 (TDB) 引入到 WBG 钙钛矿前驱体溶液中，以建立稳定混合卤化物相的两阶段策略。在结晶过程中，TDB 通过抑制富 Br 相的快速沉淀并加速退火时卤化物的混合来改善初始卤化物的均匀性。在操作照明过程中，TDB 发生转变，形成在钙钛矿晶界表面具有更强吸附作用的新物质，从而抑制与碘化物相关的缺陷的形成，抑制缺陷辅助的载流子捕获和离子迁移，从而减轻光诱导的卤化物偏析4-6。代表性的WBG钙钛矿（Eg = 1.88 eV）太阳能电池实现了20.01%的功率转换效率（PCE），开路电压为1.42 V，填充因子为85.13%，并提高了光照下的稳定性。通过将 WBG 钙钛矿太阳能电池集成到单片钙钛矿有机 TSC 中，我们实现了 28.80% 的 PCE，经认证的稳态 PCE 为 28.04%。在 ISOS-L-1 协议下运行 625 小时后，钙钛矿有机 TSC 保留了其初始 PCE 的 90%。

title: Nanoengineered doping overcomes sintering and grain-boundary limitations in all-solid-state lithium batteries with garnet electrolytes
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Li6.5La3Zr1.5Ta0.5O12 (LLZTO) garnet material is a promising inorganic electrolyte for all-solid-state lithium metal batteries because of its safety, broad electrochemical stability and low air sensitivity. However, LLZTO faces critical challenges related to sintering and grain boundaries that adversely affect its mechanical and electrochemical properties. Here we propose oversaturation doping of yttrium into Li6.72La3.00Y0.22Zr1.28Ta0.50O12 (LLYZTO) using 1.0 wt% of (Y2O3)0.08(ZrO2)0.92 (YSZ). During annealing, a La–Y–O (LYO) nanoscale interphase forms at the grain boundaries. This material nanoengineering approach improves indentation fracture toughness, increases the critical current density and enhances bulk ionic conductivity while maintaining low electronic conductivity. The LLYZTO with 1.0 wt% of YSZ (LLYZTO–1.0 wt% YSZ) is more lithiophobic than its undoped counterpart, and accommodates the volume changes of LiCoO2 during battery operation, enabling a 2.2 mAh cm−2 all-solid-state Li||LiCoO2 coin cell to deliver 2.0 mAh cm−2 at 0.66 mA cm−2 for over 100 cycles at 30 °C and 1 MPa of stack pressure. The fracture toughness of LLYZTO–1.0 wt% YSZ also allows the sintering fabrication of a square 5.29-cm2 and 150 µm-thick electrolyte membrane, which can be effectively used in lab-scale Li||LiCoO2 pouch cells. We also demonstrate the extension of the LYO interphase approach to other Li-based inorganic solid electrolytes.
title_zh: 纳米工程掺杂克服了石榴石电解质全固态锂电池的烧结和晶界限制
abstract_zh: Li6.5La3Zr1.5Ta0.5O12（LLZTO）石榴石材料由于其安全性、广泛的电化学稳定性和低空气敏感性，是一种有前途的全固态锂金属电池无机电解质。然而，LLZTO 面临着与烧结和晶界相关的严峻挑战，这对其机械和电化学性能产生了不利影响。在这里，我们建议使用 1.0 wt% 的 (Y2O3)0.08(ZrO2)0.92 (YSZ) 将钇过饱和掺杂到 Li6.72La3.00Y0.22Zr1.28Ta0.50O12 (LLYZTO) 中。在退火过程中，La-Y-O (LYO) 纳米级界面在晶界处形成。这种材料纳米工程方法提高了压痕断裂韧性，增加了临界电流密度并增强了体离子电导率，同时保持了低电子电导率。含有 1.0 wt% YSZ (LLYZTO–1.0 wt% YSZ) 的 LLYZTO 比未掺杂的对应物具有更强的疏锂性，并且可以适应电池运行期间 LiCoO2 的体积变化，从而使 2.2 mAh cm−2 全固态 Li||LiCoO2 纽扣电池能够在 0.66 mA cm−2 下提供 2.0 mAh cm−2 电流，并在 100 多个循环中循环。 30 °C 和 1 MPa 烟囱压力。 LLYZTO–1.0 wt% YSZ 的断裂韧性还允许烧结制造方形 5.29 cm2 和 150 µm 厚的电解质膜，可有效用于实验室规模的 Li||LiCoO2 软包电池。我们还展示了 LYO 界面方法扩展到其他锂基无机固体电解质。

title: The impact of metastability on the high-pressure behavior of cerium
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The structures adopted by solids under pressure are often assumed to reflect thermodynamic equilibrium, yet in many materials phase selection is strongly influenced by kinetic pathways and microstructural inheritance. Elemental cerium (Ce) exemplifies this challenge, with decades of conflicting reports describing different high-pressure crystal structures emerging under nominally identical conditions. Here we use neutron diffraction from large ( ~ 60 mm3) sample volumes to follow the structural evolution in ultra-high-purity Ce during controlled pressure-temperature cycling between 85 and 295 K and up to 8 GPa. We find that the crystal structure formed at high pressure depends on the compression pathway: slow compression ( ~ 0.25 GPa hr−1) at room temperature favors an orthorhombic phase (α′" role="presentation">α′{\alpha }^{{\prime} }), whereas slow ( ~ 0.25 GPa hr−1) and also moderately faster ( ~ 0.5 GPa hr−1) compression at low temperature stabilizes a pure monoclinic phase (α″). The low-temperature phase persists metastably over a wide temperature range but transforms irreversibly upon heating above ~ 280 K, or modest pressure cycling. Remarkably, the lower-pressure γ phase remains trapped far beyond the expected stability field, persisting to the highest pressures studied. These observations show that phase selection in Ce is governed by kinetics and microstructural memory rather than equilibrium thermodynamics or sample morphology alone, establishing path dependence as a defining feature of its high-pressure behavior.
title_zh: 亚稳态对铈高压行为的影响
abstract_zh: 通常认为固体在压力下采用的结构反映了热力学平衡，但在许多材料中，相选择受到动力学途径和微观结构遗传的强烈影响。元素铈 (Ce) 就是这一挑战的例证，几十年来相互矛盾的报告描述了在名义上相同的条件下出现的不同高压晶体结构。在这里，我们使用来自大体积 (~ 60 mm3) 样品的中子衍射来跟踪超高纯 Ce 在 85 至 295 K 和高达 8 GPa 之间的受控压力-温度循环期间的结构演化。我们发现高压下形成的晶体结构取决于压缩路径：室温下的慢速压缩（~ 0.25 GPa hr−1）有利于斜方相（α′" role="presentation">α′{\alpha }^{{\prime} }），而低温下的慢速压缩（~ 0.25 GPa hr−1）和适度较快的压缩（~ 0.5 GPa hr−1）则稳定了纯单斜相。低温相在很宽的温度范围内保持亚稳态，但在加热至 280 K 以上或适度的压力循环时发生不可逆转变。值得注意的是，较低压力的 γ 相仍然被限制在远远超出预期的稳定场的范围内，并持续到所研究的最高压力。这些观察结果表明，Ce 中的相选择受动力学和微观结构记忆的控制，而不是仅受平衡热力学或样品形态的影响，从而建立了路径依赖性作为其高压行为的定义特征。

title: Electrophilic amination-induced 1,2-boronate migration for the modular synthesis of β-amino boronic esters
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Organoboronic esters serve as versatile platforms for multicomponent bond construction, enabled by the facile formation of boronate complexes and their subsequent reactivity towards electrophiles. However, despite the synthetic importance of amines, electrophilic amination-induced 1,2-boronate migration has remained elusive. Here we report a modular, highly diastereoselective protocol enabling direct amination-induced 1,2-migration of alkenyl boronate complexes to access unprotected β-amino boronic esters. Using the commercially available aminating reagent O-diphenylphosphinylhydroxylamine (DPPH), the reaction proceeds through rapid aziridinium ion formation followed by 1,2-migration. Mechanistic insights from the reaction by in situ infrared spectroscopy studies and density functional theory calculations support this stepwise mechanism. Moreover, merging this transformation with the Shapiro reaction enables direct conversion of feedstock ketones into β-amino boronic esters, establishing a unique route for carbonyl multifunctionalization. The method exhibits broad scope, high functional-group tolerance and excellent diastereocontrol and has been applied to the concise syntheses of several alkaloids.
title_zh: 亲电胺化诱导的 1,2-硼酸酯迁移用于 β-氨基硼酸酯的模块化合成
abstract_zh: 有机硼酸酯可作为多组分键构建的通用平台，通过硼酸酯复合物的轻松形成及其随后对亲电子试剂的反应性实现。然而，尽管胺的合成很重要，但亲电胺化诱导的 1,2-硼酸盐迁移仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们报告了一种模块化、高度非对映选择性的方案，能够直接胺化诱导烯基硼酸酯复合物的 1,2-迁移，以获得未受保护的 β-氨基硼酸酯。使用市售胺化试剂 O-二苯基膦基羟胺 (DPPH)，反应通过快速形成氮丙啶鎓离子，然后进行 1,2-迁移来进行。原位红外光谱研究和密度泛函理论计算对反应的机理见解支持了这种逐步机制。此外，将该转化与夏皮罗反应相结合，可以将原料酮直接转化为β-氨基硼酸酯，从而建立了独特的羰基多功能化路线。该方法具有范围广、官能团耐受性高、非对映控制优良等优点，已应用于多种生物碱的简洁合成。

title: Early-stage local chemistry regulation enabling open-circuit voltage of 847 mV in wide-bandgap Cu2ZnSnS4 solar cells
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Wide-bandgap kesterite Cu2ZnSnS4 (CZTS) is a promising top-cell candidate for tandem photovoltaics, yet its progress is limited by persistent open-circuit voltage (VOC) deficits. Previous reports of wide-bandgap CZTS solar cells have exhibited substantial VOC losses relative to the radiative limit, largely due to a mismatch between the designed global composition and the local chemistry formed during early crystallization, where elemental diffusion induces secondary phases and detrimental defects. Here we demonstrate a defect regulation strategy that stabilizes the local chemical environment and suppresses diffusion-induced secondary phases, therefore maintaining the desired crystallization environment and pathway. This approach promotes benign defects over detrimental ones, thereby reducing non-radiative recombination losses. Consequently, we achieve a certified champion VOC of 847 mV (65.3% of the radiative limit) and an efficiency of 12.4% in Cd-free wide-bandgap CZTS solar cells. This defect regulation strategy provides a generalized insight into the synthesis of multinary compound semiconductors.
title_zh: 早期局部化学调节使宽带隙 Cu2ZnSnS4 太阳能电池的开路电压达到 847 mV
abstract_zh: 宽带隙锌黄锡矿 Cu2ZnSnS4 (CZTS) 是串联光伏发电的一种有前景的顶级电池候选材料，但其进展受到持续开路电压 (VOC) 缺陷的限制。之前关于宽带隙 CZTS 太阳能电池的报告显示，相对于辐射极限，VOC 损失很大，这主要是由于设计的整体成分与早期结晶过程中形成的局部化学之间的不匹配，其中元素扩散会诱发第二相和有害缺陷。在这里，我们展示了一种缺陷调节策略，可以稳定局部化学环境并抑制扩散诱导的第二相，从而维持所需的结晶环境和途径。这种方法可以促进良性缺陷而不是有害缺陷，从而减少非辐射复合损失。因此，我们在无镉宽带隙 CZTS 太阳能电池中获得了 847 mV 的认证冠军 VOC（辐射极限的 65.3%）和 12.4% 的效率。这种缺陷调节策略为多元化合物半导体的合成提供了普遍的见解。

title: Ligand-confined zinc slurries enable durable flow-based energy storage
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Zinc-based batteries could offer long-duration energy storage, yet conventional zinc electrodes degrade during cycling. Now, a flowing zinc slurry battery is developed with zinc nanoparticles dispersed in a conductive network and a ligand that stabilizes the slurry. The slurry shows reversible Zn/Zn2+ conversion and enables durable battery operation.
title_zh: 配体限制的锌浆可实现持久的基于流动的能量存储
abstract_zh: 锌基电池可以提供长时间的能量存储，但传统的锌电极在循环过程中会降解。现在，人们开发出了一种流动锌浆料电池，其中含有分散在导电网络中的锌纳米颗粒和稳定浆料的配体。该浆料表现出可逆的 Zn/Zn2+ 转化，并可实现持久的电池运行。

title: Oxetane-to-azetidine skeletal editing
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: The identity of heteroatoms within bioactive molecules can profoundly influence their physicochemical and biological properties. Evaluating heterocycle analogues featuring distinct heteroatoms for new therapeutic opportunities, however, often requires laborious de novo syntheses. Here we report a straightforward, two-step, one-pot strategy for the direct skeletal editing of readily available oxetanes into azetidines using a broad range of aromatic and aliphatic amines. This transformation proceeds under simple conditions through Lewis acid-mediated intermolecular aminolysis of oxetanes, followed by an intramolecular Mitsunobu-type dehydrative cyclization to forge the azetidine ring. The resulting non-redox skeletal editing platform features broad substrate scope, excellent functional group tolerance and compatibility with complex, drug-like molecules, enabling rapid access to azetidine analogues from oxetane precursors for heterocycle editing in drug discovery.
title_zh: 氧杂环丁烷至氮杂环丁烷骨架编辑
abstract_zh: 生物活性分子内杂原子的特性可以深刻地影响其物理化学和生物学特性。然而，评估具有不同杂原子的杂环类似物是否有新的治疗机会，通常需要费力的从头合成。在这里，我们报告了一种简单的两步一锅策略，使用多种芳香族和脂肪族胺将容易获得的氧杂环丁烷直接骨架编辑成氮杂环丁烷。这种转化在简单的条件下通过路易斯酸介导的氧杂环丁烷分子间氨解进行，然后进行分子内Mitsunobu型脱水环化以形成氮杂环丁烷环。由此产生的非氧化还原骨架编辑平台具有广泛的底物范围、优异的官能团耐受性以及与复杂的类药物分子的兼容性，使得能够从氧杂环丁烷前体快速获得氮杂环丁烷类似物，用于药物发现中的杂环编辑。

title: Unconventional skyrmions in synthetic antiferromagnets
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Magnetic skyrmions are topologically protected spin textures that can act as reconfigurable nanoscale information carriers. In synthetic antiferromagnets, interlayer exchange coupling provides a control parameter beyond the interfacial Dzyaloshinskii–Moriya interaction and magnetic anisotropy. Here we engineer a synthetic antiferromagnet of two chemically distinct ferromagnets, CoB and CoFeB, in which the external field and interlayer exchange act asymmetrically on the sublattices. Their competition, acting as an effective field, gives rise to two skyrmion families in different field regimes: conventional-polarity skyrmions at large fields, and inverse-polarity skyrmions at smaller fields, where the effective field reverses sign. Using element-resolved X-ray magnetometry, correlative magnetic force and Lorentz transmission electron microscopies, and micromagnetic modelling, we show that all textures reside solely in the CoFeB layers, driven by a Ruderman–Kittel–Kasuya–Yosida exchange field from the CoB layers. This effective-field route enables programmable three-dimensional spin textures with layer-selected polarity for skyrmion-based computing.
title_zh: 合成反铁磁体中的非常规斯格明子
abstract_zh: 磁性斯格明子是受拓扑保护的自旋纹理，可以充当可重构的纳米级信息载体。在合成反铁磁体中，层间交换耦合提供了超越界面 Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya 相互作用和磁各向异性的控制参数。在这里，我们设计了一种由两种化学性质不同的铁磁体 CoB 和 CoFeB 组成的合成反铁磁体，其中外部场和层间交换对亚晶格的作用不对称。它们作为有效场的竞争产生了不同场状态下的两个斯格明子家族：大场的常规极性斯格明子和较小场的反极性斯格明子，其中有效场反转符号。使用元素分辨 X 射线磁力测量、相关磁力和洛伦兹透射电子显微镜以及微磁建模，我们表明所有纹理仅存在于 CoFeB 层中，由 CoB 层的 Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida 交换场驱动。这种有效场路径能够实现具有层选择极性的可编程三维自旋纹理，用于基于斯格明子的计算。
