title: Role of Pbr1, a putative oxidoreductase, in the ER quality control and folding of yeast Fks1 glucan synthase
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The biogenesis of multipass membrane proteins challenges the endoplasmic reticulum (ER) quality control, particularly when transmembrane segments contain polar or charged residues required for function. Fks1, the catalytic subunit of yeast β-(1,3)-glucan synthase, exemplifies this challenge because its large multipass transmembrane architecture must support glucan synthesis at the plasma membrane while also undergoing efficient biogenesis in the ER. Here, we investigate the cellular role of
                    PBR1
                    (
                    YNL181W
                    ), an essential gene whose role remains uncharacterized even though its predicted product has similarity to oxidoreductases. By integrating quantitative morphological profiling with global genetic interaction analysis, we found that
                    PBR1
                    function converges on cell-wall biosynthesis and closely parallels that of
                    FKS1
                    . Partial loss of Pbr1 function caused temperature-sensitive growth defects but also impaired β-(1,3)-glucan synthesis, and weakened cell-wall integrity. Under these conditions, Fks1 failed to accumulate at the cell surface and, instead, accumulated in ER-associated compartments, where it exhibited reduced stability. Biochemical analyses revealed the accumulation of immature Fks1 species, including forms defective in glycosylation, consistent with compromised ER quality control. A spontaneous missense suppressor allele of
                    FKS1
                    partially restored Fks1 stability and growth, supporting a functional relationship between the two proteins. Pbr1 is a cytosol-facing ER membrane protein that physically associates with Fks1, and structural modeling suggests that it adopts a Rossmann-like fold capable of binding pyridine nucleotides despite divergence from canonical catalytic motifs. Together, these findings identify Pbr1 as an ER-associated, chaperone-like factor required for the folding and maturation of Fks1.
title_zh: Pbr1（一种假定的氧化还原酶）在 ER 质量控制和酵母 Fks1 葡聚糖合酶折叠中的作用
abstract_zh:
多通道膜蛋白的生物合成对内质网 (ER) 质量控制提出了挑战，特别是当跨膜片段含有功能所需的极性或带电残基时。 Fks1 是酵母 β-(1,3)-葡聚糖合酶的催化亚基，它体现了这一挑战，因为其大型多通道跨膜结构必须支持质膜上的葡聚糖合成，同时在内质网中进行有效的生物发生。在这里，我们研究了细胞的作用
                    策略BR1
                    （
                    YNL181W
                    ），这是一个重要基因，尽管其预测产物与氧化还原酶相似，但其作用仍未得到表征。通过将定量形态学分析与全局遗传相互作用分析相结合，我们发现
                    策略BR1
                    功能集中在细胞壁生物合成上，并且与细胞壁生物合成非常相似
                    FKS1
                    。 Pbr1 功能的部分丧失会导致温度敏感的生长缺陷，但也会损害 β-(1,3)-葡聚糖的合成，并削弱细胞壁的完整性。在这些条件下，Fks1 未能在细胞表面积累，而是积累在 ER 相关区室中，在那里它表现出稳定性降低。生化分析揭示了未成熟 Fks1 物种的积累，包括糖基化缺陷的形式，这与 ER 质量控制受损一致。自发错义抑制等位基因
                    FKS1
                    部分恢复 Fks1 稳定性和

title: Goal-directed modulation of the default network supports interactions between selective attention, working memory, and prior knowledge
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Memory is central to flexible, goal-directed behavior. Prior knowledge shapes our current decisions and future plans and guides our attention to selectively prioritize relevant information in our complex, noisy world. Yet, most research on the neural basis of selective attention has focused on novel stimuli and has defined goal relevance based on perceptual features rather than prior knowledge. We investigated how the brain supports selective attention when goal relevance depends on prior knowledge, and compared selection of novel (memory-independent) versus familiar (memory-enhanced) stimuli. Using multiecho fMRI, we recorded brain activity during a selective working memory task involving pictures of famous (familiar) and anonymous (novel) people and places. We manipulated the relevance of fame to task performance: In “fame relevant” task blocks, participants selectively attended to famous while ignoring anonymous stimuli; in “fame irrelevant” blocks, they attended to anonymous while ignoring famous stimuli. Compared to a nonselective, categorization task, the selective working memory task elicited sustained coactivation of frontoparietal control and dorsal attention networks. Task-relevant contrasted with task-irrelevant stimuli elicited transient coactivation of frontoparietal control and default network regions, irrespective of stimulus fame. Within the DN, this effect was driven by both enhanced activation for task-relevant stimuli and suppression for task-irrelevant stimuli, confirming attention-driven neuromodulation. Further, selective working memory coactivated these high-order, heteromodal brain networks while lowering activity in visual regions. Our findings elucidate the neural underpinnings of prior knowledge-guided selection of perceptual inputs for working memory, suggesting differences from those previously reported for perception-guided selection.
title_zh: 默认网络的目标导向调制支持选择性注意、工作记忆和先验知识之间的交互
abstract_zh: 记忆对于灵活、目标导向的行为至关重要。先验知识决定了我们当前的决策和未来的计划，并引导我们的注意力在复杂、嘈杂的世界中选择性地优先考虑相关信息。然而，大多数关于选择性注意的神经基础的研究都集中在新刺激上，并根据感知特征而不是先验知识定义了目标相关性。我们研究了当目标相关性取决于先验知识时大脑如何支持选择性注意，并比较了新奇（与记忆无关）和熟悉（记忆增强）刺激的选择。使用多回波功能磁共振成像，我们记录了选择性工作记忆任务期间的大脑活动，该任务涉及著名（熟悉）和匿名（新颖）的人和地点的图片。我们操纵了名声与任务绩效的相关性：在“名声相关”任务块中，参与者有选择地关注名人，而忽略匿名刺激；在“与名气无关”的街区，他们专注于匿名，而忽略了著名的刺激。与非选择性分类任务相比，选择性工作记忆任务引发了额顶控制和背侧注意网络的持续共同激活。与任务相关的刺激与与任务无关的刺激相比，会引起额顶控制和默认网络区域的短暂共激活，而与刺激的名气无关。在 DN 中，这种效应是由任务相关刺激的增强激活和任务无关刺激的抑制驱动的，证实了注意力驱动的神经调节。此外，选择性工作记忆共同激活

title_zh: 可涂漆的皮肤干电极，具有坚固的皮肤和设备连接，用于无线传感和人机界面
abstract_zh:
可靠且连续的电生理记录对于健康监测和人机交互非常重要。然而，大多数现有的表皮电极要么在皮肤变形和出汗期间皮肤与电极接触有限，要么由于固有的机械不匹配而导致软电极和相对刚性的数据采集系统之间的连接不稳定。此外，它们缺乏个性化进一步阻碍了长期使用，特别是对于儿童、青少年和对耻辱敏感的个人。在这里，这项工作提出了一种可涂漆、在皮肤上绘制的干电极，它在分层纹理的皮肤形貌上形成超共形界面，具有厚度梯度，以最大限度地减少界面应力，实现低接触阻抗（10.8 kΩ cm）
                    2
                    ）和对皮肤的高附着力（~963 kPa）。由此产生的电极的形状和颜色是可定制的，将它们从“医疗设备”转变为有趣的可穿戴配件，从而提高用户的依从性和长期可穿戴性。此外，原位可涂性能够与多孔银纺织连接器无缝集成，产生具有内置模量梯度的互锁连接，以实现稳定的信号传输。该平台的多功能性通过多种用例得到证明，包括长期复杂日常活动中的无线心电图监测、用于手势识别和机器人手控制的机器学习肌电图、以及用于神经反应和神经反应的穿发脑电图检测。

title: Internal stress controls tendril writhing dynamics in climbing plants
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: We present experimental results on the writhing dynamics of cucumber plant tendrils subjected to an axial traction force. At low forces, the tendrils’ curvature saturates exponentially in time at a limiting value. At forces higher than the critical threshold, the tendril fails to coil but develops an intrinsic coiling-prone stress, corresponding to an intrinsic residual curvature, visible if the load is released. Growth-field assessments indicate that curvature arises from differential growth. To understand these experiments we develop an autotropic morphoelastic growth model with a bi-strip geometry, in which one strip undergoes mechanosensitive growth. In the absence of an external load, curvature generation is solely limited by internal stresses. To link the actual curvature to a finite external force, the tendril is approximated as a Kirchhoff rod. The resulting model reproduces the two observed regimes: below the critical axial force, the tendril coils, and above this force, the tendril remains straight but still exhibits intrinsic curvature.
title_zh: 内应力控制攀缘植物卷须的扭动动态
abstract_zh: 我们提出了黄瓜植物卷须在轴向牵引力作用下的扭动动力学的实验结果。在低力下，卷须的曲率随时间呈指数饱和到极限值。在高于临界阈值的力下，卷须无法卷曲，但会产生内在的易于卷曲的应力，对应于内在的残余曲率，如果释放负载，则可见。生长场评估表明曲率是由差异生长引起的。为了理解这些实验，我们开发了一种具有双带几何形状的自向形态弹性生长模型，其中一个带经历机械敏感生长。在没有外部载荷的情况下，曲率的产生仅受内部应力的限制。为了将实际曲率与有限外力联系起来，卷须被近似为基尔霍夫杆。所得模型再现了两种观察到的状态：低于临界轴向力，卷须线圈；高于该力，卷须保持笔直，但仍表现出固有曲率。

title: Uninterrupted optical resolution of identical point scatterers undergoing nanometric changes in distance
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: In established superresolution fluorescence microscopy or nanoscopy, resolving identical fluorescent molecules at subdiffraction distances requires the molecules to emit sequentially so that they briefly become discernible from their neighbors one after another. Simultaneous tracking of multiple fluorophores that are only a few nanometers apart is thus conceptually and practically impossible. We have recently shown that probing a subdiffraction region with an excitation beam featuring an intensity zero, i.e., MINFLUX superresolution, localizes and resolves closely packed identical fluorophores without interruption. Here, we provide a conceptual framework for resolving and tracking constantly emitting identical fluorophores—more generally, point scatterers—that undergo random changes in position. In particular, we show that the detection rates available in fluorescence microscopy are sufficient to track sub-10 nm distance changes within micro- to milliseconds. By using a DNA origami construct with a fixed and a movable fluorophore as a proxy, we provide a proof-of-concept that thermally driven conformational changes of macromolecules are continuously detectable with visible light. Conformational changes of the DNA nanostructure leading to random jumps in distance of about 10 nm between two labels are registered within ~1 ms. Our work paves the way toward superresolving complex conformational transitions of individual biomolecules with focused light.
title_zh: 经历纳米级距离变化的相同点散射体的不间断光学分辨率
abstract_zh: 在已建立的超分辨率荧光显微镜或纳米显微镜中，在亚衍射距离处解析相同的荧光分子需要分子顺序发射，以便它们可以一个接一个地短暂地与邻近的分子辨别。因此，同时跟踪相距仅几纳米的多个荧光团在概念上和实际上都是不可能的。我们最近表明，用强度为零的激发光束（即 MINFLUX 超分辨率）探测亚衍射区域，可以不间断地定位和解析紧密堆积的相同荧光团。在这里，我们提供了一个概念框架，用于解析和跟踪不断发射相同的荧光团（更一般地说，点散射体），这些荧光团的位置发生随机变化。特别是，我们表明荧光显微镜的检测率足以跟踪微秒至毫秒内亚 10 nm 的距离变化。通过使用具有固定和可移动荧光团的 DNA 折纸结构作为代理，我们提供了一个概念验证，即可以用可见光连续检测大分子的热驱动构象变化。 DNA 纳米结构的构象变化导致两个标签之间约 10 nm 距离的随机跳跃，在约 1 ms 内被记录。我们的工作为利用聚焦光超分辨单个生物分子的复杂构象转变铺平了道路。

title: Enteroendocrine cells wire the gut–brain vagal axis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The vagal sensory nervous system plays important roles in mediating gut–brain communication and maintaining physiological homeostasis. Although recent research has greatly enhanced our understanding of the function of vagal sensory neurons, little is known about what guides the vagal sensory nerve fibers to innervate the intestine and form a complex gut–brain sensory network. Here, using zebrafish genetic models to trace the development of the intestinal vagal network, we found that the development of the intestinal vagal sensory network is coupled with the formation of enteroendocrine cells (EECs). Vagal sensory neurons begin to innervate the intestine at 2 d postfertilization. Vagal nerve fibers branch out toward the newly formed EECs in the intestinal epithelium. The newly formed EECs display active actin filaments at their base, enabling them to physically engage with the vagal sensory fibers and facilitate the formation of the intestinal vagal sensory network. Genetically ablating EECs impairs intestinal vagal network formation and alters the vagal central projection pattern. Ablating EECs induces apoptosis in a subset of vagal sensory neurons and reduces the number of central projecting axons of the intestine innervating vagal sensory neurons. Moreover, ablating EECs completely alters the brain’s response to nutrient ingestion and diminishes nutrient-induced hindbrain and hypothalamus neuron activation. Finally, loss of EECs increases food intake while impairing adipose tissue development and survival. Together, our study revealed that EECs guide vagal sensory neuron development and intestinal vagal network formation. Loss of EECs impairs the anatomical vagal sensory axis and alters gut–brain signaling transmission.
title_zh: 肠内分泌细胞连接肠-脑迷走神经轴
abstract_zh: 迷走感觉神经系统在介导肠脑通讯和维持生理稳态方面发挥着重要作用。尽管最近的研究极大地增强了我们对迷走神经感觉神经元功能的理解，但我们对是什么引导迷走神经感觉神经纤维支配肠道并形成复杂的肠-脑感觉网络知之甚少。在这里，利用斑马鱼遗传模型追踪肠道迷走神经网络的发育，我们发现肠道迷走神经感觉网络的发育与肠内分泌细胞（EEC）的形成耦合。迷走神经感觉神经元在受精后第 2 天开始支配肠道。迷走神经纤维向肠上皮中新形成的 EEC 分支。新形成的 EEC 在其基部显示出活性肌动蛋白丝，使它们能够与迷走神经感觉纤维进行物理接触，并促进肠道迷走神经感觉网络的形成。基因消融 EEC 会损害肠道迷走神经网络的形成并改变迷走神经中央投射模式。消融 EEC 会诱导一部分迷走神经感觉神经元凋亡，并减少支配迷走神经感觉神经元的肠道中央突出轴突的数量。此外，消融 EEC 会完全改变大脑对营养摄入的反应，并减少营养诱导的后脑和下丘脑神经元激活。最后，EEC 的损失会增加食物摄入量，同时损害脂肪组织的发育和存活。总之，我们的研究表明 EEC 引导迷走神经感觉神经元

title: Experimental drought drives divergent succession of soil microbiota
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: As droughts become increasingly severe and prolonged worldwide, understanding how belowground biodiversity changes over time under water limitation is critical for assessing ecosystem resilience. However, long-term and continuous observations of soil microbial responses to drought remain rare. Here, using a 6-y experimental drought in a tallgrass prairie ecosystem, we showed that experimental drought reshaped the community compositions of soil bacteria, fungi, and protists, accompanied by progressive declines in microbial diversity and biomass. Analyses of time–decay relationships and paired community differences between drought and ambient conditions revealed increasingly divergent successional trajectories of soil microbiota under drought. Although stochastic processes dominated community assembly overall, their relative importance declined over time, particularly for bacteria in drought-treated soils, suggesting increasingly strong deterministic environmental filtering imposed by drought. In addition, drought reduced microbial network size but increased the complexity and stability of bacterial networks by favoring drought-tolerant taxa. Furthermore, drought-driven shifts in microbial community compositions significantly altered functional genes and associated ecosystem functioning. These findings suggest that microbial communities may become less variable but more vulnerable, and the detrimental effects of biodiversity loss on ecosystems could be more severe in an increasingly drought-prone world.
title_zh: 实验性干旱导致土壤微生物群的分化演替
abstract_zh: 随着全球干旱变得越来越严重和持续时间越来越长，了解地下生物多样性在水限制下如何随时间变化对于评估生态系统的恢复力至关重要。然而，对土壤微生物对干旱反应的长期、连续观察仍然很少。在这里，我们在高草草原生态系统中进行了为期 6 年的实验性干旱，结果表明实验性干旱重塑了土壤细菌、真菌和原生生物的群落组成，同时伴随着微生物多样性和生物量的逐渐下降。对干旱和环境条件之间的时间衰变关系和配对群落差异的分析揭示了干旱下土壤微生物群的演替轨迹日益不同。尽管随机过程总体上主导了群落组装，但它们的相对重要性随着时间的推移而下降，特别是对于干旱处理土壤中的细菌来说，这表明干旱造成的确定性环境过滤越来越强。此外，干旱减少了微生物网络的规模，但通过有利于耐旱的类群而增加了细菌网络的复杂性和稳定性。此外，干旱驱动的微生物群落组成的变化显着改变了功能基因和相关的生态系统功能。这些发现表明，微生物群落可能变得不那么可变，但更加脆弱，在日益干旱的世界中，生物多样性丧失对生态系统的不利影响可能更加严重。

title: Geometry controls momentum flux in the sprinkler problem
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Hydro- and aero-mechanical devices convert fluid flows into useful motions, force, and power. The operating principles can involve subtle and poorly understood physics, as epitomized by open questions about systems that aspirate flows through curving tubular arms. Since its introduction by Mach and popularization by Feynman, the so-called reverse sprinkler problem has evoked many competing theories and fluid mechanical effects that have not to date been distinguished by experiments. Here we conduct a series of experiments that directly report on the motions, torques, and flows for devices whose geometries are tailored to disambiguate the leading hypotheses. Our observations run counter to several ideas, such as those based on the total angular momentum of the fluid and others focusing on the flow and pressure distributions at the outer portions of the arms. The measurements instead reveal strong correlations between the sense of torque/rotation and the fluid momentum fluxing into the device. These results suggest an operating principle for the reverse sprinkler involving isotropic input of fluid from the far field and swirl-up in the arms that generates angular momentum, a residual portion of which is injected inside and drives rotation. The mass-to-momentum flux conversion is governed by the geometry of the curving arms. The physics learned here is fundamental to flow–structure interaction problems and may inform applications for harvesting and transforming flow energy.
title_zh: 几何控制喷头问题中的动量通量
abstract_zh: 液压和航空机械装置将流体流动转化为有用的运动、力和功率。操作原理可能涉及微妙且鲜为人知的物理原理，如有关通过弯曲管状臂吸入流体的系统的开放问题所体现的那样。自从马赫提出并由费曼推广以来，所谓的反向喷水器问题引发了许多相互竞争的理论和流体力学效应，而这些理论和流体力学效应迄今为止尚未通过实验来区分。在这里，我们进行了一系列实验，直接报告设备的运动、扭矩和流量，这些设备的几何形状经过定制，以消除主要假设的歧义。我们的观察与一些想法背道而驰，例如基于流体总角动量的想法和其他关注臂外部的流量和压力分布的想法。相反，测量结果揭示了扭矩/旋转感与流入设备的流体动量之间的强相关性。这些结果表明了反向喷头的工作原理，涉及从远场各向同性输入流体并在臂中形成旋涡，产生角动量，其剩余部分被注入内部并驱动旋转。质量到动量通量的转换由弯曲臂的几何形状控制。这里学到的物理学是流-结构相互作用问题的基础，并且可以为收集和转换流能量的应用提供信息。

title: Orbitofrontal noradrenaline supports adaptive learning-rate adjustment in probabilistic reversal learning
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Adaptive decision-making in dynamic environments requires flexible adjustment of learning speed to balance stability and flexibility. When outcomes are highly stochastic, learners must avoid over-interpreting noise and update more slowly, whereas in volatile environments where contingencies change frequently, learning should accelerate to rapidly incorporate new evidence. Theories propose that internal estimates of uncertainty tune learning rates through neuromodulation-dependent mechanisms. Here, we investigated how noradrenergic inputs from the locus coeruleus (LC) to the orbitofrontal cortex (OFC) support adaptive learning under uncertainty. We show that, in a probabilistic reversal learning task performed across different levels of stochasticity, rats exhibited behavior best explained by an adaptive reinforcement-learning model in which learning rates dynamically adjusted according to model-estimated stochasticity and volatility, outperforming standard fixed-rate models. Noradrenaline release in the OFC closely tracked trial-by-trial, model-derived volatility estimates around contingency changes. Disrupting LC→OFC noradrenergic inputs reproduced the model-predicted impairment in adaptive learning-rate adjustment associated with model-estimated volatility. Together, these findings identify OFC noradrenergic signaling as a key circuit mechanism supporting learning-rate adjustment in response to internal estimates of volatility during adaptive decision-making under uncertainty.
title_zh: 眶额去甲肾上腺素支持概率逆转学习中的自适应学习率调整
abstract_zh: 动态环境下的自适应决策需要灵活调整学习速度，以平衡稳定性和灵活性。当结果高度随机时，学习者必须避免过度解释噪音并更慢地更新，而在突发事件频繁变化的不稳定环境中，学习应该加速以快速吸收新证据。理论认为，不确定性的内部估计通过依赖于神经调节的机制来调整学习率。在这里，我们研究了从蓝斑（LC）到眶额皮质（OFC）的去甲肾上腺素输入如何支持不确定性下的适应性学习。我们表明，在不同随机性水平上执行的概率逆转学习任务中，老鼠表现出的行为可以通过自适应强化学习模型得到最好的解释，其中学习速率根据模型估计的随机性和波动性动态调​​整，优于标准的固定速率模型。 OFC 中去甲肾上腺素的释放密切跟踪了围绕意外变化的逐项试验、模型得出的波动性估计。破坏 LC→OFC 去甲肾上腺素能输入再现了与模型估计波动性相关的自适应学习率调整中的模型预测损伤。总之，这些发现将 OFC 去甲肾上腺素信号传导确定为一种关键的电路机制，支持学习率调整，以响应不确定性下自适应决策过程中波动性的内部估计。

title: Evolutionary innovation through fusion of sequences from across the tree of life
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Novel genes arise through multiple mechanisms, including gene duplication, gene fusion, and horizontal gene transfer (HGT). While HGT has increasingly been documented in animals, the posttransfer evolutionary fate of horizontally acquired genes is less well understood. We hypothesized that fusion with endogenous sequences in animal genomes might generate what we call “HGT-chimeras”: genes with regions of nonmetazoan and metazoan descent in the same open reading frame. To test this hypothesis, we developed a molecular phylogenetics pipeline that enables the identification of HGT-chimeras. We applied our pipeline to 319 high-quality annotated arthropod genomes and uncovered a high-confidence set of 274 HGT-chimeras corresponding to 104 independent origination events across diverse arthropods. HGT-chimeras contain intervals acquired from across the tree of life, and many likely originated via a gene duplication-based mechanism. To assess whether HGT-chimeras might be functionally important, we performed RT-PCR and Sanger sequencing of tissues from 20 arthropod species predicted to harbor HGT-chimeras in their genome. We found evidence for the expression of contiguous chimeric messenger RNA transcripts (mRNAs) for 36 of 41 tested HGT-chimeras across 18 of 20 different tested species. We also found evidence that HGT-chimeras evolve under purifying selection and have acquired potentially functional domain architectures, consistent with the hypothesis that these genes are in active use and may participate in diverse biological processes. These results illuminate an underappreciated combinatorial mechanism underlying the origin of novel genes across the largest animal phylum, and suggest that interdomain sequence fusion can play important roles in animal biology and evolution.
title_zh: 通过生命树序列的融合进行进化创新
abstract_zh: 新基因通过多种机制产生，包括基因复制、基因融合和水平基因转移（HGT）。虽然 HGT 在动物身上得到越来越多的记录，但水平获得基因的转移后进化命运尚不清楚。我们假设与动物基因组中的内源序列融合可能会产生我们所说的“HGT嵌合体”：在同一开放阅读框中具有非后生动物和后生动物血统区域的基因。为了检验这一假设，我们开发了一种分子系统发育管道，能够识别 HGT 嵌合体。我们将我们的流程应用于 319 个高质量带注释的节肢动物基因组，并发现了一组高置信度的 274 个 HGT 嵌合体，对应于不同节肢动物的 104 个独立起源事件。 HGT 嵌合体包含从整个生命树获得的间隔，并且许多可能起源于基于基因复制的机制。为了评估 HGT 嵌合体是否具有重要的功能，我们对 20 种节肢动物的组织进行了 RT-PCR 和桑格测序，预计其基因组中含有 HGT 嵌合体。我们发现了 20 个不同测试物种中的 18 个中的 41 个测试的 HGT 嵌合体中的 36 个存在连续嵌合信使 RNA 转录本 (mRNA) 表达的证据。我们还发现证据表明 HGT 嵌合体在纯化选择下进化，并获得了潜在的功能域结构，这与这些基因正在被积极使用并可能参与不同的生物过程的假设相一致。这些结果揭示了一种被低估的现象

title: Combined signals of scientific and social consensus best mobilize action on societal challenges even if government and industry oppose
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
When facing real-world societal challenges, people make decisions about how to act based on multiple, often conflicting messages from various influential stakeholders such as governments, scientists, fellow citizens, and private companies. How does the public decide to act amid potentially converging or diverging signals from multiple entities in society? Which entities remain influential even if other groups appear apathetic or stand in opposition? This question becomes especially important in contexts like the United States where the government, industry, scientists, and public sentiment may diverge. In two conjoint experiments spanning over 40,000 evaluations, one behavioral experiment and a digital field study (
                    N
                    s = 1,515, 2,005, 1,604, 50,668 respectively; all preregistered), we show the relative and combined influence of government bodies, scientific experts, industry stakeholders, and social consensus in the general public in driving responses to 10 issues in environmental, health, and technology domains. Across domains, support from scientists and social consensus was most influential in shaping the American public’s responses to societal problems including policy support, product preferences, donations to a cause, and social media engagement. And when facing opposition from government and industry, the combined, but not isolated, support of scientists and social consensus reliably mobilized action across domains. This work suggests that even amid rising systemic opposition to solving contemporary societal challenges, scientists and the public can come together to mobilize action.
title_zh: 即使政府和行业反对，科学和社会共识的综合信号也能最好地动员人们采取行动应对社会挑战
abstract_zh:
当面临现实世界的社会挑战时，人们根据来自政府、科学家、公民和私营公司等各种有影响力的利益相关者的多种且常常相互冲突的信息来决定如何采取行动。在社会多个实体发出的可能趋同或趋异的信号中，公众如何决定采取行动？即使其他团体表现得冷漠或持反对态度，哪些实体仍然具有影响力？在美国这样的环境下，这个问题变得尤为重要，因为政府、行业、科学家和公众情绪可能存在分歧。在两项涉及 40,000 多项评估的联合实验中，一项行为实验和一项数字实地研究（

title: HDA19-mediated deacetylation of histone H3.3 at lysines 27 and 36 regulates plant sensitivity to salt stress
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Plants survive extreme environments through rapid chromatin reprogramming, yet the epigenetic marks that confer stress resilience remain poorly understood. Histone deacetylase HDA19 is a key epigenetic regulator in Arabidopsis, and
                    hda19
                    -deficient mutants display tolerance to multiple abiotic stresses, including drought, heat, and salinity. Using lysine acetylome profiling, we identified a noncanonical K27/K36 diacetylation mark on histone H3.3, among nine H3 variants, as a specific substrate of HDA19. Under salinity stress, this mark decreased in wild-type plants but increased in
                    hda19
                    mutants, while other known H3 modifications were similarly affected in both genotypes. Mimicking constitutive diacetylation of H3.3K27/K36 through lysine-to-glutamine substitutions promoted accumulation of stress-responsive late embryogenesis abundant (LEA) proteins and conferred salinity tolerance in seedlings, phenocopying
                    hda19
                    mutants. Furthermore, generating the
                    lea7-1/lea29-1/rab18-1
                    triple mutant abolished
                    hda19
                    -dependent salinity tolerance, confirming the LEA proteins’ role downstream of HDA19. Our findings demonstrate that H3.3K27/K36 diacetylation, modulated by HDA19, drives LEA protein accumulation and enables plants to withstand environmental stress, revealing a core mechanism of plant stress resilience.

title: Pseudokinase-converting mutation in protein kinase C alpha drives chordoid glioma by pathway rewiring
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Chordoid glioma (ChG) is a rare, low-grade brain tumor characterized by a novel recurrent point mutation, D463H, in the kinase domain of protein kinase C alpha (PKCα). The mutation is invariably an Asp to His substitution, suggesting a unique function beyond catalytic inactivation associated with other cancer-associated PKCα mutations. Here, we show that this mutation converts PKCα into a pseudokinase, abolishing catalytic activity, and, additionally, confers novel scaffolding functions. Activity assays in vitro and in cellulo revealed that PKCα
                    D463H
                    is catalytically inactive and functions as a dominant-negative to suppress endogenous PKC activity. Molecular dynamics simulations predicted that mutation to His, but not Asn, not only destabilizes the active site, but stabilizes the substrate-binding helices in the kinase C-lobe to potentially promote aberrant interactions. Supporting this, phosphoproteomic, proximity labeling, and coimmunoprecipitation mass spectrometry data from cells overexpressing PKCα
                    D463H
                    identified both altered phosphorylation of substrates and binding to multiple proteins involved in cell–cell junctions compared to WT enzyme. Last, single nuclei RNAseq established that ChG derives from specialized tanycytes. Our data reveal that this disease-defining, fully penetrant mutation converts PKCα into a pseudokinase with novel scaffold functions that uniquely rewire the cellular interactome to impair cell junction function.
title_zh: 蛋白激酶 C α 中的假激酶转换突变通过通路重新布线驱动脊索样神经胶质瘤
abstract_zh:
脊索样神经胶质瘤 (ChG) 是一种罕见的低级别脑肿瘤，其特征是蛋白激酶 C α (PKCα) 激酶结构域中出现新的复发性点突变 D463H。该突变始终是 Asp 到 His 的取代，这表明除了与其他癌症相关 PKCα 突变相关的催化失活之外，还具有独特的功能。在这里，我们证明这种突变将 PKCα 转化为假激酶，消除催化活性，此外还赋予新的支架功能。体外和细胞内的活性测定表明 PKCα
                    D463H
                    催化失活并作为显性失活抑制内源 PKC 活性。分子动力学模拟预测，His 而非 Asn 的突变不仅会破坏活性位点的稳定性，还会稳定激酶 C 叶中的底物结合螺旋，从而可能促进异常相互作用。来自过表达 PKCα 的细胞的磷酸化蛋白质组学、邻近标记和免疫共沉淀质谱数据支持了这一点
                    D463H
                    与 WT 酶相比，确定了底物磷酸化的改变以及与细胞-细胞连接中涉及的多种蛋白质的结合。最后，单核 RNAseq 证实 ChG 源自特殊的单细胞。我们的数据表明，这种疾病定义的完全渗透突变将 PKCα 转化为具有新颖支架功能的假激酶，该功能独特地重新连接细胞相互作用组以损害细胞连接功能。

title: Zero-deforestation commitments in Indonesia’s palm oil sector achieve high compliance but no additionality
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: In response to public pressure, companies have increasingly adopted voluntary sustainable sourcing commitments. Yet, it often remains unclear whether such commitments lead only to the narrow goal of supplier compliance, or also to the broader goal of additionality, benefits beyond what would have occurred without commitments. A company’s ability to influence its suppliers’ behavior partly depends on the complexity of supply chains, yet data on supply chain linkages are limited, inhibiting causal evaluations. Here, we evaluate the compliance and additionality of zero-deforestation commitments (ZDCs) in the Indonesian palm oil sector, a major driver of tropical deforestation. We compiled a detailed dataset that integrates information about corporate ZDC implementation, supply chain linkages, and maps of palm-driven deforestation in Indonesia. We use this dataset to evaluate the causal impact of ZDCs on deforestation in oil palm concessions from 2018 to 2020 using difference-in-differences econometric methods. We find that concessions linked to companies with ZDCs had low deforestation (<1% per year from 2018 to 2020) and thus largely achieved compliance. Yet they experienced similar reductions in deforestation compared to concessions not covered by ZDCs, therefore showing no additionality. We attribute our finding of no additionality to broader changes in policy and economic conditions during the study period that may have reduced the remaining accessible forest and dampened market and regulatory incentives to clear forests for palm oil. Should these conditions change in the future, continued compliance with ZDCs could yield additional reductions in deforestation.
title_zh: 印度尼西亚棕榈油行业的零毁林承诺实现了高度合规性，但没有额外性
abstract_zh: 为了应对公众压力，公司越来越多地做出自愿的可持续采购承诺。然而，通常尚不清楚此类承诺是否仅导致供应商合规的狭隘目标，还是也导致额外性的更广泛目标，即超出没有承诺的情况下所能获得的收益。一家公司影响供应商行为的能力部分取决于供应链的复杂性，但供应链联系的数据有限，阻碍了因果评估。在这里，我们评估了印度尼西亚棕榈油行业零毁林承诺（ZDC）的合规性和额外性，该行业是热带森林砍伐的主要驱动力。我们编制了一个详细的数据集，其中整合了有关企业 ZDC 实施、供应链联系以及印度尼西亚棕榈驱动的森林砍伐地图的信息。我们利用该数据集，采用双重差分计量经济学方法，评估 2018 年至 2020 年 ZDC 对油棕特许地森林砍伐的因果影响。我们发现，与拥有 ZDC 的公司相关的特许权的森林砍伐率较低（2018 年至 2020 年每年<1%），因此基本上实现了合规。然而，与 ZDC 未涵盖的特许权相比，它们的森林砍伐减少幅度相似，因此没有表现出额外性。我们将没有额外性的发现归因于研究期间政策和经济条件的更广泛变化，这些变化可能减少了剩余的可利用森林，并抑制了为棕榈油而砍伐森林的市场和监管激励措施。如果这些条件在 t 发生变化

title: Developmental divergence in voice–reward circuitry differentiates autistic from typically developing children and adolescents
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Adolescence is a period of profound social change marked by a developmental shift in attention and motivation from parents toward nonfamilial peers. Autism is a neurodevelopmental condition characterized by lifelong challenges in social communication. However, the neurobiological signatures of adolescent social reorientation in autism are poorly understood. Human voice processing is a primary driver of social learning and communication, but it remains understudied in the autism literature, particularly as it relates to neurodevelopmental change. Here we used functional brain imaging of voice processing in children and adolescents with autism and matched controls (ages 7 to 17) to examine neural responses to mother’s voice and nonfamilial voices. We identified divergent age-related patterns in autism across reward, salience, social evaluative, and frontoparietal processing regions consistent with models of an extended voice processing network. Results showed that while typically developing participants exhibited age-related increases in neural activity and connectivity within regions of the voice processing network, individuals with autism showed no age-related increases, and often decreases, in these regions. Adolescents with autism further revealed a reversal of the characteristic developmental pattern: with increasing age, they exhibited decreasing neural engagement with nonfamilial voices and increasing engagement with mother’s voice, a pattern that was most pronounced in individuals with more severe social communication challenges. Findings suggest that disrupted organization of the extended voice processing network, including reward, salience, social evaluative, and frontoparietal circuitry, may underlie atypical social neurodevelopment in autism. More broadly, results suggest that individual differences in social communication shape age-related neural patterns supporting social reorientation.
title_zh: 声音奖励回路的发育差异将自闭症患者与正常发育的儿童和青少年区分开来
abstract_zh: 青春期是一个深刻的社会变革时期，其特征是注意力和动机从父母向非家庭同龄人的发展转变。自闭症是一种神经发育疾病，其特征是社交沟通方面存在终生挑战。然而，人们对自闭症青少年社会重新定向的神经生物学特征知之甚少。人类语音处理是社会学习和交流的主要驱动力，但在自闭症文献中仍然没有得到充分研究，特别是因为它与神经发育变化有关。在这里，我们使用自闭症儿童和青少年以及匹配对照（7 至 17 岁）声音处理的功能性脑成像来检查对母亲声音和非家庭声音的神经反应。我们在奖励、显着性、社会评价和额顶叶处理区域中发现了自闭症中与年龄相关的不同模式，这与扩展语音处理网络的模型一致。结果表明，虽然典型的发育中参与者在语音处理网络区域内的神经活动和连接性表现出与年龄相关的增加，但患有自闭症的个体在这些区域中没有表现出与年龄相关的增加，并且经常减少。自闭症青少年进一步揭示了特征发展模式的逆转：随着年龄的增长，他们表现出对非家庭声音的神经参与减少，对母亲声音的参与增加，这种模式在社交沟通挑战更严重的个体中最为明显。研究结果表明，受损的器官

title: Raman imaging of the phycosphere reveals sharp gradients of organic matter exuded by single phytoplankton cells
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Phytoplankton cells exude a wide array of chemicals in the water column, generating a localized microenvironment known as the phycosphere. Although it is now well accepted that the phycosphere mediates interactions between phytoplankton and bacteria, the chemical gradients around individual phytoplankton cells have never been explicitly measured, and their shape has been classically assumed to be set by ideal diffusion. Here we used Raman microspectroscopy to obtain micrometer-scale measurements of the concentration profile of a phytoplankton metabolite (fucoxanthin) around individual phytoplankton cells of different species, having radii between
                    
                      
                        
                          2.5
                        
                      
                    
                    and 60
                    
                      
                        μ
                      
                    
                    m. We found that fucoxanthin concentration decreases more rapidly with distance from the cell than predicted by ideal diffusion, showing that the phycosphere includes compounds whose diffusion is characterized by nonideal effects. We explain this observation using a space-dependent diffusivity model where nonideality arises from viscosity and solubility gradients in the extracellular environment. Our results suggest an onion-structured model of the phycosphere, in which small hydrophilic solutes that obey ideal diffusion generate broad but weak gradients, whereas insoluble compounds are retained within
                    
                      
                        10
                      
                    
                    to
                    
                      
                        
                          20
                          
                          μ
                        
                      
                    
                    from the phytoplankton cell surface and yield steep gradients of organic matter. These observations, supported by evidence that fucoxanthin can act as an effective chemoattractant for marine bacteria, show the existence of strong and highly localized chemical cues with potentially far-reaching impacts on microbial interactions in aquatic environments. These findings highlight the importance of directly measuring the microscale chemical landscape experienced by marine microbes.
title_zh: 藻圈的拉曼成像揭示了单个浮游植物细胞分泌的有机物的尖锐梯度
abstract_zh:
浮游植物细胞在水体中分泌出多种化学物质，产生一个称为藻圈的局部微环境。尽管现在人们普遍认为藻圈介导浮游植物和细菌之间的相互作用，但单个浮游植物细胞周围的化学梯度从未被明确测量过，并且它们的形状通常被认为是由理想扩散设定的。在这里，我们使用拉曼显微光谱法获得了不同物种个体浮游植物细胞周围浮游植物代谢物（岩藻黄质）浓度分布的微米级测量值，其半径介于
                    
                      
                        
                          2.5
                        
                      
                    
                    和 60
                    
                      
                        μ
                      
                    
                    米。我们发现，随着与细胞的距离增加，岩藻黄质浓度下降的速度比理想扩散预测的要快，这表明藻圈中包含的化合物的扩散具有非理想效应。我们使用空间依赖性扩散率模型来解释这一观察结果，其中非理想性是由细胞外环境中的粘度和溶解度梯度引起的。我们的结果表明了藻圈的洋葱结构模型，其中服从理想扩散的小亲水溶质产生宽但弱的梯度，而不溶性化合物则保留在藻圈中。

title: CD64 enables TCR-dependent, MHC-independent CTL cytotoxicity of AML cells
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: CD8+ T cell–mediated cytotoxicity classically occurs through engagement of an alpha-beta T cell receptor (TCRαβ) with a peptide–class I major histocompatibility complex (pMHC). However, it is also known that cytotoxic CD8+ T lymphocytes (CTLs) can kill tumor cells in a pMHC-independent manner. The relative physiologic contribution and biological significance of pMHC-independent CTL killing remain unclear, and a receptor shared between CTLs and natural killer (NK) cells is generally invoked as the mechanism by which this occurs. In this study, we used acute myeloid leukemia (AML) as a model to examine mechanisms of pMHC-independent cytotoxicity and found a paradoxical TCR-dependent, MHC-independent mechanism that requires CD64. Utilizing knockouts of potential AML ligands and CTL receptors, we demonstrate that pMHC-independent cytotoxicity is a potent mechanism of CTL-mediating killing of AML cells and is largely restricted to CD64-expressing cells through an IFNγ-regulated process. Notably, we found that pMHC-independent CTL killing is not due to activation of commonly implicated NK activating receptors but rather requires an activated TCRαβ/CD3 complex. Thus, we identify a CD64-dependent, pMHC-independent, TCR-dependent mode of CTL cytotoxicity that appears highly enriched for in AML.
title_zh: CD64 使 AML 细胞具有 TCR 依赖性、MHC 独立性 CTL 细胞毒性
abstract_zh: CD8+ T 细胞介导的细胞毒性通常是通过 α-β T 细胞受体 (TCRαβ) 与 I 类肽主要组织相容性复合物 (pMHC) 的结合而发生。然而，众所周知，细胞毒性 CD8+ T 淋巴细胞 (CTL) 可以以不依赖于 pMHC 的方式杀死肿瘤细胞。不依赖 pMHC 的 CTL 杀伤的相对生理学贡献和生物学意义仍不清楚，CTL 和自然杀伤 (NK) 细胞之间共享的受体通常被认为是发生这种情况的机制。在这项研究中，我们使用急性髓系白血病 (AML) 作为模型来检查 pMHC 独立的细胞毒性机制，并发现了一种需要 CD64 的矛盾的 TCR 依赖性、MHC 独立机制。利用潜在的 AML 配体和 CTL 受体的敲除，我们证明 pMHC 独立的细胞毒性是 CTL 介导的 AML 细胞杀伤的有效机制，并且通过 IFNγ 调节的过程在很大程度上仅限于表达 CD64 的细胞。值得注意的是，我们发现不依赖 pMHC 的 CTL 杀伤并不是由于通常涉及的 NK 激活受体的激活，而是需要激活的 TCRαβ/CD3 复合物。因此，我们确定了 CD64 依赖、pMHC 独立、TCR 依赖的 CTL 细胞毒性模式，这种模式在 AML 中似乎高度富集。

title: Fusarium oxysporum–induced ABA signaling triggers root vascular remodeling for plant defense
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Root vascular pathogens like
                    Fusarium oxysporum
                    (Fo) severely impact agriculture by colonizing the xylem, thereby disrupting the transport of water, nutrients, and signaling molecules within host plants. However, their effects on root growth and vascular development before xylem invasion, and the underlying molecular mechanisms, remain poorly understood. Here, we show that Fo triggers a rapid, systemic, abscisic acid (ABA) that seems to induce a developmental reprogramming in Arabidopsis that occurs prior to vascular colonization. This response is associated with root growth inhibition, disorganization of the root apical meristem, and alterations in xylem architecture. High-resolution imaging reveals that initial contact with Fo elevates root ABA levels, which parallels the modulation of key developmental pathways, including MIR165/PHB and VND7, which regulate vascular patterning and mediate premature xylem differentiation and remodeling. Phloem development is also affected, likely through disruption of CLE45–BAM3 signaling. Mutants impaired in endodermal ABA signaling, ELTPp::
                    abi1-1
                    , and secondary wall formation,
                    cesa4,
                    show constitutive elevated ABA levels, xylem defects, and enhanced resistance to Fo, suggesting that ABA-induced vascular remodeling contributes to the formation of structural barriers that limit infection. Additionally, Fo infection induces homogalacturonan demethylation in the stele, a modification associated with cell wall stiffening and reduced pathogen spread, which is constitutively observed in ELTPp::
                    abi1-1
                    . Overall, our findings reveal ABA-mediated vascular plasticity, including cell wall remodeling as a developmentally encoded root defense mechanism. They highlight how transient hormonal cues reprogram root architecture to limit pathogen invasion and suggest strategies for crop protection.
title_zh: 尖孢镰刀菌诱导的 ABA 信号触发根部维管束重塑以实现植物防御
abstract_zh:
根维管束病原体如
                    尖孢镰刀菌
                    (Fo) 通过在木质部定植而严重影响农业，从而扰乱寄主植物内水、养分和信号分子的运输。然而，它们在木质部入侵之前对根生长和维管发育的影响以及潜在的分子机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们发现 Fo 会触发一种快速、系统性的脱落酸 (ABA)，这种脱落酸似乎会诱导拟南芥中发生在血管定植之前的发育重编程。这种反应与根生长抑制、根顶端分生组织的混乱以及木质部结构的改变有关。高分辨率成像显示，与 Fo 的初始接触会提高根部 ABA 水平，这与关键发育途径的调节平行，包括 MIR165/PHB 和 VND7，它们调节血管模式并介导过早的木质部分化和重塑。韧皮部发育也会受到影响，可能是通过破坏 CLE45-BAM3 信号传导而受到影响。内胚层 ABA 信号传导 ELTPp 受损的突变体::
                    阿比1-1
                    和次生壁的形成，
                    塞萨4,
                    显示了 ABA 水平的组成性升高、木质部缺陷和对 Fo 的抵抗力增强，表明 ABA 诱导的血管重塑有助于限制感染的结构屏障的形成。此外，Fo 感染会诱导中柱中的同型半乳糖醛酸去甲基化，这是一种与细胞壁硬化相关的修饰

title: Age-associated epigenetic drift trajectory and cross-national disparities in accelerated aging in domestic dogs
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Aging is accompanied by both increasing interindividual heterogeneity and systematic, age-associated alterations in DNA methylation (DNAm). Here, we investigated these complementary dimensions of epigenetic aging in dogs using global and locus-specific measures of epigenetic drift alongside clock-based estimates of biological aging. We observed pervasive, yet genomically structured epigenetic instability throughout the canine lifespan. The extent of age-associated epigenetic drift further varied by body size, suggesting biological stratification of methylation instability. Cross-national comparison of clock-derived epigenetic age acceleration (EAA) between South Korea and the United States revealed consistently higher EAA in Korean dogs, with sex-associated differences detected within the Korean cohort. We further identified CpGs with cohort-specific age-associated methylation patterns, indicating that population-level differences in epigenetic aging extend beyond clock-based estimates to locus-specific methylation dynamics. Together, these findings highlight population-level diversity in canine epigenetic aging and support dogs as a tractable model for investigating biological and environmental determinants of age-related epigenetic change.
title_zh: 与年龄相关的表观遗传漂移轨迹和家犬加速衰老的跨国差异
abstract_zh: 衰老伴随着个体间异质性的增加以及与年龄相关的 DNA 甲基化 (DNAm) 的系统性改变。在这里，我们使用表观遗传漂变的全局和位点特异性测量以及基于时钟的生物衰老估计来研究狗表观遗传衰老的这些互补维度。我们观察到在犬类的整个生命周期中普遍存在但基因组结构的表观遗传不稳定性。与年龄相关的表观遗传漂移的程度进一步随体型的不同而变化，这表明甲基化不稳定性的生物分层。韩国和美国之间生物钟衍生的表观遗传年龄加速 (EAA) 的跨国比较显示，韩国狗的 EAA 始终较高，并且在韩国队列中发现了与性别相关的差异。我们进一步鉴定了具有队列特异性年龄相关甲基化模式的 CpG，表明表观遗传衰老的人群水平差异超出了基于时钟的估计，扩展到了位点特异性甲基化动态。总之，这些发现强调了犬类表观遗传衰老的种群水平多样性，并支持狗作为研究与年龄相关的表观遗传变化的生物和环境决定因素的易处理模型。

title: Quantifying resonant drive in resistive perturbed tokamak equilibria
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Resonant drive in tokamaks is routinely quantified using a variety of different metrics that target different aspects of a resonant response to an external perturbation. Two of the most direct metrics, and , are widely used but their relative behavior was previously uncharacterized. This work examines how these metrics representing the shielding current and penetrated field relate in resistive perturbed tokamak equilibria using asymptotically matched solutions with a resistive magnetohydrodynamic inner layer model in GPEC. scales with Lundquist number as until saturation at low , and remains consistent with its ideal definition but is affected by global kink structure. Both metrics are shown to yield closely similar dominant coupling modes within the same resistive model. However, the resistive physics shifts this dominant mode spectrum to lower poloidal mode numbers in a low-rotation ITER equilibrium. This alteration is predicted to be observable in experiment in the form of optimal relative phasings of resonant magnetic perturbation coils.
title_zh: 量化电阻扰动托卡马克平衡中的谐振驱动
abstract_zh: 托卡马克中的谐振驱动通常使用各种不同的指标来量化，这些指标针对外部扰动的谐振响应的不同方面。两个最直接的指标 和 被广泛使用，但它们的相对行为以前未被表征。这项工作使用 GPEC 中的电阻磁流体动力学内层模型的渐近匹配解决方案，研究了代表屏蔽电流和穿透场的这些指标在电阻扰动托卡马克平衡中的关系。与伦德奎斯特数成比例，直到饱和度较低，并且与其理想定义保持一致，但受到全局扭结结构的影响。这两个指标都显示出在同一电阻模型中产生非常相似的主要耦合模式。然而，电阻物理学在低旋转 ITER 平衡中将此主模谱转变为较低的极向模数。预计这种改变可以在实验中以谐振磁扰动线圈的最佳相对定相的形式观察到。

title: From cold start to sustainable operation: a strategy for disruption prediction across the tokamak lifecycle
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Plasma disruption is a significant challenge in tokamak fusion, especially in large-size future devices like ITER, where it causes severe damage. Safeguarding future tokamaks throughout their entire lifecycle demands a disruption prediction strategy that addresses the sequential challenges from initial data scarcity to evolving discharge scenarios. This article combines three different disruption prediction methods with a strategy that maximizes the protection from the beginning of a new device to later high performance operation phase. First, for the early phase with no disruption data from the new device, we design anomaly detection-based disruption predictors that require only non-disruption samples for training, enabling protection from the first discharge. Second, to maintain the model’s performance as discharge scenarios evolve, we explore adaptive disruption prediction strategies that allow the model to continuously self-update and track evolving plasma operation scenarios. Finally, to quantify and manage the cumulative impact of disruptions on device integrity, we introduce the operation management based on disruption budget consumption (DBC) framework. The integration of DBC with adaptive prediction shifts the system’s objective from mere event forecasting to proactive risk-aware operation, by accumulating more data when the DBC of discharge is low and prediction is not accuracy enough, and utilizing the data to train better predictor adaptively for high DBC discharge. Together, these components form a comprehensive methodology, enabling resilient disruption prediction that is essential for the safe and sustainable operation of future tokamaks.
title_zh: 从冷启动到可持续运行：托卡马克整个生命周期的中断预测策略
abstract_zh: 等离子体破坏是托卡马克聚变的一个重大挑战，特别是在 ITER 等未来的大型设备中，它会造成严重的损坏。在未来托卡马克的整个生命周期中保护其安全需要一种中断预测策略，以解决从初始数据稀缺到不断变化的放电场景的一系列挑战。本文将三种不同的中断预测方法与一种策略相结合，最大限度地提高从新设备开始到后来的高性能操作阶段的保护。首先，对于新设备没有中断数据的早期阶段，我们设计了基于异常检测的中断预测器，仅需要非中断样本进行训练，从而能够防止首次放电。其次，为了随着放电场景的发展保持模型的性能，我们探索了自适应中断预测策略，使模型能够不断自我更新并跟踪不断变化的等离子体操作场景。最后，为了量化和管理中断对设备完整性的累积影响，我们引入了基于中断预算消耗（DBC）框架的运营管理。 DBC与自适应预测的集成将系统的目标从单纯的事件预测转变为主动的风险感知操作，通过在流量的DBC较低且预测不够准确时积累更多的数据，并利用这些数据自适应地针对高DBC流量训练更好的预测器。这些组件共同构成了一个全面的方法，可实现弹性中断预测

title: 3D modelling of thermal loads during unmitigated vertical displacement events in ITER and JET
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Predicting three-dimensional thermal loads during tokamak disruptions is essential for ITER yet remains weakly developed. We present a physics-based workflow that couples MHD simulations of vertical displacement events with field line tracing on a realistic 3D first wall model and a transient wall thermal response. The approach is validated against JET discharges with beryllium main chamber armour, reproducing key global dynamics, non-axisymmetric current features, and the occurrence (or absence) of melting, thereby building confidence in the methodology. We then apply the same workflow to ITER-relevant conditions with tungsten (W) armour, consistent with the new 2024 ITER re-baseline, to assess disruption heat loads and their 3D localization. The resulting analysis demonstrates the resilience of the ITER W first wall against these events and provides predictions for the energy deposition and current flow profiles. Beyond these studies, the workflow enables scenario-by-scenario estimates of disruption-induced thermal loading, allowing to assess the disruption-budget consumption for these events in future devices.
title_zh: ITER 和 JET 中未缓解的垂直位移事件期间热负荷的 3D 建模
abstract_zh: 预测托卡马克中断期间的三维热负荷对于 ITER 至关重要，但目前仍处于薄弱环节。我们提出了一种基于物理的工作流程，它将垂直位移事件的 MHD 模拟与真实 3D 第一壁模型上的场线追踪和瞬态壁热响应结合起来。该方法针对铍主室装甲的 JET 放电进行了验证，再现了关键的全局动力学、非轴对称电流特征以及熔化的发生（或不存在），从而建立了对该方法的信心。然后，我们将相同的工作流程应用于具有钨 (W) 铠装的 ITER 相关条件，与新的 2024 年 ITER 重新基线一致，以评估中断热负荷及其 3D 定位。由此产生的分析证明了 ITER W 第一壁对这些事件的恢复能力，并提供了能量沉积和电流分布的预测。除了这些研究之外，该工作流程还可以对中断引起的热负荷进行逐个场景的估计，从而可以评估未来设备中这些事件的中断预算消耗。

title: First observations of ion cyclotron emission in the TCV tokamak
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The first observations of ion cyclotron emission (ICE) in the Tokamak à Configuration Variable (TCV) tokamak are reported. The measured ICE frequency closely follows the deuterium ion cyclotron frequency at the magnetic axis, with temporal variations consistent with equilibrium evolution and associated shifts of the magnetic axis. Core ICE is observed primarily during phases with combined electron cyclotron resonance heating (ECRH) and neutral beam injection (NBI). In most discharges the second harmonic dominates, while in others higher harmonics (third or fourth) are observed. Fine spectral structure, including branch splitting and frequency chirping, is frequently detected, together with additional modes consistent with emission at cyclotron harmonics from regions closer to the plasma edge. Core ICE is observed during both co-current and counter-current NBI. The frequency offset of core ICE relative to the ion cyclotron harmonic at the magnetic axis reverses sign between co- and counter-current injection, and this behavior is confirmed in discharges with reversed plasma current. The observed frequency shifts are qualitatively consistent with Doppler-shifted cyclotron resonance arguments.
title_zh: TCV 托卡马克中离子回旋发射的首次观测
abstract_zh: 报告了托卡马克配置变量 (TCV) 托卡马克中离子回旋发射 (ICE) 的首次观测。测量的 ICE 频率紧密跟随磁轴处的氘离子回旋加速器频率，时间变化与磁轴的平衡演化和相关位移一致。核心 ICE 主要在电子回旋共振加热 (ECRH) 和中性束注入 (NBI) 相结合的阶段观察到。在大多数放电中，二次谐波占主导地位，而在其他放电中，观察到更高次谐波（三次或四次）。经常检测到精细的光谱结构，包括分支分裂和频率啁啾，以及与来自靠近等离子体边缘的区域的回旋加速器谐波发射一致的附加模式。在并流和逆流 NBI 期间均可观察到核心 ICE。核心 ICE 相对于磁轴处离子回旋加速器谐波的频率偏移在同流和逆流注入之间反转符号，并且这种行为在反向等离子体电流的放电中得到了证实。观察到的频移在质量上与多普勒频移回旋共振论点一致。

title: Scaling‑free electro‑membrane crystallization enabled by electric field-assisted organic acid control
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mineral scaling, driven by concentration polarization, is an inevitable challenge in electro-membrane technologies for recovering valuable metals from lithium-ion battery (LIB) leachates. Here, we elucidate the synergistic scaling mechanism and propose an electric field-assisted organic acid control (eF-OAC) principle to prevent membrane mineral scaling while enabling metal recovery. The eF-OAC utilizes an electric field to direct organic acids into the membrane matrix, where ligand-metal coordination dissolves hydroxide-rich scale and mobilizes metal species for selective transport and crystallization. Dynamic experimental analysis reveals that concentration polarization enriches metal hydroxides at the membrane interfaces and pores. Static density functional theory calculations further demonstrate that organic ligands are thermodynamically favored over sulfonate groups for coordinating metal hydroxides, enabling targeted dissolution from the membrane. Leveraging this molecular-level selectivity, the eF-OAC converts scale into recoverable crystalline products. In optimized electro-membrane crystallization, this eF-OAC achieves high recovery rates of 97.6% for Li+, 95.3% for Ni2+, 94.2% for Co2+, and 97.8% for Mn2+. It further yields high-purity Li2SO4 (99.4%), Ni(OH)2 (99.2%), Co(OH)2 (99.0%), and Mn3O4 (99.3%). This study clarifies the mechanisms of mineral scaling and demonstrates a scaling-free approach that transforms fouling liabilities into valuable resource recovery for spent LIBs.
title_zh: 通过电场辅助有机酸控制实现无结垢电膜结晶
abstract_zh: 由浓差极化驱动的矿物结垢是从锂离子电池 (LIB) 渗滤液中回收有价值金属的电膜技术中不可避免的挑战。在这里，我们阐明了协同结垢机制，并提出了电场辅助有机酸控制（eF-OAC）原理，以防止膜矿物结垢，同时实现金属回收。 eF-OAC 利用电场将有机酸引导到膜基质中，其中配体-金属配位溶解富含氢氧化物的水垢并动员金属物质进行选择性传输和结晶。动态实验分析表明，浓差极化使金属氢氧化物富集在膜界面和孔隙处。静态密度泛函理论计算进一步表明，在热力学上，有机配体比磺酸盐基团更有利于配位金属氢氧化物，从而能够从膜中定向溶解。利用这种分子水平的选择性，eF-OAC 将水垢转化为可回收的结晶产品。在优化的电膜结晶中，该 eF-OAC 的 Li+ 回收率高达 97.6%，Ni2+ 回收率高达 95.3%，Co2+ 回收率高达 94.2%，Mn2+ 回收率高达 97.8%。它还可产生高纯度 Li2SO4 (99.4%)、Ni(OH)2 (99.2%)、Co(OH)2 (99.0%) 和 Mn3O4 (99.3%)。这项研究阐明了矿物结垢的机制，并展示了一种无结垢方法，可将污垢责任转化为废锂离子电池的宝贵资源回收。

title: Universal energy-space localization and stable quantum phases against time-dependent perturbations
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Stability against perturbations is a defining property of quantum many-body phases of matter. However, most rigorous stabilities are only established for static perturbations; whether any system can remain stable against generic time-dependent perturbations is largely elusive. Here, we identify a universal phenomenon, where the evolving state driven by time-dependent q-local Hamiltonians can be exponentially localized in an energy window of instantaneous spectrum, and prove its survival under generic time-dependent perturbations. Applying such energy-space localization to classical and quantum LDPC codes whose codewords are separated by extensive energy barriers, we show that the system remains localized near the original codeword for an exponentially long time under generic time-dependent perturbations. For classical optimization problems with clustered solution spaces, the stability becomes an obstacle for quantum Hamiltonian-based algorithms to escape local minima. Our work provides a new lens for analyzing quantum non-equilibrium dynamics and tools for establishing stability and designing quantum algorithms.
title_zh: 通用能量空间局域化和针对时间相关扰动的稳定量子相
abstract_zh: 抗扰动稳定性是物质量子多体相的一个定义属性。然而，最严格的稳定性仅针对静态扰动建立；是否有任何系统能够针对一般的时间相关扰动保持稳定在很大程度上是难以捉摸的。在这里，我们发现了一种普遍现象，其中由时间相关的 q-局部哈密顿量驱动的演化状态可以指数地局部化在瞬时谱的能量窗口中，并证明了它在一般的时间相关扰动下的生存性。将这种能量空间局域化应用于其码字被广泛的能量势垒分隔的经典和量子 LDPC 码，我们表明系统在一般的时间相关扰动下在指数级的长时间内保持在原始码字附近的局域化。对于具有聚类解空间的经典优化问题，稳定性成为基于量子哈密顿量的算法逃避局部极小值的障碍。我们的工作为分析量子非平衡动力学提供了新的视角，为建立稳定性和设计量子算法提供了工具。

source: Nature Reviews Materials
abstract: Vitreous substitutes remain a fundamental unmet need in regenerative medicine: current tamponade agents, gases and silicone oil, address immediate surgical challenges but neglect the long-term functional role of the tissue they replace. A paradigm shift towards durable, biomimetic hydrogel substitutes is not a distant ambition, but a clinical necessity.

title: Ion–backbone accessibility enables unity doping efficiency in organic electrochemical transistors
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Organic electrochemical transistors are commonly benchmarked using volumetric capacitance (C*); however, this metric does not distinguish between Faradaic and non-Faradaic contributions and therefore does not directly quantify the density of electronically active charge carriers that governs device-relevant doping capacity. Here we introduce effective volumetric capacitance (Ceff* = C* · η), where η denotes doping efficiency, as a metric for electronically effective volumetric doping. Using this metric, we show ionophilic side chains promote high ionic uptake but also sequester ions away from the conjugated backbone, lowering doping efficiency. By contrast, side-chain removal increases ion access to electrochemically addressable backbone sites, enabling doping efficiencies approaching unity. The resulting materials exhibited both enhanced volumetric charge density and improved charge transport, yielding transistors with transconductance among the highest reported. These results establish a practical design rule for organic mixed conductors by showing that electronically effective doping, rather than ionic uptake alone, governs transistor operation.
title_zh: 离子主链可及性可实现有机电化学晶体管的统一掺杂效率
abstract_zh: 有机电化学晶体管通常使用体积电容 (C*) 进行基准测试；然而，该指标不区分法拉第贡献和非法拉第贡献，因此不能直接量化控制器件相关掺杂能力的电子活性电荷载流子的密度。在这里，我们引入有效体积电容 (Ceff* = C* · η)，其中 η 表示掺杂效率，作为电子有效体积掺杂的度量。使用这个指标，我们发现亲离子侧链促进高离子吸收，但也会将离子螯合远离共轭主链，从而降低掺杂效率。相比之下，侧链去除增加了离子对电化学可寻址主链位点的访问，使掺杂效率接近统一。所得材料表现出增强的体积电荷密度和改善的电荷传输，产生跨导率最高的晶体管。这些结果表明，电子有效掺杂（而不是单独的离子吸收）控制着晶体管的运行，从而建立了有机混合导体的实用设计规则。

title: Two-coordinate Cu(I) sites in ZIF-derived porous carbon enable high CO working capacity for CO/N₂ separation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Efficient separation of carbon monoxide (CO) from nitrogen (N₂) is vital for recycling steel industry by-product gases and advancing carbon-neutral chemical production. However, current Cu(I)-based π-complexation adsorbents suffer from excessive binding strength and low working capacity. Here we report thermally-dispersed open metal sites (OMS) with two-coordinated Cu(I) units, ( ≡ C–O)CuCl, anchored onto zeolite imidazolate frameworks (ZIFs) derived oxygen-containing porous carbons (ZPC), where the Cu···CO interaction strength is precisely moderated. The optimized adsorbent, 15Cu(I)/ZPC-1, with 15 mmol g⁻¹ Cu(I) dispersed in 10–30 Å pores, delivers a high CO working capacity of 3.21 mmol g⁻¹ (0.1–1 bar, 298 K), the highest among reported recyclable Cu(I)-based adsorbents. The analyses reveal that a low-symmetric trigonal ( ≡ C–O)CuCl···CO coordination geometry weakens π-backbonding, enhances working capacity. Process simulations predict that 15Cu(I)/ZPC-1 enables high productivity and low energy consumption. This work establishes OMS regulation in porous carbon as an effective strategy for efficient CO/N₂ separation.
title_zh: ZIF 衍生多孔碳中的两配位 Cu(I) 位点可实现 CO/N2 分离的高 CO 工作能力
abstract_zh: 有效分离一氧化碳 (CO) 和氮气 (N2) 对于回收钢铁工业副产气体和推进碳中性化学品生产至关重要。然而，目前的Cu(I)基π络合吸附剂存在结合强度过高和工作容量低的问题。在这里，我们报道了热分散的开放金属位点（OMS），具有两个配位的Cu（I）单元（= C–O）CuCl，锚定在沸石咪唑酯框架（ZIF）衍生的含氧多孔碳（ZPC）上，其中Cu·CO相互作用强度被精确调节。优化的吸附剂 15Cu(I)/ZPC-1 将 15 mmol g⁻1 Cu(I) 分散在 10–30 Å 孔中，可提供 3.21 mmol g⁻1 (0.1–1 bar, 298 K) 的高 CO 工作容量，这是已报道的可回收 Cu(I) 基吸附剂中最高的。分析表明，低对称三角 ( ≡ C–O)CuCl·CO 配位几何结构削弱了 π 背键合，增强了工作能力。工艺模拟预测 15Cu(I)/ZPC-1 可实现高生产率和低能耗。这项工作将多孔碳中的 OMS 调节作为高效 CO/N2 分离的有效策略。

title: Self-heating-induced blocking in nanopores enables neuromorphic ionic computing
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Inspired by the brain’s efficient ionic processing, fluidic memristors using ions as charge carriers have emerged as a promising platform for future neuromorphic systems. To better replicate the brain’s dynamic functions, it’s essential to explore additional memristive materials and switching mechanisms. In this work, we present a self-heating-induced blocking memristor (SIBM), in which the memory effect arises from thermally triggered reversible precipitation. When subjected to periodic voltage stimulation, SIBM shows threshold-type unipolar resistive switching and features a clear negative differential resistance (NDR). We demonstrate various neuromorphic functions and experimentally validate a fluidic memristor array capable of repeated memory operations. These results provide insights for the design of next-generation neuromorphic fluidic devices.
title_zh: 自热引起的纳米孔阻塞使神经形态离子计算成为可能
abstract_zh: 受大脑高效离子处理的启发，使用离子作为电荷载体的流体忆阻器已成为未来神经形态系统的一个有前景的平台。为了更好地复制大脑的动态功能，有必要探索额外的忆阻材料和切换机制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自热诱导阻塞忆阻器（SIBM），其中记忆效应是由热触发的可逆沉淀产生的。当受到周期性电压刺激时，SIBM 表现出阈值型单极电阻开关，并具有明显的负微分电阻（NDR）。我们演示了各种神经形态功能，并通过实验验证了能够重复存储操作的流体忆阻器阵列。这些结果为下一代神经形态流体设备的设计提供了见解。

title: Synergistic interfacial-mechanical binder design for high-areal-capacity and long-lifespan Si-based negative electrodes in practical pouch cells
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The pursuit of high-energy-density lithium-ion batteries demands high-silicon silicon-graphite composite negative electrodes, yet their commercialization remains hindered by interfacial incompatibility and mechanical instability. While an ideal binder must simultaneously achieve robust adhesion to both silicon and graphite, accommodate substantial silicon volume changes, and maintain high binder bulk stability, existing systems fail to harmonize these requirements. Here, we present a molecularly engineered binder that resolves this trilemma through interfacial-mechanical synergy. By integrating a hydrophobic-soft copolymer and hydrophilic-hard copolymer, our design enables amphiphilic interfacial adhesion and provides mechanical properties specifically tailored to accommodate silicon volume changes. A supramolecular crosslinker further reinforces interchain cohesion, ensuring binder bulk stability during long cycling life. This design enables a 2 Ah-level pouch cell to sustain 500 cycles at 0.3 C with 99.83% average Coulombic efficiency. At a commercial binder loading of 5 wt%, 1 Ah cells deliver over 2000 cycles at 1 C with an average Coulombic efficiency of 99.93%. Our work has the potential to not only resolve the long-standing trade-off between interfacial and mechanical stability in silicon-based negative electrodes but also provide a practical framework for designing next-generation binders targeting energy-dense, durable batteries.
title_zh: 协同界面机械粘合剂设计，用于实际软包电池中的高面积容量和长寿命硅基负极
abstract_zh: 高能量密度锂离子电池需要高硅硅石墨复合负极，但其商业化仍然受到界面不相容性和机械不稳定性的阻碍。虽然理想的粘合剂必须同时实现对硅和石墨的牢固粘合，适应硅体积的显着变化，并保持粘合剂的高体积稳定性，但现有系统无法协调这些要求。在这里，我们提出了一种分子工程粘合剂，通过界面机械协同作用解决了这个难题。通过集成疏水性软共聚物和亲水性硬共聚物，我们的设计实现了两亲界面粘附，并提供专门定制的机械性能以适应硅体积的变化。超分子交联剂进一步增强链间内聚力，确保长循环寿命期间粘合剂的整体稳定性。该设计使 2 Ah 级软包电池能够在 0.3 C 下维持 500 个循环，平均库仑效率为 99.83%。在商业粘合剂负载量为 5 wt% 时，1 Ah 电池在 1 C 下可进行 2000 多次循环，平均库仑效率为 99.93%。我们的工作不仅有可能解决硅基负极中界面稳定性和机械稳定性之间长期存在的权衡问题，而且还为设计针对能量密集、耐用电池的下一代粘合剂提供了实用的框架。

title: Potential-mediated enol-keto equilibrium in phenol electro-hydrogenation on platinum
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The selective formation of cyclohexanone under cathodic potentials during electrocatalytic hydrogenation (ECH) of phenol on transition metal catalysts attracts extensive interest, yet the mechanistic understanding of this potential-dependent product distribution remains limited. By combining ab initio molecular dynamics with explicit solvation and electrode potential control, we demonstrate that cathodic polarization shifts the enol-keto equilibrium toward the keto form through surface-mediated charge transfer, thereby promoting aromatic ring hydrogenation to cyclohexanone. Moreover, the negatively charged surface electrostatically stabilizes cyclohexanone in a metastable “floating” state, which kinetically suppresses its further hydrogenation. This work addresses the question of cyclohexanone selectivity in phenol ECH by identifying potential-controlled tautomerization as the key step affecting selectivity, offering a clear mechanistic basis for the experimentally observed product distribution.
title_zh: 铂上苯酚电氢化中电位介导的烯醇-酮平衡
abstract_zh: 在过渡金属催化剂上苯酚电催化氢化（ECH）过程中，在阴极电位下选择性形成环己酮引起了广泛的兴趣，但对这种电位依赖性产物分布的机理理解仍然有限。通过将从头算分子动力学与显式溶剂化和电极电位控制相结合，我们证明阴极极化通过表面介导的电荷转移将烯醇-酮平衡转向酮形式，从而促进芳环氢化为环己酮。此外，带负电的表面使环己酮静电稳定在亚稳态“浮动”状态，这在动力学上抑制了其进一步氢化。这项工作通过确定电位控制互变异构作为影响选择性的关键步骤，解决了苯酚 ECH 中环己酮选择性的问题，为实验观察到的产物分布提供了明确的机制基础。

title: Bacterial turbulence drives interfacial waves and shape dynamics in phase-separated droplets
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Liquid-liquid phase separation is important across biology, physics, and materials science. Although usually studied at equilibrium, active components-such as motor proteins, enzymes, and synthetic microswimmers-are increasingly recognized as key players in reshaping phase separation dynamics. Yet how internally generated active stresses are transmitted to capillary interfaces to reshape three-dimensional droplet dynamics remains poorly understood. Here, we encapsulate dense suspensions of motile bacteria inside phase-separated aqueous droplets, creating a closed droplet whose interface is driven from within by bacterial turbulence. By varying bacterial density, we control the active stress at the droplet interface. At low bacterial density, we observe scale-dependent interfacial fluctuations that propagate as waves. In this low Reynolds number regime, these waves arise from an effective inertial response, generated when active bacterial stresses balance passive viscous damping of the interface. At higher bacterial density, droplets deform strongly-exceeding the Plateau-Rayleigh instability threshold-and even form bacteria-scale filaments-a morphology without a passive counterpart. Enhanced droplet motility and accelerated coarsening accompany these shape changes. Our work shows how active stresses can reshape the morphology and dynamics of multiphase systems, offering new insight into the physics of internally driven phase-separated fluids.
title_zh: 细菌湍流驱动相分离液滴中的界面波和形状动力学
abstract_zh: 液-液相分离在生物学、物理学和材料科学中都很重要。尽管通常在平衡状态下进行研究，但活性成分（例如运动蛋白、酶和合成微型游泳器）越来越被认为是重塑相分离动力学的关键参与者。然而，内部产生的主动应力如何传递到毛细管界面以重塑三维液滴动力学仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们将运动细菌的密集悬浮液封装在相分离的水滴内，形成一个封闭的液滴，其界面由细菌湍流从内部驱动。通过改变细菌密度，我们控制液滴界面处的主动应力。在低细菌密度下，我们观察到以波的形式传播的与尺度相关的界面波动。在这种低雷诺数状态下，这些波由有效的惯性响应产生，当主动细菌应力平衡界面的被动粘性阻尼时产生。在较高的细菌密度下，液滴会强烈变形，超过高原瑞利不稳定性阈值，甚至形成细菌规模的细丝，这是一种没有被动对应物的形态。这些形状变化伴随着液滴运动性的增强和粗化的加速。我们的工作展示了主动应力如何重塑多相系统的形态和动力学，为内部驱动的相分离流体的物理学提供了新的见解。
