title: NicheProt: Cell-type-resolved proteomics of tissue compartments
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Spatial proteomics uncovers the molecular basis of cellular function in intact tissues. Laser capture microdissection coupled with mass spectrometry enables comprehensive proteomic profiling of selected tissue regions but typically does not support cell-type-specific proteomic analysis. We present NicheProt, a 3D optical microscopy-guided and photobleaching-mediated cell barcoding approach for isolating intact, specific cell types from defined microanatomical tissue compartments or niches. Using sequential bottom-up proteomic analysis, we defined two distinct phenotypes of CD11c
                    +
                    dendritic cells based on their spatial locations in the inflamed mouse spleen. These two compartment-specific dendritic cell populations were characterized by proteomic signatures differing in the levels of 54 proteins. This 3D tissue microscopy-guided method offers cell-type and microregion-resolved proteomic analysis, facilitating the proteomic discovery of previously unrecognized cell subtypes and their functional roles in distinct tissue compartments.
title_zh: NicheProt：组织区室的细胞类型解析蛋白质组学
abstract_zh:
空间蛋白质组学揭示了完整组织中细胞功能的分子基础。激光捕获显微切割与质谱联用可以对选定的组织区域进行全面的蛋白质组分析，但通常不支持细胞类型特异性的蛋白质组分析。我们推出了 NicheProt，一种 3D 光学显微镜引导和光漂白介导的细胞条形码方法，用于从定义的微解剖组织区室或壁龛中分离完整的特定细胞类型。使用顺序自下而上的蛋白质组分析，我们定义了 CD11c 的两种不同表型
                    +
                    树突状细胞基于其在发炎小鼠脾脏中的空间位置。这两个区室特异性树突细胞群的蛋白质组学特征在 54 种蛋白质水平上有所不同。这种 3D 组织显微镜引导方法提供细胞类型和微区域解析的蛋白质组分析，有助于蛋白质组发现以前未识别的细胞亚型及其在不同组织区室中的功能作用。

title: Dual role of the receptor kinase FERONIA in regulating tissue mechanics and growth
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
During morphogenesis, growing organisms adapt to internal and external mechanical stress. In plants, the receptor kinase FERONIA is involved in a broad range of responses to perturbations of the cell wall, but it is unclear which cues are sensed and how this sensing controls growth. Here, we addressed these questions in
                    Marchantia
                    vegetative propagules. We combined culture in microfluidic chips to quantify growth and mechanical properties of propagules, perturbations with osmotic treatments, characterization of cell wall polysaccharides, and a mathematical model of cell wall expansion that incorporates sensing. We found that FERONIA independently regulates tissue properties that govern elastic deformation and growth rates. We propose that the regulation of growth by the FERONIA pathway relies on both a positive feedback from elastic deformation of the wall and a negative feedback from wall expansion. Together, we expect our quantitative framework to be broadly relevant to the investigation of how mechanical cues guide development.
title_zh: 受体激酶 FERONIA 在调节组织力学和生长中的双重作用
abstract_zh:
在形态发生过程中，生长的生物体适应内部和外部的机械应力。在植物中，受体激酶 FERONIA 参与对细胞壁扰动的广泛反应，但尚不清楚感知到哪些信号以及这种感知如何控制生长。在这里，我们解决了这些问题
                    地钱属
                    无性繁殖体。我们结合微流控芯片中的培养来量化繁殖体的生长和机械特性、渗透处理的扰动、细胞壁多糖的表征以及结合传感的细胞壁扩张的数学模型。我们发现 FERONIA 独立调节控制弹性变形和生长速率的组织特性。我们认为 FERONIA 途径对生长的调节依赖于壁弹性变形的正反馈和壁膨胀的负反馈。我们共同期望我们的定量框架与机械线索如何指导发展的调查广泛相关。

title: Repeat offenders: Satellite DNA sequence variation drives heterochromatin instability
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Fertilization experiments using different mouse species reveal that variation in rapidly evolving repetitive sequences affects how chromosomes are packaged and distributed during cell division.
title_zh: 屡犯者：卫星 DNA 序列变异导致异染色质不稳定
abstract_zh: 使用不同小鼠物种的受精实验表明，快速进化的重复序列的变化会影响细胞分裂过程中染色体的包装和分布方式。

title: Heterochronic limb patterning in marsupials reveals flexibility in the processes underlying lateral plate mesoderm morphogenesis
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
title_zh: 有袋动物的异时性肢体模式揭示了侧板中胚层形态发生过程的灵活性
abstract_zh:
有袋动物胚胎在强烈的功能限制下发育：新生儿在短暂妊娠后出生，但必须立即利用早熟的前肢爬到乳头处。为了满足这一需求，有袋动物进化出了肢体形态发生的极度加速，但这种转变背后的细胞和分子机制仍未得到解决。使用两种远亲有袋动物，肥尾袋鼩（
                    粗尾绿草
                    ）和灰色短尾负鼠（
                    家蝇
                    ），我们发现这种加速向上游延伸到侧板中胚层（LPM）形成的最早阶段。前肢区域与其他轴向结构相对隔离，其特征是在神经管和体节形成之前肢体基因的加速激活。前肢生长在明显的 LPM 细分和上皮-间质转化之前开始，肢体间质由未分化的 LPM 产生。这些发现揭示了轴向形态发生和肢体起始之间的时间关系中意想不到的灵活性，突出了控制脊椎动物肢体模式的过程中的进化可塑性。

title: Spaceflight multi-omics reveals vulnerabilities of human germ cell development
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Understanding the impact of spaceflight on human reproduction is critical for interplanetary exploration, yet technical barriers have limited direct studies of germ cell biology in orbit. Here, we utilized an automated bioreactor that supported long-term differentiation of human embryonic stem cells into human induced primordial germ cells (hiPGCs), human induced ovarian follicles (hiOFs), and human induced spermatogonial stem cells (hiSSCs) aboard spacecraft. Integrated real-time imaging, programmable medium perfusion, and in situ preservation enabled time-resolved multi-omics analysis. During missions on China’s Tianzhou-1 and Tianzhou-6 spacecraft, spaceflight reduced hiPGC specification efficiency by approximately 50% and suppressed hiSSC proliferation by 26%. Transcriptome-translatome coordination revealed cell-type-specific dysregulation of extracellular matrix organization, microtubule dynamics, and lipid metabolism. Whole-exome sequencing and DNA methylome analysis demonstrated preserved genomic integrity despite these functional perturbations. These findings provide direct evidence that spaceflight perturbs human germ cell development and establish a scalable framework for monitoring cellular adaptation during deep-space missions.
title_zh: 航天多组学揭示人类生殖细胞发育的脆弱性
abstract_zh: 了解航天对人类生殖的影响对于星际探索至关重要，但技术障碍限制了对轨道生殖细胞生物学的直接研究。在这里，我们利用自动化生物反应器支持航天器上的人类胚胎干细胞长期分化为人类诱导原始生殖细胞（hiPGC）、人类诱导卵巢卵泡（hiOF）和人类诱导精原干细胞（hiSSC）。集成的实时成像、可编程介质灌注和原位保存可实现时间分辨多组学分析。在中国天舟一号和天舟六号航天器执行任务期间，航天使 hiPGC 规范效率降低了约 50%，并将 hiSSC 扩散抑制了 26%。转录组-翻译组协调揭示了细胞外基质组织、微管动力学和脂质代谢的细胞类型特异性失调。全外显子组测序和 DNA 甲基化组分析表明，尽管存在这些功能扰动，但基因组完整性得以保留。这些发现提供了直接证据，表明太空飞行会扰乱人类生殖细胞的发育，并建立了一个可扩展的框架来监测深空任务期间的细胞适应。

title: Rethinking future flood hazard: Hourly data challenge daily flood projections in Alpine catchments
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: This study challenges a common misconception in current flood hazard research that floods will decrease under a warming climate in many rivers due to changes in land-surface processes, particularly decreases in snowmelt. This view persists because most studies on flood changes rely on daily resolution data, which masks flood changes due to subdaily rainfall intensification. We show that daily streamflow projections systematically underestimate flood changes compared with hourly projections in Alpine catchments. Our results highlight that the sign of change can even switch from negative to positive in strongly snow-influenced catchments when taking an hourly perspective because intensified subdaily precipitation can outweigh snowmelt decline. These results highlight that using daily instead of hourly projections may lead to wrong conclusions on both the magnitude and direction of flood changes. An hourly resolution perspective is, therefore, crucial to reliably guide adaptation strategies to extreme Alpine floods in a warming world.
title_zh: 重新思考未来的洪水灾害：每小时数据挑战阿尔卑斯流域的每日洪水预测
abstract_zh: 这项研究挑战了当前洪水灾害研究中的一个常见误解，即在气候变暖的情况下，由于地表过程的变化，特别是融雪的减少，许多河流的洪水将会减少。这种观点仍然存在，因为大多数关于洪水变化的研究都依赖于每日分辨率数据，这掩盖了由于次日降雨强度而导致的洪水变化。我们表明，与高山流域的每小时预测相比，每日径流预测系统地低估了洪水变化。我们的结果强调，从每小时的角度来看，在受到强烈降雪影响的流域中，变化的迹象甚至可以从负转为正，因为亚日降水的加剧可以超过融雪的减少。这些结果表明，使用每日预测而不是每小时预测可能会导致对洪水变化的幅度和方向得出错误的结论。因此，每小时的解决方案对于可靠地指导在变暖的世界中应对极端高山洪水的适应策略至关重要。

title: Decoupling Activation and Preservation: Architectural Design Principles of Organic Frameworks for Selective Photocatalytic Methane Oxidation
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Photocatalytic methane (CH
                    4
                    ) conversion faces a dilemma, where C─H bond activation requires a substantial oxidative driving force, whereas partially oxidized C
                    1
                    products are intrinsically more susceptible to further oxidation. As a result, strengthening photocatalytic throughput while avoiding overoxidation remains challenging in the field of highly valuable CH
                    4
                    conversion. Organic semiconductor platforms, including polymeric carbon nitrides (PCN), metal–organic frameworks (MOFs), and covalent organic frameworks (COFs), exhibit structural features that fundamentally differ from those of conventional inorganic counterparts. Their electronic states originate from molecular building units, and their frameworks allow controlled positioning of redox centers, modulation of charge‐transfer pathways, and definition of pore environments, enabling systematic regulation of band energetics, carrier distribution, oxygen activation modes, and proton management of photocatalysts. This review examines how electronic structure engineering, interfacial charge routing, reactive species control, and microenvironment design influence pathway selection in CH
                    4
                    photooxidation. Particular attention is given to mechanisms that favor associative multi‐electron oxygen reduction or energy‐transfer processes while suppressing hydroxyl radical (
                    •
                    OH)‐dominated chemistry. Although CH
                    4
                    ‐specific systems remain limited, mechanistic insights from related photocatalytic reactions provide transferable design principles. Establishing quantitative relationships between architectural parameters and reactive‐species identity is essential for advancing selective solar‐driven C
                    1
                    oxidation.
title_zh: 解耦活化与保存：选择性光催化甲烷氧化有机框架的结构设计原理
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    光催化甲烷（CH
                    4
                    ）转化面临着两难的困境，C─H键的活化需要大量的氧化驱动力，而部分氧化的C
                    1
                    产品本质上更容易进一步氧化。因此，在高价值 CH 领域，提高光催化通量同时避免过度氧化仍然具有挑战性
                    4
                    转换。有机半导体平台，包括聚合碳氮化物（PCN）、金属有机骨架（MOF）和共价有机骨架（COF），表现出与传统无机对应物根本不同的结构特征。它们的电子态源自分子构建单元，其框架允许氧化还原中心的受控定位、电荷转移路径的调节和孔隙环境的定义，从而能够系统地调节能带能量、载流子分布、氧活化模式和光催化剂的质子管理。本综述探讨了电子结构工程、界面电荷路径、活性物质控制和微环境设计如何影响 CH 中的通路选择
                    4
                    光氧化。特别关注有利于缔合多电子氧还原或能量转移过程同时抑制羟基自由基的机制（
                    •
                    OH)-多米

title: Noninvasive measurement of glucose and lactate in thermoregulatory sweat in neonates and adults
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Premature neonates are particularly vulnerable and therefore require rigorous monitoring of analytes such as glucose and lactate. Traditionally, this is achieved through invasive, intermittent blood sampling, which is painful and may cause potential complications. To address this issue, we have developed a noninvasive perfusable skin sampling patch designed to collect analytes from low-volume thermoregulatory sweat without the need for external sweat induction. This can be combined with microfluidic biosensor analysis technologies to detect skin glucose and lactate levels. We were able to demonstrate the potential of this technology for noninvasive measurement of glucose and lactate in premature neonates. Our results showed that skin glucose levels correlated well with time-matched blood glucose measurements. Lactate skin measurements did not correlate with blood measurements, indicating a more complex relationship. In addition, we successfully measured skin glucose levels in healthy adults, which correlated with blood glucose levels for each individual. In contrast with the neonate measurements, the relationship between blood and skin glucose varies between individual adults. We successfully carried out proof-of-concept experiments to detect glucose in real-time in both neonates and in healthy adults by connecting the sampling patch to a continuous analysis system. These results provide the groundwork for subsequent large-scale clinical trials intended to validate the system reliability and clinical applicability within health care contexts, particularly neonatal intensive care units.
title_zh: 无创测量新生儿和成人体温调节汗液中的葡萄糖和乳酸
abstract_zh: 早产儿特别容易受到伤害，因此需要对葡萄糖和乳酸等分析物进行严格监测。传统上，这是通过侵入性、间歇性血液采样来实现的，这是痛苦的并且可能导致潜在的并发症。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种无创可灌注皮肤采样贴片，旨在从少量体温调节汗液中收集分析物，而无需外部汗液诱导。这可以与微流体生物传感器分析技术相结合来检测皮肤葡萄糖和乳酸水平。我们能够证明该技术在早产新生儿葡萄糖和乳酸无创测量方面的潜力。我们的结果表明，皮肤葡萄糖水平与时间匹配的血糖测量值密切相关。皮肤乳酸测量值与血液测量值不相关，表明存在更复杂的关系。此外，我们成功测量了健康成年人的皮肤葡萄糖水平，这与每个人的血糖水平相关。与新生儿的测量结果相反，成人个体之间的血液和皮肤葡萄糖之间的关系有所不同。我们成功地进行了概念验证实验，通过将采样贴片连接到连续分析系统来实时检测新生儿和健康成人的葡萄糖。这些结果为后续大规模临床试验奠定了基础，旨在验证系统在医疗保健环境中的可靠性和临床适用性，特别是新生儿重症监护室。

title: Photochemical coproduction of hydrogen and chemicals from a wireless monolithic leaf
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Artificial leaves integrating light absorption and catalysis provide a solution to the intermittency of renewable electricity by directly converting sunlight into fuels. Here, we design a wireless monolithic leaf that integrates a tunnel oxide passivating contact Si bottom absorber with a defect-controlled bismuth vanadate (BiVO4) top absorber for photochemical coproduction of hydrogen and chemicals. The combination of nanoporous BiVO4 and micropyramidal silicon ensures a high photovoltage by extending light harvesting through complementary band structures and geometric nanotexturing. A surface-reduced amorphous BiVO4 shell rich in oxygen vacancies improves hole transport and catalytic activity for selective glycerol oxidation, enabling bias-free operation. As a standalone photochemical diode that builds on bias-free photoelectrocatalysis, the wireless monolithic leaf continuously coproduces hydrogen and C3 chemicals solely under sunlight, achieving rates of 395.9 and 91.68 millimoles per square meter per hour. This work highlights absorber and interface engineering for efficient, durable artificial leaves toward sustainable hydrogen and value-added chemical production.
title_zh: 从无线单片叶子光化学联产氢气和化学品
abstract_zh: 集光吸收和催化于一体的人造树叶通过直接将阳光转化为燃料，为可再生电力的间歇性提供了解决方案。在这里，我们设计了一种无线单片叶片，它将隧道氧化物钝化接触硅底部吸收器与缺陷控制钒酸铋 (BiVO4) 顶部吸收器集成在一起，用于氢和化学品的光化学联产。纳米多孔 BiVO4 和微锥体硅的组合通过互补能带结构和几何纳米纹理扩展光捕获，确保高光电压。富含氧空位的表面还原无定形 BiVO4 壳可改善选择性甘油氧化的空穴传输和催化活性，从而实现无偏压操作。作为一种基于无偏压光电催化的独立光化学二极管，无线单片叶子仅在阳光下即可连续共同产生氢气和 C3 化学物质，达到每小时每平方米 395.9 毫摩尔和 91.68 毫摩尔的速率。这项工作重点介绍了吸收剂和界面工程，以实现高效、耐用的人造树叶，以实现可持续的氢气和增值化学品生产。

title: Correction for Cao et al., Cenozoic geoclimatic changes drove the evolutionary dynamics of floristic endemism on the Qinghai–Tibet Plateau
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
title_zh: 对曹等人的修正，新生代地理气候变化驱动了青藏高原植物区系特有的进化动态

title: Gastropod shells record larval migration from deep-sea hydrothermal vents to the euphotic zone
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Larval migration plays an essential role in determining the distribution and evolution of invertebrate animals endemic to hydrothermal vents—disjunct and ephemeral habitats in the deep sea. However, technical obstacles have prevented field observation or tracking of their free-swimming, microscopic larvae. Our geochemical analyses of pre- and postmetamorphic parts of shells revealed that the plankton-feeding (planktotrophic) larvae of vent-endemic limpets migrate to the upper layers, in or near the euphotic zone (0 to 200 m). Oxygen isotopes indicated that the larvae experienced warm temperatures approximating conditions in the euphotic zone above the vent sites, whereas barium and manganese concentrations as proxies for hot vent fluids were much higher in postmetamorphic than in premetamorphic shells, dismissing retention under hydrothermal influence. Our results provide evidence for the influence of surface currents and temperature on the distributions of chemosynthetically nourished vent communities in the deep sea. These findings also contribute to modeling deep-sea ecosystem connectivity and planning protected areas.
title_zh: 腹足动物壳记录了幼虫从深海热液喷口到真光带的迁移
abstract_zh: 幼虫的迁徙对于决定热液喷口（深海中分离且短暂的栖息地）特有的无脊椎动物的分布和进化起着至关重要的作用。然而，技术障碍阻碍了对其自由游动的微小幼虫的现场观察或跟踪。我们对贝壳变质前和变质后部分的地球化学分析表明，以浮游生物为食（浮游营养型）的通风口特有帽贝幼虫迁移到上层，位于或靠近真光带（0 至 200 m）。氧同位素表明，幼虫经历了接近喷口位点上方透光带条件的温暖温度，而作为热喷口流体代理的钡和锰浓度在变质后壳中比在变质前壳中高得多，排除了在热液影响下的滞留。我们的结果为表面洋流和温度对深海化学合成滋养的喷口群落分布的影响提供了证据。这些发现还有助于模拟深海生态系统的连通性和规划保护区。

title: Satellite DNA sequence dictates pericentromere heterochromatin formation and function
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Pericentromeres are heterochromatic regions adjacent to centromeres that ensure accurate chromosome segregation. Despite their conserved function, they are composed of rapidly evolving A/T-rich satellite DNA. To test the functional consequences of this rapid sequence evolution, we establish hybrid mouse embryos as a model system to compare divergent satellite arrays from distinct species in a common cytoplasm. We show that variation in satellite sequence impacts heterochromatin formation, recruitment of the Chromosome Passenger Complex (CPC), and interactions with the mitotic spindle. Differences in satellite DNA sequence alter pericentromere packaging by Polycomb Repressive Complex 1 (PRC1), as satellite arrays that recruit PRC1 are enriched for specific A/T sequences that the PRC1 AT-hook preferentially binds. Furthermore, PRC1 heterochromatin modifies pericentromere function by inhibiting recruitment of the CPC, increasing microtubule forces on kinetochores during mitosis. Our results provide a direct link between satellite DNA composition and mitotic chromosome behavior and highlight early embryogenesis as a critical point in development that is sensitive to satellite DNA evolution.
title_zh: 卫星 DNA 序列决定着丝粒周围异染色质的形成和功能
abstract_zh: 着丝粒周围是与着丝粒相邻的异染色质区域，可确保准确的染色体分离。尽管它们的功能保守，但它们由快速进化的富含 A/T 的卫星 DNA 组成。为了测试这种快速序列进化的功能后果，我们建立了杂交小鼠胚胎作为模型系统，以比较来自共同细胞质中不同物种的不同卫星阵列。我们发现卫星序列的变化会影响异染色质的形成、染色体乘客复合物（CPC）的招募以及与有丝分裂纺锤体的相互作用。卫星 DNA 序列的差异改变了多梳抑制复合物 1 (PRC1) 的着丝粒周围包装，因为招募 PRC1 的卫星阵列富集了 PRC1 AT 钩优先结合的特定 A/T 序列。此外，PRC1 异染色质通过抑制 CPC 的募集来改变着丝粒周围的功能，增加有丝分裂期间微管对动粒的作用力。我们的研究结果提供了卫星 DNA 组成与有丝分裂染色体行为之间的直接联系，并强调早期胚胎发生是对卫星 DNA 进化敏感的发育关键点。

title: Splicing of a core circadian clock gene regulates seasonal adaptations by a winter gating mechanism
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Organisms adjust their physiology and behavior in response to seasonal changes. The current working model indicates that the circadian clock is involved in this process, but the molecular mechanisms mediating the integration of seasonal cues are still unclear. Notably, the circadian neuropeptide pigment-dispersing factor (PDF), an output of the circadian clock, has been shown to alter its expression and activity in response to seasonal changes to facilitate seasonal adaptations in insects. Here, we show that the alternative splicing of a circadian clock gene,
                    timeless
                    (
                    tim
                    ), regulates the seasonal responses through PDF in
                    Drosophila melanogaster
                    . We found that
                    tim-sc
                    , the predominant isoform in winter, is regulated by photoperiod, while the canonical
                    tim-l
                    isoform is not. In addition, we demonstrated that
                    tim-sc
                    is used to maintain physiology and behavior in a “winter lock” state by modulating PDF. Our results support a role of isoform-specific characteristics in providing circadian clock components with the ability to modulate seasonal physiology.
title_zh: 核心生物钟基因的剪接通过冬季门控机制调节季节适应
abstract_zh:
生物体根据季节变化调整其生理和行为。目前的工作模型表明生物钟参与了这一过程，但介导季节线索整合的分子机制仍不清楚。值得注意的是，昼夜节律神经肽色素分散因子（PDF）是生物钟的输出，已被证明可以根据季节变化改变其表达和活性，以促进昆虫的季节适应。在这里，我们展示了生物钟基因的选择性剪接，
                    永恒的
                    （
                    蒂姆
                    ），通过 PDF 调节季节性响应
                    黑腹果蝇
                    。我们发现
                    蒂姆-SC
                    ，冬季主要的亚型，受光周期调节，而典型的亚型
                    蒂姆-L
                    异构体不是。此外，我们还证明了
                    蒂姆-SC
                    用于通过调节PDF来维持生理和行为处于“冬锁”状态。我们的结果支持异构体特异性特征在提供具有调节季节性生理学能力的生物钟成分方面的作用。

title: Surface processes darkening the southwestern ice sheet of Kalaallit Nunaat (Greenland)
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Each melt season, a “Dark Zone” develops on the southwestern margin of the ice sheet of Kalaallit Nunaat, reducing surface albedo and enhancing surface melt rates. While several processes are known to locally influence albedo, their respective contributions to the regional-scale darkening remain unknown. Here, we combine laboratory measurements, in situ observations, and physical and probabilistic modeling to quantify the albedo-reducing mechanisms across the Dark Zone. Our results indicate that the darkening is primarily driven by a combination of cryoconite material accumulation and densification of the ice column, followed by the development of microalgal blooms, while mineral dust particles do not directly contribute to the darkening. Our study provides an empirically constrained physical albedo model to represent bare ice darkening processes at play in the Dark Zone and beyond, which can guide modeling efforts to include surface darkening in ice sheet mass loss predictions.
title_zh: 地表过程使卡拉利特努纳特（格陵兰岛）西南冰盖变暗
abstract_zh: 每个融化季节，卡拉利特努纳特冰盖的西南边缘都会形成一个“暗区”，降低地表反照率并提高地表融化速率。虽然已知有几个过程会影响局部反照率，但它们各自对区域范围变暗的贡献仍然未知。在这里，我们结合实验室测量、现场观察以及物理和概率建模来量化整个暗区的反照率降低机制。我们的结果表明，变暗主要是由冰石物质积累和冰柱致密化共同驱动的，随后是微藻华的发展，而矿物尘埃颗粒并不直接导致变暗。我们的研究提供了一个经验约束的物理反照率模型来表示暗区及其他地区的裸冰变暗过程，这可以指导建模工作将表面变暗纳入冰盖质量损失预测中。

title: Opposite and reversible optical switching in soft-lattice halide perovskites using light and heat
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
title_zh: 利用光和热在软晶格卤化物钙钛矿中进行相反和可逆的光学开关
abstract_zh:
卤化物钙钛矿具有软晶格，电子自由度和结构自由度之间具有很强的相互作用，使其有望用于下一代光电子学。最近的研究揭示了它们独特的光致和热致光学行为，但动态光学开关的潜力仍未得到充分探索。在这里，我们展示了单晶溴化铯铅（CsPbBr
                    3
                    ），由带隙以上照明或热激发独立驱动。我们测量了从 3 微米到 20 微米的中红外传输的可调变化，在 20 微米处超过 10%，在光和热下极性相反，调制时间 <1 毫秒。这种对立的行为是由照明下类似极化子的晶格畸变（降低透射率）以及加热引起的晶格膨胀与材料的负热光系数（增加透明度）引起的。我们的研究结果确立了无机卤化物钙钛矿作为可重构光子学的可行材料平台，其中传输可以通过其软晶格固有的不同机制独立控制。

title: Dirac magnons in a thin elemental itinerant ferromagnet
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: A distinct difference between graphene—an atomic layer of carbon—and conventional semiconductors is that its electrons behave as massless Dirac fermions, giving rise to unprecedented physical properties. Magnetically ordered solids host magnons, quasiparticles associated with magnetic degrees of freedom. While Dirac magnons have recently been predicted in specific insulating or rare-earth magnets, their existence in thin 3d magnets remains elusive because of the complex nature of itinerant magnetism and dimensionality effects. Here, we demonstrate the presence of Dirac magnons in a thin itinerant elemental ferromagnet. By investigating atomically designed hexagonal close-packed cobalt films, we establish that magnons in such structures resemble the Dirac electrons in graphene. We explain the physical nature of these Dirac magnons and discuss the consequences of symmetry, dimensionality, magnetic interactions, the number of atomic layers, and cobalt’s itinerant magnetism on the properties of the Dirac points. Our results pave the way for finding and engineering Dirac magnons in a variety of low-dimensional layered 3d ferromagnets and metamaterials.
title_zh: 薄元素流动铁磁体中的狄拉克磁振子
abstract_zh: 石墨烯（碳原子层）与传统半导体之间的显着区别在于，其电子表现为无质量的狄拉克费米子，从而产生了前所未有的物理特性。磁有序固体含有磁振子，即与磁自由度相关的准粒子。虽然狄拉克磁振子最近在特定的绝缘或稀土磁体中被预测，但由于流动磁性和维度效应的复杂性，它们在薄 3d 磁体中的存在仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们证明了狄拉克磁振子在薄的流动元素铁磁体中的存在。通过研究原子设计的六方密堆积钴薄膜，我们确定这种结构中的磁振子类似于石墨烯中的狄拉克电子。我们解释了这些狄拉克磁振子的物理性质，并讨论了对称性、维度、磁相互作用、原子层数和钴的巡回磁性对狄拉克点性质的影响。我们的结果为在各种低维层状 3d 铁磁体和超材料中寻找和设计狄拉克磁振子铺平了道路。

title: Photonic networking of quantum memories in high dimensions
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Quantum networking enables the exchange of quantum information between physically separated quantum systems, which has applications ranging from quantum computing to unconditionally secure communication. These quantum information is generally represented by two-level quantum systems or qubits. Here, we demonstrate a quantum network of high-dimensional (HD) quantum memories or “qudits” stored in individual atoms. The interference and detection of HD time-bin–encoded single photons emitted from atomic qudit memories herald maximally entangled Bell states across pairs of atomic qudit levels. This approach expands the quantum information capacity of a quantum network while improving the entanglement success fraction beyond the standard 50% limit of qubit-based measurement protocols.
title_zh: 高维量子存储器的光子网络
abstract_zh: 量子网络能够在物理上分离的量子系统之间交换量子信息，其应用范围从量子计算到无条件安全通信。这些量子信息通常由二能级量子系统或量子比特来表示。在这里，我们展示了存储在单个原子中的高维（HD）量子存储器或“量子”的量子网络。从原子量子体存储器发射的高清时间仓编码的单光子的干涉和检测预示着原子量子体能级对之间的最大纠缠贝尔态。这种方法扩展了量子网络的量子信息容量，同时将纠缠成功率提高到超出基于量子位的测量协议的标准 50% 限制。

title: Spliceosome buffers cryptic genetic variation to enforce phenotypic robustness in Arabidopsis
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Cryptic genetic variations (CGVs), which are phenotypically silent under normal conditions, can compromise phenotypic robustness when unmasked. Canalization buffers CGV to stabilize phenotypes, yet the underlying molecular mechanisms remain largely unknown. Here, we show that alternative splicing acts as a canalization mechanism in
                    Arabidopsis
                    . A natural single-nucleotide polymorphism in the functionally unknown gene
                    Hidden Killer 1
                    (
                    HIKI1
                    ) behaves as CGV and disrupts embryonic robustness dependent on genetic background when
                    SKIP
                    is compromised among natural
                    Arabidopsis
                    populations. SKIP-containing spliceosome rescues CGV-perturbed
                    HIKI1
                    pre–messenger RNA alternative splicing, thereby buffering the CGV and restoring normal embryogenesis. This buffering extends to postembryonic traits, demonstrating that alternative splicing is a general canalization mechanism. Our findings reveal how genetic decoding machinery maintains phenotypic robustness despite hidden variations and open previously unexplored routes for unlocking species-wide genetic potential and tuning trait penetrance.
title_zh: 剪接体缓冲神秘的遗传变异以增强拟南芥表型的鲁棒性
abstract_zh:
隐性遗传变异（CGV）在正常条件下表型上是沉默的，当暴露出来时可能会损害表型的稳健性。渠道化缓冲 CGV 以稳定表型，但潜在的分子机制仍然很大程度上未知。在这里，我们展示了选择性剪接作为一种渠道机制
                    拟南芥
                    。功能未知基因中的天然单核苷酸多态性
                    隐藏杀手1
                    （
                    HIKI1
                    ）表现为 CGV 并破坏依赖于遗传背景的胚胎稳健性
                    跳过
                    自然之间的妥协
                    拟南芥
                    人口。含有 SKIP 的剪接体可挽救 CGV 扰动
                    HIKI1
                    前信使 RNA 选择性剪接，从而缓冲 CGV 并恢复正常胚胎发生。这种缓冲延伸到胚胎后特征，表明选择性剪接是一种普遍的通道化机制。我们的研究结果揭示了基因解码机制如何在隐藏变异的情况下保持表型稳健性，并为解锁物种范围的遗传潜力和调整性状外显率开辟了先前未探索的途径。

title: Efficient chemical reprogramming of human T cells into functional megakaryocytes and platelets
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The generation of megakaryocytes (MKs) from human somatic cells through chemical reprogramming represents a promising strategy for developing alternative platelet sources. Building on our prior chemical reprogramming protocol for converting erythroblasts to MKs, we established a robust method that successfully generated induced MKs (iMKs) from human cord blood–derived CD3
                    +
                    T cells, which is a more abundant source. This method used a five–small molecule cocktail containing a reprogramming booster, AZD4205, to promote erasure of T cell identity and facilitate fate transition toward MKs. T cell–derived iMKs exhibited characteristic MK cellular and molecular signatures, demonstrating the capacity to produce proplatelets and release functional platelets. Single-cell RNA sequencing further revealed that iMKs were heterogeneous with distinct functional profiles, including cycling, immune, and thrombopoiesis-biased MKs. Our findings highlight an optimized chemical reprogramming strategy that enables efficient conversion of T cells to MKs, providing a practical and convenient approach to generating clinically relevant MKs and platelets.
title_zh: 将人类 T 细胞有效化学重编程为功能性巨核细胞和血小板
abstract_zh:
通过化学重编程从人类体细胞产生巨核细胞（MK）代表了开发替代血小板来源的有前途的策略。基于我们之前将有红细胞转化为 MK 的化学重编程方案，我们建立了一种稳健的方法，成功从人脐带血衍生的 CD3 中生成诱导 MK (iMK)
                    +
                    T细胞，这是一个更丰富的来源。该方法使用含有重编程增强剂 AZD4205 的五小分子混合物来促进 T 细胞身份的消除并促进向 MK 的命运转变。 T 细胞衍生的 iMK 表现出特征性 MK 细胞和分子特征，证明其具有产生前血小板和释放功能性血小板的能力。单细胞 RNA 测序进一步揭示 iMK 是异质的，具有不同的功能特征，包括循环、免疫和血小板生成偏向的 MK。我们的研究结果强调了一种优化的化学重编程策略，该策略能够将 T 细胞有效转化为 MK，为生成临床相关的 MK 和血小板提供实用且方便的方法。

title: Scent of a father: Paternal body odors boost interbrain synchrony
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Olfactory cues are ancient signals and mammalian young utilize maternal body odors (BO) to form a bond to their habitat in the absence of the mother, strengthen associative learning, and grow a social brain. Whether infants respond to their father’s BO and how paternal BO impact their brain maturation is still unknown. Utilizing ecologically-valid paradigms with dual-electroencephalography recordings, we measured infant-father and infant-stranger interbrain synchrony during naturalistic interactions and assessed the effects of paternal BO. Infants show greater interbrain synchrony with father compared to a stranger male. Paternal BO increase infant-stranger interbrain synchrony and enhance the father-typical positive arousal, providing evidence that infants process their father’s odor and can invoke his presence in his absence. Fathers contribute to brain maturation by enhancing cross-hemisphere connectivity in alpha rhythm that sustains attention regulation during stimulating social interactions. Paternal olfactory cues can invoke infants’ associative learning and may push the development of more complex neural and behavioral competencies.
title_zh: 父亲的气味：父亲的体味促进大脑间的同步
abstract_zh: 嗅觉信号是古老的信号，哺乳动物幼崽在母亲不在的情况下利用母亲的体味 (BO) 与栖息地建立联系，加强联想学习并培养社交大脑。婴儿是否会对父亲的 BO 做出反应以及父亲的 BO 如何影响他们的大脑成熟仍然未知。利用双脑电图记录的生态有效范式，我们测量了自然交互过程中婴儿-父亲和婴儿-陌生人的脑间同步性，并评估了父亲 BO 的影响。与陌生人相比，婴儿与父亲表现出更强的脑间同步性。父亲的 BO 增加了婴儿与陌生人的大脑间同步性，并增强了父亲典型的积极唤醒，这提供了证据表明婴儿可以处理父亲的气味，并可以在父亲不在时唤起他的存在。父亲通过增强阿尔法节律的跨半球连接来促进大脑成熟，阿尔法节律在刺激社交互动过程中维持注意力调节。父亲的嗅觉线索可以激发婴儿的联想学习，并可能推动更复杂的神经和行为能力的发展。

title: Meteor over New York City: Brines in a primitive CM asteroid
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The CI (Ivuna-type) carbonaceous material returned from asteroids Ryugu and Bennu contain mobilized sodium from the evaporation or freezing of liquid water into brines, shedding light on the internal structure of ice-rich CI-type worlds and the formation of prebiotic organic compounds. The formation of brines has not been demonstrated in CM (Mighei-type) carbonaceous chondrites, which also supplied organic matter to the early Earth. Here, we announce the fall of a primitive meteorite from a daytime fireball over the New York metropolitan area in July 2024. It is a CM2 breccia that contains unique CM1 clasts rich in water and sodium. The meteorite contains abundant amino acids and other products of organic chemistry in brines that reveal subsurface processes on CM-type asteroid parent bodies.
title_zh: 纽约市上空的流星：原始 CM 小行星中的盐水
abstract_zh: 从小行星 Ryugu 和 Bennu 返回的 CI（Ivuna 型）碳质材料含有液态水蒸发或冻结成盐水时流动的钠，揭示了富含冰的 CI 型世界的内部结构以及生命起源前有机化合物的形成。 CM（Mighei 型）碳质球粒陨石中尚未证实盐水的形成，它也为早期地球提供了有机物质。在此，我们宣布 2024 年 7 月，一颗原始陨石从纽约大都市区上空的白天火球中坠落。它是 CM2 角砾岩，含有独特的富含水和钠的 CM1 碎屑。该陨石在盐水中含有丰富的氨基酸和其他有机化学产物，揭示了 CM 型小行星母体的地下过程。

title: Inferring single-cell heterogeneity of bacteriophage lysis-associated life-history traits from population-scale dynamics
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Phage-induced lysis of bacteria transforms population dynamics, community structure, and ecosystem functioning. Scaling up infected cell fate to quantify population- and ecosystem-scale impacts requires estimates of viral life-history traits, including underlying heterogeneity in the timing, efficiency, and outcome of lytic infections. However, the variability of lysis-associated phage traits remains poorly characterized. Here, we infer single-cell heterogeneity in lysis-associated traits for an ecologically relevant system: Syn9, a T4-like cyanophage infecting
                    Synechococcus
                    strain WH8109, a representative of globally abundant marine cyanobacteria. We estimate the heterogeneous distribution of latent period and burst size using a nonlinear model of infection dynamics applied to population-scale time-series data. We then validate our inference approach using a single-cell assay—demonstrating the feasibility of inferring phage trait heterogeneity from population data even in the absence of single-cell experiments. The variation in Syn9’s latent period exceeds that previously found in coliphages and reinforces the limitations of representing viral traits with a single value. Moreover, by partitioning lytic events via the inferred heterogeneous latent period distribution, we show that realized burst size variability is largely explained by differences in latent period, providing a path forward to measure and integrate trait (co)variation into population and ecosystem models.
title_zh: 从群体规模动态推断噬菌体裂解相关生命史特征的单细胞异质性
abstract_zh:
噬菌体诱导的细菌裂解改变了种群动态、群落结构和生态系统功能。扩大受感染细胞的命运以量化群体和生态系统规模的影响需要估计病毒的生命史特征，包括裂解感染的时间、效率和结果的潜在异质性。然而，与裂解相关的噬菌体性状的变异性仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们推断生态相关系统的裂解相关性状的单细胞异质性：Syn9，一种类似 T4 的噬藻体感染
                    聚球藻属
                    菌株 WH8109，全球丰富的海洋蓝藻的代表。我们使用应用于人口规模时间序列数据的感染动态非线性模型来估计潜伏期和爆发大小的异质分布。然后，我们使用单细胞测定验证了我们的推理方法，证明即使在没有单细胞实验的情况下，也可以从群体数据推断噬菌体性状异质性的可行性。 Syn9潜伏期的变化超过了之前在大肠杆菌噬菌体中发现的变化，并强化了用单一值表示病毒性状的局限性。此外，通过推断的异质潜伏期分布来划分裂解事件，我们表明，实现的爆发大小变异性在很大程度上是由潜伏期的差异来解释的，为测量性状（共）变异并将其整合到种群和生态系统模型中提供了一条前进的道路。

title: Single-cell transcriptomic unveils tumor-mediated reprogramming of neutrophils and their unique vulnerability that inhibits metastasis
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Neutrophils are protumorigenic and prometastatic in tumor-bearing mice. Comprehensive single-cell RNA sequencing analyses on various tissues of naïve and tumor-bearing MMTV-PyMT (mouse mammary tumor virus–polyoma middle T antigen) mice unraveled a neutrophil reprogramming process and uncovered a strategy to selectively target reprogrammed neutrophils. Transcriptional reprogramming of neutrophils in tumor-bearing mice is initiated in the bone marrow (BM) by granulocyte colony-stimulating factor (G-CSF). Among the seven neutrophil clusters in the BM, the abundance of one cluster is markedly increased whereas another cluster is diminished in tumor-bearing mice. This reprogramming endures across tissue types including blood, tumor microenvironment, and the metastatic niche in the lungs. Thus, in all tissues tested, neutrophils derived from tumor-bearing mice are transcriptionally distinct from those derived from naïve mice. Among the genes that are markedly induced are members of the
                    Ifitm
                    family. We leverage this facet to selectively target reprogrammed neutrophils through treatment with Rapalink-1—an mTOR (mechanistic target of rapamycin) inhibitor—whose intake is greatly enhanced by IFITM proteins. Reprogrammed neutrophils selectively uptake Rapalink-1, which selectively eradicate them in vivo and normalized the neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio in tumor-bearing mice without affecting naïve neutrophils. Last, Rapalink-1 inhibited metastasis of a Rapalink-1–resistant tumor. Thus, Rapalink-1 not only could affect the primary tumor but also selectively eliminates tumor-reprogrammed neutrophils to diminish metastasis.
title_zh: 单细胞转录组揭示了肿瘤介导的中性粒细胞重编程及其抑制转移的独特脆弱性
abstract_zh:
中性粒细胞在荷瘤小鼠中具有促肿瘤发生和促转移的作用。对幼稚和荷瘤 MMTV-PyMT（小鼠乳腺肿瘤病毒-多瘤中 T 抗原）小鼠的各种组织进行全面的单细胞 RNA 测序分析，揭示了中性粒细胞重编程过程，并发现了选择性靶向重编程中性粒细胞的策略。荷瘤小鼠中性粒细胞的转录重编程是由粒细胞集落刺激因子（G-CSF）在骨髓（BM）中启动的。在骨髓中的七个中性粒细胞簇中，在荷瘤小鼠中，一个簇的丰度显着增加，而另一个簇的丰度减少。这种重编程可以在多种组织类型中持续存在，包括血液、肿瘤微环境和肺部转移位。因此，在所有测试的组织中，来自荷瘤小鼠的中性粒细胞在转录上与来自幼稚小鼠的中性粒细胞不同。被显着诱导的基因包括
                    伊菲特姆
                    家庭。我们利用这一方面，通过 Rapalink-1（一种 mTOR（雷帕霉素的机械靶点）抑制剂）治疗选择性地靶向重编程的中性粒细胞，IFITM 蛋白大大增强了其摄入量。重新编程的中性粒细胞选择性地摄取 Rapalink-1，从而在体内选择性地消除它们，并使荷瘤小鼠的中性粒细胞与淋巴细胞的比例正常化，而不影响初始中性粒细胞。最后，Rapalink-1 抑制 Rapalink-1 耐药肿瘤的转移。因此，Rapalink-1不仅可以影响原发肿瘤，还可以影响原发肿瘤。

title: Moisture sorption and hydration dynamics in intrinsically hygroscopic hydrogels
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Hygroscopic materials that capture water vapor across a wide humidity range are important for emerging applications including atmospheric water harvesting, moisture control, and thermal management. Hydrogel sorbents are attractive because they can store large amounts of water while remaining solid-like, yet common hydrophilic gels sorb little vapor at low relative humidity (RH) unless hygroscopicity is introduced by deliquescent salts. Here, we report intrinsically hygroscopic hydrogels (IHHs) assembled from inosine and Zn
                    2+
                    through pH-controlled supramolecular coordination. The IHHs show a moisture-sorption onset near zero RH, reaching 0.17 g g
                    −1
                    at 30% RH while retaining swelling-amplified uptake at high RH (1.9 g g
                    −1
                    at 95% RH) and reversible cycling. Varying gelation pH reprograms the coordination microenvironment and network structure, reshaping early-stage sorption and shifting uptake onset. Experiments and simulations indicate that hydration-accessible Zn-centered motifs serve as important early hydration loci, while pH-dependent network structure further modulates hydration growth. These results provide a coordination-chemistry route to hygroscopic hydrogels without salt deliquescence.
title_zh: 本质吸湿水凝胶中的水分吸附和水合动力学
abstract_zh:
在较宽湿度范围内捕获水蒸气的吸湿材料对于包括大气水收集、湿度控制和热管理在内的新兴应用非常重要。水凝胶吸附剂很有吸引力，因为它们可以储存大量的水，同时保持固体状，但常见的亲水凝胶在低相对湿度 (RH) 下吸附很少的蒸汽，除非潮解盐引入吸湿性。在这里，我们报道了由肌苷和锌组装而成的本质吸湿水凝胶（IHH）
                    2+
                    通过pH控制的超分子配位。 IHH 显示接近 0 RH 时吸湿开始，达到 0.17 g g
                    −1
                    在 30% RH 下，同时保留高 RH 下的溶胀放大吸收（1.9 g g
                    −1
                    95% RH）和可逆循环。不同的凝胶 pH 值会重新编程协调微环境和网络结构，重塑早期吸附并改变吸收起始点。实验和模拟表明，可水合的 Zn 中心基序是重要的早期水合位点，而 pH 依赖性网络结构进一步调节水合生长。这些结果为无盐潮解的吸湿水凝胶提供了配位化学途径。

title: Homer condensates orchestrate YAP–Wnt signaling crosstalk downstream of the Crumbs polarity complex
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The Hippo pathway governs cell growth, proliferation, and differentiation and is frequently deregulated in cancer. Yes-associated protein (YAP) is the central transcriptional coactivator of the Hippo pathway and interacts with β-catenin to coordinate YAP–Wnt signaling crosstalk. Both pathways are modulated by diverse upstream signals including mechanical cues, cell density, and cell polarity, yet how such signals are integrated remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate that Homer scaffolding proteins coordinate YAP and Wnt signaling downstream of the Crumbs polarity complex. Homers interact directly via their EVH1 domains with the Crumbs component PATJ and the NDR kinase scaffold Furry-like (FRYL). Homers antagonize FRYL to promote YAP activation while cooperating with FRYL to enhance Wnt/β-catenin signaling, revealing pathway-selective regulation. PATJ, in contrast, recruits Homers to the cortex and restrains YAP activity. We further show that Homers form biomolecular condensates in nonpolarized epithelial and colorectal cancer cells, whose assembly and signaling properties are differentially modulated by PATJ and FRYL. Whereas FRYL promotes the formation of cytoplasmic droplets, PATJ drives the assembly of phase-separated compartments at or near the plasma membrane. Collectively, our findings establish Homer-driven phase separation as a tunable signaling mechanism to translate polarity cues into transcriptional output.
title_zh: Homer 凝聚物协调 Crumbs 极性复合体下游的 YAP-Wnt 信号串扰
abstract_zh: Hippo 通路控制细胞生长、增殖和分化，并且在癌症中经常失调。 Yes 相关蛋白 (YAP) 是 Hippo 通路的中心转录共激活因子，与 β-catenin 相互作用以协调 YAP-Wnt 信号串扰。这两条途径均受到不同上游信号的调节，包括机械信号、细胞密度和细胞极性，但这些信号如何整合仍知之甚少。在这里，我们证明 Homer 支架蛋白协调 Crumbs 极性复合物下游的 YAP 和 Wnt 信号传导。 Homers 通过其 EVH1 结构域与 Crumbs 成分 PATJ 和 NDR 激酶支架 Furry-like (FRYL) 直接相互作用。 Homers 拮抗 FRYL 以促进 YAP 激活，同时与 FRYL 合作增强 Wnt/β-catenin 信号传导，揭示通路选择性调节。相比之下，PATJ 将 Homers 招募到皮质并抑制 YAP 活动。我们进一步表明，Homers 在非极化上皮细胞和结直肠癌细胞中形成生物分子凝聚物，其组装和信号传导特性受到 PATJ 和 FRYL 的差异调节。 FRYL 促进细胞质液滴的形成，而 PATJ 则驱动质膜处或附近相分离区室的组装。总的来说，我们的研究结果将荷马驱动的相分离确立为一种可调节的信号机制，可将极性线索转化为转录输出。

title: Contributions of intra- and extracellular antibiotic degradation to collective [math]-lactam survival
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Collective antibiotic resistance occurs when populations of bacteria survive antibiotic treatments that are lethal to individual bacteria, which affects the efficacy of drug therapies. An important mechanism of collective resistance against widely used
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -lactams is the production of drug-degrading
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -lactamases. Here, we integrate experiments with mathematical modeling to understand the collective survival of
                    Escherichia coli
                    challenged with cefotaxime (CTX). At near-lethal CTX concentrations, we observe complex dynamics, involving initial biomass growth due to filamentation, followed by death, and subsequently growth recovery. We show that production of AmpC, a chromosomal
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -lactamase, is responsible for CTX degradation, allowing the resumption of cell division in surviving filaments. The detoxification of the environment proceeds through CTX hydrolysis by AmpC in the periplasm of intact cells, as well as extracellularly after cell lysis. Our model predicts the recovery time from molecular parameters, and quantifies the relative roles of periplasmic and extracellular degradation for two strains of
                    E. coli
                    that differ in the degree of privatization of AmpC hydrolysis. Our findings suggest that
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -lactam survival of bacterial infections depends on a combination of intra- and extracellular
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -lactamase activity, which will likely vary among isolates.
title_zh: 细胞内和细胞外抗生素降解对集体[数学]-内酰胺存活的贡献
abstract_zh:
当细菌群体在对单个细菌致命的抗生素治疗中存活下来时，就会出现集体抗生素耐药性，从而影响药物治疗的功效。集体抵制广泛使用的重要机制
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -内酰胺是药物降解的产物
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -内酰胺酶。在这里，我们将实验与数学模型结合起来，以了解集体生存
                    大肠杆菌
                    用头孢噻肟（CTX）进行挑战。在接近致死的 CTX 浓度下，我们观察到复杂的动态，包括由于丝状化而导致的初始生物量生长，随后死亡，以及随后的生长恢复。我们证明了 AmpC（一种染色体）的产生
                    
                      
                        β
                      
                    
                    -内酰胺酶负责 CTX 降解，使存活的细丝恢复细胞分裂。环境的解毒是通过完整细胞周质中的 AmpC 水解 CTX 以及细胞裂解后的细胞外进行的。我们的模型根据分子参数预测恢复时间，并量化两种菌株的周质和细胞外降解的相对作用
                    大肠杆菌

title: Endosomal TPC1–mediated Ca2+ nanodomains regulate transferrin receptor trafficking and iron homeostasis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Two-pore channel 1 (TPC1) is an endosomal Na
                    +
                    /Ca
                    2+
                    -selective channel implicated in membrane trafficking, endosome tubulation, and excitability, but how TPC1 regulates membrane trafficking is unknown. Using TPC1-null human cells, we demonstrate that TPC1 drives transferrin receptor (TfR) trafficking and recycling via Ca
                    2+
                    , and not Na
                    +
                    fluxes or endosomal pH changes, since channel-targeted Ca
                    2+
                    -buffers inhibited trafficking, whereas a Na
                    +
                    -deficient Ca
                    2+
                    -permeable TPC1 mutant fully supported trafficking. TPC1 was unique since other Ca
                    2+
                    sources did not support TfR trafficking. TPC1 activity depended on the lipid PI(3,5)P
                    2
                    , since trafficking was impaired by a lipid-insensitive TPC1 or inhibitors of lipid synthesis. Finally, a corollary of this reduced TfR trafficking is an iron-deficiency and storage phenotype in TPC1-deficient HeLa cells and mice. Our findings highlight endosomes as unique Ca
                    2+
                    stores mobilized by a phosphoinositide-induced TPC1 channel that generates local Ca
                    2+
                    nanodomains crucial for maintaining TfR trafficking and consequent iron homeostasis.
title_zh: 内体 TPC1 介导的 Ca2+ 纳米结构域调节转铁蛋白受体运输和铁稳态
abstract_zh:

                    +
                    - 缺钙
                    2+
                    -可渗透的TPC1突变体完全支持贩运。 TPC1 与其他 Ca 相比是独一无二的

                    消息来源不支持 TfR 贩运。 TPC1 活性取决于脂质 PI(3,5)P

title: Plants are a powerful proxy for global tidal marsh methane fluxes
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Methane (CH
                    4
                    ) emissions can reduce the climate benefits of tidal marshes. Yet the drivers of tidal marsh CH
                    4
                    emissions remain poorly quantified, and salinity, the most well-established proxy for tidal marsh CH
                    4
                    fluxes, has low predictive performance. Here, we demonstrate that plant species out performs salinity as a single predictor of global tidal marsh CH
                    4
                    fluxes, providing a powerful and simple predictor on its own. A multiproxy approach combining plant species with other predictors (i.e., latitude, salinity, season) further improves predictions of global CH
                    4
                    fluxes. For our analysis, we compiled 87 studies with 2,094 mean measurements of CH
                    4
                    fluxes and used random forest and generalized additive modeling to investigate the relationship among CH
                    4
                    fluxes, salinity, and plants. We found that plant species was the most important predictor of CH
                    4
                    fluxes globally. Our model of plant species alone explained 62% of the variability in CH
                    4
                    fluxes and when including latitude, season, and soil salinity, explained 71%. We also developed a model with plant functional type for when plant species flux data are not available. We found that plant functional type alone explained 54% of the variability in CH
                    4
                    fluxes, underscoring the influential role of plants. Previously, polyhaline marshes were thought to have low CH
                    4
                    emissions. Here we show that CH
                    4
                    fluxes from these marshes offset between 1% and 39% of carbon sequestration, depending on the plant species present and selected global warming potential value. This plant species-based approach significantly improves global CH
                    4
                    flux estimates in tidal marshes and facilitates global carbon accounting.

title: Dosage compensation and meiotic sex chromosome inactivation are maintained under relaxed selection
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Dosage compensation and meiotic sex chromosome inactivation (MSCI) are key mechanisms regulating gene expression from the X chromosome in male-heterogametic species. While the convergent evolution of these mechanisms is well documented, their evolutionary fate under relaxed selection remains poorly understood. Here, we test whether dosage compensation and MSCI persist following three independent transitions to parthenogenesis in stick insects, where selection on male phenotypes is relaxed. Using rare males occasionally produced by parthenogenetic females, chromosome-level genome assemblies, RNA-seq from multiple tissues, and immunocytochemistry, we find that dosage compensation is fully conserved across all seven studied somatic tissues. This is even the case in the oldest, approximately 1.5 My old all-female lineage and for tissue-specific genes for which dosage variation is not expected to be very deleterious. Meiotic X inactivation in the germline is also conserved. Surprisingly, however, expression data and cytological markers indicate that MSCI signatures are even stronger in parthenogenetic males, a pattern likely driven by prolonged autosomal transcription during meiosis. These results indicate that X-targeting dosage compensation and MSCI are highly stable over evolutionary time and may be maintained in all-female lineages by a combination of evolutionary constraint, pleiotropy, or very weak selection, whereas autosomal expression during meiosis shifts rapidly under relaxed selection.
title_zh: 在宽松选择下维持剂量补偿和减数分裂性染色体失活
abstract_zh: 剂量补偿和减数分裂性染色体失活（MSCI）是调节雄性异配物种中 X 染色体基因表达的关键机制。虽然这些机制的趋同进化有据可查，但它们在宽松选择下的进化命运仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们测试了竹节虫在三次独立的单性生殖转变后剂量补偿和 MSCI 是否持续存在，其中对雄性表型的选择是放松的。利用孤雌生殖雌性偶尔产生的稀有雄性、染色体水平基因组组装、来自多个组织的RNA-seq和免疫细胞化学，我们发现剂量补偿在所有七个研究的体细胞组织中完全保守。即使在最古老的、大约 1.5 My 老的全女性谱系和组织特异性基因中也是如此，预计剂量变化不会对其产生非常有害的影响。种系中减数分裂 X 失活也是保守的。然而，令人惊讶的是，表达数据和细胞学标记表明，MSCI 特征在孤雌生殖雄性中甚至更强，这种模式可能是由减数分裂期间延长的常染色体转录驱动的。这些结果表明，X 靶向剂量补偿和 MSCI 在进化过程中高度稳定，并且可能通过进化限制、多效性或非常弱的选择的组合在全雌性谱系中得以维持，而减数分裂期间的常染色体表达在宽松的选择下迅速变化。

title: Tumor-derived cytokine enhances bitter sensing through remote control of bitter taste neurons via the Upd3/Spz5/Toll-6 axis in Drosophila
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The sense of taste is essential as it governs appetite and the feeding process. However, it is largely unknown whether and how tumors in a host communicate with peripheral taste sensing. Using the well-established yki
                    S168A
                    tumor models in
                    
                      Drosophila melanogaster
                    
                    , we found that flies carrying brain or gut tumors exhibit enhanced avoidance of bitter compounds such as caffeine but showed no avoidance of sucrose, and the degree of the avoidance was correlated with severity of the tumor phenotype. Through RNAi screening of upregulated cytokines secreted by malignant tumors, we identified Upd3 as a key factor in this process. Tumor-derived Upd3 promotes systematic increase of Spz5 expression, a fly neurotrophin, which in turn activates the Toll-6 receptor in peripheral bitter sensing neurons, leading to upregulation of the bitter-sensing receptor Gr66a. In vivo Ca
                    2+
                    imaging demonstrated heightened responses to caffeine by Gr66a
                    +
                    neurons in tumor-bearing flies. Interestingly, a similar phenomenon was observed in murine tumor models, where tumors also caused behavioral hypersensitivity to bitter tastants. Our findings reveal how tumors affect animals’ feeding behavior as well as the underlying mechanism. Our findings also suggest that such tumor-induced behavioral alterations are likely conserved across species.
title_zh: 果蝇中肿瘤源性细胞因子通过 Upd3/Spz5/Toll-6 轴远程控制苦味神经元，增强苦味感觉
abstract_zh:
味觉至关重要，因为它控制着食欲和进食过程。然而，宿主体内的肿瘤是否以及如何与外周味觉通讯尚不清楚。使用成熟的 yki
                    S168A
                    肿瘤模型在
                    
                      黑腹果蝇
                    
                    研究人员发现，携带脑部或肠道肿瘤的果蝇表现出对咖啡因等苦味化合物的回避能力增强，但对蔗糖的回避能力没有增强，而且回避程度与肿瘤表型的严重程度相关。通过RNAi筛选恶性肿瘤分泌的上调细胞因子，我们确定Upd3是该过程中的关键因素。肿瘤来源的 Upd3 促进 Spz5（一种果蝇神经营养蛋白）表达的系统性增加，进而激活外周苦味感受神经元中的 Toll-6 受体，导致苦味感受受体 Gr66a 的上调。体内钙
                    2+
                    成像显示 Gr66a 对咖啡因的反应增强
                    +
                    荷瘤果蝇的神经元。有趣的是，在小鼠肿瘤模型中也观察到了类似的现象，其中肿瘤也会引起对促苦味剂的行为过敏。我们的研究结果揭示了肿瘤如何影响动物的进食行为及其潜在机制。我们的研究结果还表明，这种肿瘤引起的行为改变可能在不同物种之间是保守的。

title: Pilgrimage to sacrifice: Mechanisms, causes, and time of death of the Western Andean Capacocha of the Southern Tawantinsuyu
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Capacocha was a key Inca state rite that intertwined pilgrimage, sacrifice, and imperial incorporation across the Andes. We present a multianalytical investigation into two Capacocha cases from the western slope of the Andes: Cerro Esmeralda, located in the coastal Atacama Desert of northern Chile, and Cerro El Plomo, in the high mountains of central Chile. Stable isotope analysis reveals commensality practices during the pilgrimage, integrating local communities into the imperial order. Furthermore, computed tomography, dermatoscopy, and skin histology provide new evidence regarding the causes and mechanisms of death, identifying violent acts associated with sacrifice. Last, we present a pair of radiocarbon dates to discuss the chronology of both Capacocha contexts. In sum, these practices specify the materialization of Inca statecraft and contribute to characterizing the complexity and diversity of Capacocha ritual as an extension of the Inca biopolitical conquest.
title_zh: 祭祀朝圣：南塔万廷苏尤西安第斯卡帕科查的机制、原因和死亡时间
abstract_zh: 卡帕科查是印加国家的一项重要仪式，将安第斯山脉的朝圣、祭祀和帝国合并交织在一起。我们对安第斯山脉西坡的两个卡帕科查病例进行了多分析调查：位于智利北部沿海阿塔卡马沙漠的埃斯梅拉达山和智利中部高山的埃尔普洛莫山。稳定同位素分析揭示了朝圣期间的共餐行为，将当地社区纳入帝国秩序。此外，计算机断层扫描、皮肤镜检查和皮肤组织学提供了有关死亡原因和机制的新证据，识别与牺牲相关的暴力行为。最后，我们提出了一对放射性碳测年法来讨论卡帕科查背景的年表。总之，这些实践具体化了印加治国之术，并有助于将卡帕科查仪式的复杂性和多样性描述为印加生物政治征服的延伸。

title: Global biosphere productivity response to Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation collapse during Heinrich Stadial 4
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The slowdown of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC) due to ongoing climate change raises concerns about its impact on the global carbon cycle. Understanding how global biosphere productivity may respond to such changes is essential for predicting the future carbon cycle, yet quantifying past global biosphere productivity remains challenging. We use triple isotope composition of air oxygen (
                    17
                    Δ) trapped in polar ice cores to reconstruct the global biosphere productivity over the period 40.5 to 38.6 thousand years before the present (ka B.P.), covering Heinrich Stadial 4, a period of weakened AMOC. Our data reveal a slight increase in productivity following a carbon dioxide (CO
                    2
                    ) rise around 39.5 ka B.P. Freshwater hosing experiments using a global climate model indicate that the CO
                    2
                    fertilization effect on the terrestrial biosphere offsets productivity decline caused by consequences of AMOC slowdown. Collectively, our results suggest that global biosphere productivity slightly increases in response to AMOC slowdown and accompanying changes.

abstract_zh:
持续的气候变化导致大西洋经向翻转环流（AMOC）放缓，引发了人们对其对全球碳循环影响的担忧。了解全球生物圈生产力如何应对此类变化对于预测未来的碳循环至关重要，但量化过去的全球生物圈生产力仍然具有挑战性。我们使用空气中氧气的三重同位素成分（
                    17 号
                    Δ) 被困在极地冰芯中，重建了距今 40.5 至 38,600 年（ka B.P.）的全球生物圈生产力，涵盖了 Heinrich Stadial 4，即 AMOC 减弱的时期。我们的数据显示，二氧化碳（CO
                    2
                    ）上升约 39.5 ka B.P.使用全球气候模型进行的淡水冲洗实验表明，CO

                    施肥对陆地生物圈的影响抵消了 AMOC 放缓造成的生产力下降。总的来说，我们的结果表明，全球生物圈生产力因 AMOC 放缓和随之而来的变化而略有增加。

title: A population of primary afferent sensory neurons mediates pain relief through nocifensive coping behavior in mice
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
When exposed to noxious cutaneous stimuli, animals exhibit nocifensive behaviors, including rapid defensive reflexes that limit tissue damage and subsequent coping behaviors—most commonly licking of the affected area—that alleviate pain. Despite its ubiquity, the neural mechanism underlying pain relief through licking remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate that Npy2r-Cre
                    +
                    primary sensory neurons in the dorsal root ganglion (DRG), a population of Aβ fibers that includes touch-sensitive, rapidly adapting low-threshold mechanoreceptors, are critical for this process. Mice lacking Npy2r-Cre
                    +
                    neurons exhibited a significant prolongation of coping behavior duration, but not bout frequency, following intraplantar injection of capsaicin or formalin. Conversely, optogenetic activation of Npy2r-Cre
                    +
                    neurons produced attenuating effects on irritant-induced pain. Electrophysiological analyses revealed that Npy2r-Cre
                    +
                    neurons form functional synaptic connections with neurons in the substantia gelatinosa of the spinal dorsal horn (SDH) and that their activation suppressed C fiber-evoked excitation of neurons in lamina I of the SDH, a region implicated in nociceptive transmission to the brain. Together, these findings identify Npy2r-Cre
                    +
                    DRG neurons as a key neural substrate for gating nociceptive transmission in the SDH and mediating pain relief through coping behaviors.
title_zh: 一群初级传入感觉神经元通过小鼠伤害性应对行为介导疼痛缓解
abstract_zh:
当暴露于有害的皮肤刺激时，动物会表现出伤害行为，包括限制组织损伤的快速防御反射和随后的缓解疼痛的应对行为（最常见的是舔受影响的区域）。尽管它无处不在，但通过舔来缓解疼痛的神经机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们证明 Npy2r-Cre

                    +

                    +
                    神经元对刺激引起的疼痛产生减弱作用。电生理分析表明 Npy2r-Cre
                    +

                    +
                    DRG 神经元作为门控 SDH 中伤害感受传递并通过应对行为调节疼痛缓解的关键神经基质。

title: Hydrodynamic dispersion drives viral–cellular contact for gene delivery in porous media
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Reactive biological processes often hinge on rare collisions between particles whose transport is governed by disparate advective, diffusive, and sedimentary mechanisms. Biological cell–virus encounters offer a uniquely quantifiable instance of this general problem: collisions between particles whose transport is governed by entirely different physical mechanisms, yet whose interactions determine system-level function. In stagnant liquids, nanoscale viral vectors explore space only via slow Brownian diffusion, whereas microscale cells rapidly sediment, producing species separation that suppresses virus-cell interfacial interactions. Here we show that liquid absorption into a dry, macroporous sponge enhances viral–cellular interactions by shifting the system into an advection-dispersion regime that circumvents this sedimentation-diffusion limit. By integrating experimental results with a multiscale simulation model, we demonstrate that the tortuous sponge porosity converts capillary-driven flow into convective mixing, driving orders-of-magnitude increases in viral–cellular collision rates. Coupling these dispersive transport dynamics with a probabilistic capture model reveals that hydrodynamic dispersion accounts for the multifold enhancement in viral–cellular transduction efficiency observed in porous sponges. These results provide a quantitative framework for emergent collision dynamics in complex porous media and establish a generalizable strategy to optimize active transport in spatiotemporally heterogeneous biological systems.
title_zh: 流体动力学分散驱动病毒-细胞接触以在多孔介质中传递基因
abstract_zh: 反应性生物过程通常取决于颗粒之间罕见的碰撞，颗粒的运输受不同的平流、扩散和沉积机制控制。生物细胞与病毒的相遇为这个普遍问题提供了一个独特的可量化实例：粒子之间的碰撞，其运输由完全不同的物理机制控制，但其相互作用决定了系统级功能。在静止液体中，纳米级病毒载体仅通过缓慢的布朗扩散探索空间，而微米级细胞则迅速沉积，产生物种分离，抑制病毒与细胞界面的相互作用。在这里，我们表明，干燥的大孔海绵吸收液体可以通过将系统转变为平流分散状态来绕过这种沉降扩散限制，从而增强病毒与细胞的相互作用。通过将实验结果与多尺度模拟模型相结合，我们证明了曲折的海绵孔隙率将毛细管驱动的流动转化为对流混合，从而推动病毒-细胞碰撞率的数量级增加。将这些分散运输动力学与概率捕获模型耦合表明，流体动力学分散解释了在多孔海绵中观察到的病毒细胞转导效率的成倍增强。这些结果为复杂多孔介质中的紧急碰撞动力学提供了定量框架，并建立了一种可推广的策略来优化时空异质生物系统中的主动运输。

title: Bursa of Fabricius–independent B cells establish an IgA-mediated intestinal barrier that safeguards gut–liver homeostasis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The bursa of Fabricius (BF), a specialized lymphoid structure in birds, regulates avian B-cell development. However, the BF starts to regress posthatching, suggesting that as-yet-unidentified structures assume this function during maturation. This study reveals that BF-independent B-cell genesis involving the gut cecal tonsils (CTs) predominates over the BF-dependent pathway posthatching. Although B-cell progenitors originating from the bone marrow (BM) typically migrate to the BF, we identified a population that instead migrates to the CTs through CXCL12/CXCR4-mediated chemotaxis. These BF-independent CXCR4
                    +
                    pre-B cells acquired surface IgM expression within the CT follicular region (FR) and differentiated into immunoglobulin A (IgA)-producing plasma cells. Inhibition of CXCR4
                    +
                    cell influx from the BM impaired formation of the FR, altered the responsiveness of intestinal IgA to commensal bacteria, promoted gut dysbiosis, allowed translocation of pathogenic bacteria (e.g.,
                    Streptococcus alactolyticus
                    ) to the liver, and ultimately caused hepatic inflammation and metabolic dysfunction. These abnormalities were reversed by administering an IgA-enriched fecal preparation derived from healthy chickens. Collectively, these results reveal the existence of a population of BF-independent B cells that function in CTs. These cells represent a promising target for maintaining and improving the immunological and microbiological environment of the avian intestinal tract, which is closely linked to hepatic homeostasis.

title: Mitofusin-2 in ventral striatal D1 neurons regulates effort-based motivation through sex-specific mitochondrial–synaptic reprogramming
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Effort-based motivation varies widely across individuals and affects well-being, yet the molecular and neuronal mechanisms that set motivational capacity remain incompletely understood. Mitochondrial function is emerging as a critical regulator of behavior, and mitofusin-2 (MFN2) is a key mediator of mitochondrial fusion and endoplasmic reticulum–mitochondria coupling. Here, we asked how downregulation of
                    Mfn2
                    in dopamine receptor type-1-expressing medium spiny neurons (D1-MSNs) contributes to effort-based motivation and stress coping in male and female mice by integrating electrophysiology, neuronal and synaptic morphology, immunohistochemistry, mitochondrial readouts, RNA in situ hybridization, RiboTag, and behavioral analyses. MFN2 deficiency resulted in fragmented dendritic mitochondria and remodeled synaptic inputs in ventral striatal D1-MSNs, with no cellular impact in dorsomedial striatal D1-MSNs. Although MFN2 deficiency elicited sex-dependent synaptic and structural alterations, both sexes showed reduced recruitment of accumbal D1-MSNs during motivated behavior and impaired effort-based motivation and stress coping. Translatome profiling revealed shared depletion of mitochondrial pathways in both sexes, with more pronounced suppression of oxidative phosphorylation and TCA cycle programs in males. Strikingly, only males also exhibited coordinated downregulation of ribosomal programs together with enrichment of synaptic pathways, with high representation of genes regulating glutamate receptor cycling and PSD remodeling, providing a mechanistic framework for the observed synaptic alterations. Pathway-level network inference further supported coupling among mitochondrial, translational, and synaptic programs in males. These findings identify MFN2-dependent mitochondrial integrity in ventral striatal D1-MSNs as a critical determinant of motivational capacity and reveal sex-specific molecular and cellular responses through which mitochondrial dysfunction converges on similar motivational deficits.
title_zh: 腹侧纹状体 D1 神经元中的 Mitofusin-2 通过性别特异性线粒体突触重编程调节基于努力的动机
abstract_zh:
基于努力的动机因人而异，并影响幸福感，但设定动机能力的分子和神经机制仍不完全清楚。线粒体功能正在成为行为的关键调节因子，而线粒体融合蛋白-2 (MFN2) 是线粒体融合和内质网-线粒体耦合的关键介质。在这里，我们询问如何下调
                    MFn2
                    通过整合电生理学、神经元和突触形态、免疫组织化学、线粒体读数、RNA 原位杂交、RiboTag 和行为分析，表达 1 型多巴胺受体的中型多棘神经元 (D1-MSN) 有助于雄性和雌性小鼠基于努力的动机和压力应对。 MFN2 缺陷导致腹侧纹状体 D1-MSN 中树突状线粒体碎片和突触输入重塑，但对背内侧纹状体 D1-MSN 没有细胞影响。尽管 MFN2 缺陷会引起性别依赖性突触和结构改变，但两种性别在动机行为过程中都表现出累积 D1-MSN 的募集减少，以及基于努力的动机和压力应对能力受损。翻译组分析揭示了两性线粒体途径的共同耗竭，而男性的氧化磷酸化和 TCA 循环程序受到更明显的抑制。引人注目的是，只有雄性也表现出核糖体程序的协调下调以及突触通路的富集，其中调节谷氨酸受体循环和 PSD 重塑的基因具有很高的代表性，前提是

title: Divergent philosophical commitments in neuroscience: Evidence from a global survey
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The mind–brain relationship is a foundational yet underexplored dimension of contemporary neuroscience, shaping research framing, data interpretation, and public communication. We conducted a large-scale international survey of 2,657 neuroscientists to assess their views on the mind–brain problem, free will, and the future of the discipline. Our results reveal a complex and sometimes paradoxical worldview. While 64% of participants endorse reductive physicalism—the view that mental activity is fully reducible to brain function—only 17.5% reject free will. Despite estimating that current knowledge covers only a limited portion of brain structure and function (30%), respondents express marked optimism about the future of neuroscience, including the prospect of fully understanding the human being and mental disorders through neuroscience, and even achieving mind reading and mental uploading. A principal component analysis identified five latent dimensions, some of which vary systematically across sociodemographic and disciplinary factors. These findings indicate that neuroscientists hold diverse philosophical commitments that diverge from common narratives of hard determinism. The prevalence of neuroessentialist views further highlights the need for sustained interdisciplinary dialogue to address the conceptual, ethical, and societal implications of neuroscientific progress.
title_zh: 神经科学中不同的哲学承诺：来自全球调查的证据
abstract_zh: 心脑关系是当代神经科学的一个基础但尚未得到充分探索的维度，它塑造了研究框架、数据解释和公共交流。我们对 2,657 名神经科学家进行了大规模的国际调查，以评估他们对心脑问题、自由意志和学科未来的看法。我们的结果揭示了一种复杂且有时自相矛盾的世界观。虽然 64% 的参与者赞同还原物理主义（即心理活动完全可以还原为大脑功能的观点），但只有 17.5% 的人拒绝自由意志。尽管估计目前的知识仅涵盖大脑结构和功能的有限部分（30％），但受访者对神经科学的未来表示明显乐观，包括通过神经科学全面了解人类和精神障碍，甚至实现读心和精神上传的前景。主成分分析确定了五个潜在维度，其中一些维度因社会人口和学科因素而系统地变化。这些发现表明，神经科学家持有不同的哲学承诺，与硬决定论的常见叙述不同。神经本质主义观点的盛行进一步凸显了持续跨学科对话的必要性，以解决神经科学进步的概念、伦理和社会影响。

title: ROS produced in mitochondria entrapped by self-assembly peptide fibers for target therapy of glioma
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Brain glioma is a highly energy-dependent malignant tumor. Sonodynamic therapy (SDT) provides a noninvasive and effective approach for brain glioma therapy. Reactive oxygen species (ROS) from sonosensitizers in the treatment of SDT play a key role. Inspired by spider webs, a self-assembling “spider peptide” (P1) bearing porphyrin moieties was constructed to generate ROS under ultrasound. In glioma cells, P1 forms web-like nanofibers that weave around mitochondria and enables ROS to release in situ. This efficiently disrupts the energy metabolism of mitochondria leading to the inhibition of glioma cells growth. Glioma-derived exosomes loaded with peptide P1 (Evs@P1) exhibit enhanced blood–brain barrier permeability and homotypic targeting to glioma cells. After endocytic uptake, Evs@P1 complexes undergo hydrolysis in the acidic lysosomal environment exposing the mitochondrial-targeting peptide. Ultrasound enhances the rate of peptide self-assembly into nanofibers, which are extruded from the exosomes and weave around the mitochondrial surface. Such an assembly of P1 nanofibers accelerates the ROS generation, which is 3.7 times higher than that in the monomeric state. It indicates an effective method to prevent glioma growth in mice brains in vivo.
title_zh: 自组装肽纤维捕获线粒体中产生的ROS用于神经胶质瘤的靶向治疗
abstract_zh: 脑胶质瘤是一种高度能量依赖的恶性肿瘤。声动力疗法（SDT）为脑胶质瘤治疗提供了一种无创且有效的方法。声敏剂产生的活性氧 (ROS) 在 SDT 治疗中发挥着关键作用。受蜘蛛网的启发，构建了一种带有卟啉部分的自组装“蜘蛛肽”（P1），可在超声波下产生ROS。在神经胶质瘤细胞中，P1 形成网状纳米纤维，围绕线粒体编织，使 ROS 能够原位释放。这有效地破坏了线粒体的能量代谢，从而抑制神经胶质瘤细胞的生长。负载肽 P1 (Evs@P1) 的胶质瘤来源的外泌体表现出增强的血脑屏障通透性和对胶质瘤细胞的同型靶向性。内吞摄取后，Evs@P1 复合物在酸性溶酶体环境中发生水解，暴露线粒体靶向肽。超声波提高了肽自组装成纳米纤维的速率，纳米纤维从外泌体中挤出并编织在线粒体表面周围。 P1纳米纤维的这种组装加速了ROS的产生，比单体状态高3.7倍。这表明了一种在体内预防小鼠脑胶质瘤生长的有效方法。

title: Hydration and hydrolysis define antibiotic resistance conferred by macrolide esterases
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Macrolides are an antibiotic class widely used in both human and veterinary medicine, and function by interfering with protein synthesis. Regrettably, numerous strategies for evading the antibiotic properties of macrolides have been found in bacteria, including enzyme-mediated inactivation. These mechanisms are now widely disseminated among pathogenic, animal-associated, and environmental bacteria making them a One Health issue. Macrolide esterases, which hydrolyze the macrolactone’s ester bond, confer one such resistance mechanism. Two types of macrolide esterases have thus far been identified, the well-studied erythromycin esterases and the recently discovered Est-type enzymes that belong to the α/β-hydrolase superfamily. We present detailed structure–function studies for four diverse Est type esterases: which only share 44 to 66% sequence identity (EstT
                    Sf
                    , EstT
                    St
                    , EstT
                    Bc
                    , and EstX
                    Ec
                    ). In addition to resistance profiling and substrate specificity studies, we present structures for all four enzymes, including structures for EstT
                    Bc
                    and EstX
                    Ec
                    in complex with tylosin and tylvalosin macrolides, posthydrolysis. Complementing the data with mutational and kinetic studies allowed for a detailed analysis of the structural basis for macrolide–enzyme interactions. Combined, the data suggest that promiscuous binding and imprecise positioning, mediated by a water-cage, dictate substrate specificity for Est-type macrolide resistance enzymes. These insights may prove beneficial for next-generation antibiotic development.
