title: Structure and evolution-guided design of minimal RNA-guided nucleases
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: The design of RNA-guided nucleases with properties not limited by evolution can expand programmable genome-editing capabilities. However, generating diverse multidomain proteins with robust enzymatic properties remains challenging. Here, we use a protein design strategy that couples a structure-guided inverse-folding model with evolution-informed residue constraints to generate active, divergent variants of TnpB, a minimal CRISPR-Cas12–like nuclease, termed SynTnpBs. High-throughput screening of artificial intelligence–generated variants yielded editors that retained or exceeded wild-type activity in bacterial, plant, and human cells. Cryo–electron microscopy–based structure determination of the most divergent variant revealed stabilizing contacts in the RNA–DNA interfaces across conformations, demonstrating the design potential of this approach. Together, these results establish a strategy for creating non-natural RNA-guided nucleases and conformationally active nucleic acid binders, enlarging the designable protein space.
title_zh: 最小RNA引导核酸酶的结构和进化引导设计
abstract_zh: 具有不受进化限制的特性的RNA引导核酸酶的设计可以扩展可编程基因组编辑能力。然而，生成具有强大酶学特性的多种多结构域蛋白仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们使用一种蛋白质设计策略，将结构引导的反向折叠模型与进化信息残基约束相结合，以生成 TnpB 的活性、发散变体，TnpB 是一种最小的 CRISPR-Cas12 样核酸酶，称为 SynTnpB。对人工智能生成的变体进行高通量筛选，产生的编辑器在细菌、植物和人类细胞中保留或超过了野生型活性。基于冷冻电子显微镜的最不同变体的结构测定揭示了 RNA-DNA 界面跨构象的稳定接触，证明了这种方法的设计潜力。总之，这些结果建立了一种创建非天然 RNA 引导核酸酶和构象活性核酸结合物的策略，扩大了可设计的蛋白质空间。

title: Drying of the Aral Sea reshapes the anthropogenic carbon inventory of Central Asia
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Lakes store large quantities of carbon in their sediments, contributing to climate regulation. Yet the fate of this carbon after lake desiccation remains unclear. Using a space-for-time substitution approach, combining sediment cores, carbon dioxide flux measurements, and remote sensing, we quantified organic carbon losses from the world’s largest desiccated lake, the Aral Sea. Since 1960, exposed lake bed sediments have released 204 ± 53 teragrams of carbon (Tg C), with vegetation growth offsetting less than 1%. Incorporating these emissions alters the regional carbon budget, transforming the Aral Sea basin from a presumed land-use-change carbon sink into a net source. Reflooding the sea could prevent an additional 165 ± 13 Tg C release, reframing restoration not only as an ecological and humanitarian imperative but also as a climate mitigation opportunity.
title_zh: 咸海干涸重塑了中亚的人为碳库存
abstract_zh: 湖泊的沉积物中储存了大量的碳，有助于气候调节。然而，湖泊干涸后这些碳的去向仍不清楚。我们采用时空替代方法，结合沉积岩芯、二氧化碳通量测量和遥感，量化了世界上最大的干涸湖咸海的有机碳损失。自 1960 年以来，暴露的湖床沉积物已经释放了 204 ± 53 太克碳 (Tg C)，植被生长抵消了不到 1%。将这些排放纳入其中会改变区域碳预算，将咸海盆地从假定的土地利用变化碳汇转变为净源。重新淹没海洋可以防止额外的 165 ± 13 Tg C 释放，将恢复重新定义为不仅是生态和人道主义的当务之急，也是缓解气候变化的机会。

title: Production and spectroscopy of cold radioactive molecules
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Molecules with heavy, radioactive nuclei promise extreme sensitivity to fundamental nuclear and particle physics. However, these nuclei are available in limited quantities, which challenges their use in precision measurements. Here we demonstrate the gas-phase synthesis, cryogenic cooling, and high-resolution laser spectroscopy of radium monohydroxide, monodeuteroxide, and monofluoride molecules (
                    226
                    RaOH,
                    226
                    RaOD, and
                    226
                    RaF) in a tabletop apparatus by combining trace radioactive target production protocols, optically driven chemistry in a cryogenic buffer gas, and low-background spectroscopic detection methods. The molecules are cooled in the lab frame, creating conditions that are the same starting points as those for many current molecular precision measurement and quantum information experiments. This approach can be readily applied to a wide range of species and establishes key capabilities for molecular quantum sensing of exotic nuclei.
title_zh: 冷放射性分子的制备和光谱学
abstract_zh:
具有重放射性原子核的分子对基础核物理和粒子物理具有极高的敏感性。然而，这些原子核的数量有限，这对它们在精确测量中的使用提出了挑战。在这里，我们展示了一氢氧化镭、一氘氧化镭和一氟化物分子的气相合成、低温冷却和高分辨率激光光谱（
                    226
                    拉OH,
                    226
                    拉OD，和
                    226
                    RaF）通过结合痕量放射性目标生产方案、低温缓冲气体中的光学驱动化学和低本底光谱检测方法在桌面设备中进行。分子在实验室框架中冷却，创造的条件与当前许多分子精密测量和量子信息实验的起点相同。这种方法可以很容易地应用于广泛的物种，并建立外来核分子量子传感的关键能力。

title: Surface-dominant transport in Weyl semimetal NbAs nanowires for next-generation interconnects
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Ongoing demands for smaller and more energy-efficient electronic devices necessitate alternative interconnect materials with lower electrical resistivity at reduced dimensions. We report the synthesis of Weyl semimetal niobium arsenide (NbAs) nanowires through thermomechanical nanomolding with single crystallinity and controlled diameters down to 40 nanometers. The resistivity of NbAs nanowires decreases with decreasing diameter, and 40-nanometer-diameter nanowires exhibited a room-temperature resistivity of 10.5 ± 1.9 microhm·centimeters, which is ~70% lower than their bulk counterpart. Calculations attribute this resistivity reduction to surface-dominant conduction with a long carrier lifetime at finite temperatures. Further characterization of nanowires and bulk crystals revealed high breakdown current density, stability, and thermal conductivity. These properties highlight the potential of NbAs nanowires as next-generation interconnects that could surpass the limitations of current copper-based interconnects.
title_zh: 用于下一代互连的 Weyl 半金属 NbAs 纳米线的表面主导传输
abstract_zh: 对更小、更节能的电子设备的持续需求需要具有更低电阻率和更小尺寸的替代互连材料。我们报道了通过热机械纳米成型合成外尔半金属砷化铌 (NbAs) 纳米线，该纳米线具有单晶性和控制直径低至 40 纳米。 NbAs纳米线的电阻率随着直径的减小而降低，40纳米直径的纳米线的室温电阻率为10.5±1.9微欧·厘米，比块状纳米线低约70%。计算将这种电阻率降低归因于表面主导传导，在有限温度下具有较长的载流子寿命。纳米线和块状晶体的进一步表征揭示了高击穿电流密度、稳定性和导热性。这些特性凸显了 NbAs 纳米线作为下一代互连的潜力，可以超越当前铜基互连的限制。

title: Spatiotemporally homogeneous crystallization for ambient scalable perovskite photovoltaics
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Commercializing perovskite solar cells (PSCs) will likely require the scalable deposition of homogeneous perovskite films under ambient conditions. However, the spatially heterogeneous degradation of metastable perovskites during prolonged coating leads to nonuniformity. Here, we demonstrate spatiotemporally homogeneous crystallization of α-phase FAPbI
                    3
                    (where FA is formamidinium) enabled by a phase-locking strategy that establishes a dynamically evolving, moisture-buffering intergranular network during large-area printing. This method prevents the premature degradation caused by ambient humidity, eliminating directional inhomogeneity. Blade-coated PSCs achieved a 26.7% power conversion efficiency (PCE; 26.1% certified), and rigid and flexible 100-square-centimeter modules reached 21.5 and 19.5%, respectively. Improved morphological homogeneity mitigated localized degradation and suppressed self-amplifying aging pathways. Encapsulated devices retained more than 90% of their initial PCE after 1500 hours of 85°C maximum power point tracking in ambient air.
title_zh: 环境可扩展钙钛矿光伏电池的时空均匀结晶
abstract_zh:
钙钛矿太阳能电池（PSC）的商业化可能需要在环境条件下大规模沉积均质钙钛矿薄膜。然而，亚稳态钙钛矿在长时间涂覆过程中的空间异质降解导致不均匀性。在这里，我们证明了 α 相 FAPbI 的时空均匀结晶
                    3
                    （其中 FA 是甲脒）通过锁相策略实现，该策略在大面积打印过程中建立动态演变的水分缓冲颗粒间网络。这种方法可以防止环境湿度引起的过早降解，消除方向不均匀性。刀片涂层PSC实现了26.7%的功率转换效率（PCE；认证为26.1%），刚性和柔性100平方厘米组件分别达到21.5%和19.5%。改善的形态均匀性减轻了局部降解并抑制了自我放大的老化途径。在环境空气中进行 85°C 最大功率点跟踪 1500 小时后，封装器件仍保留了 90% 以上的初始 PCE。

title: Bringing radioactive molecules to the table
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: A compact source of radioactive molecules could enable new tests of fundamental physics
title_zh: 将放射性分子带到餐桌上
abstract_zh: 紧凑的放射性分子源可以实现基础物理的新测试

title: Performance trade-offs define a fundamental dental dichotomy in mammals
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Teeth define mammalian evolution, and one of many adaptive dental breakthroughs in crown mammals is the tribosphenic molar: a tooth with a dual shearing-crushing function, often considered a key adaptation in crown mammals. However, we do not know how potential trade-offs between these antagonistic functions may influence the macroevolutionary outcomes of mammalian lineages. Here, we show that predatory mammals evolved dichotomized performance in their tribosphenic carnassial teeth, with slicing constrained to a narrow set of optimal phenotypes and crushing exhibiting redundant solutions. Less than 1% of predators evolved optimized shearing and crushing. The fundamental trade-off in functions of the tribosphenic architecture promoted divergent macroevolutionary specializations rather than functional duality. These results highlight how key innovations can drive early evolutionary success while simultaneously constraining subsequent diversification.
title_zh: 性能权衡定义了哺乳动物的基本牙齿二分法
abstract_zh: 牙齿定义了哺乳动物的进化，冠部哺乳动物的许多适应性牙齿突破之一是三蝶臼齿：一种具有双重剪切-破碎功能的牙齿，通常被认为是冠部哺乳动物的关键适应。然而，我们不知道这些拮抗功能之间的潜在权衡如何影响哺乳动物谱系的宏观进化结果。在这里，我们表明，掠食性哺乳动物在其三翼食肉牙齿中进化出二分性能，切片仅限于一组狭窄的最佳表型，而压碎则表现出冗余解决方案。不到 1% 的掠食者进化出了优化的剪切和破碎能力。三翼结构功能的基本权衡促进了不同的宏观进化专业化，而不是功能二元性。这些结果凸显了关键创新如何推动早期进化成功，同时限制随后的多元化。

title: Expression of Concern for Raghuvanshi et al., Mycobacterium tuberculosis evades host immunity by recruiting mesenchymal stem cells

title: Cyclic sealing and drainage on an oceanic transform fault
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Oceanic transform faults have been considered conservative, shear-dominated boundaries, yet their proximity to magmatic systems implies fluid involvement. In this work, we discovered tidally modulated tremor at the Gofar transform fault along the East Pacific Rise. Tremor amplitude correlates with semidiurnal tides during periods of sparse seismicity and low in situ compressional to shear wave velocity ratio (
                    V
                    p/
                    V
                    s), but this correlation weakens following earthquake swarms accompanied by high
                    V
                    p/
                    V
                    s. We propose a valve-like sealing-drainage dynamic process where sealing traps volatiles and boosts tidal sensitivity, sustaining tremor activity until rupture opens high porosity and permeability pathways, which silences tremors, triggers microseismicity, and resets the system through hydrothermal resealing. Thus, transform faults are likely permeable and tide critical, with energy release oscillating between tremors and rupture, paced by magmatic volatile supply and healing.
title_zh: 大洋转换断层的循环封闭与排水
abstract_zh:
大洋转换断层被认为是保守的、剪切主导的边界，但它们靠近岩浆系统意味着流体参与。在这项工作中，我们在东太平洋海隆沿线的戈法尔转换断层发现了潮汐调制震颤。在稀疏地震活动和低现场压缩波与剪切波速度比期间，震颤幅度与半日潮汐相关（
                    V
                    p/
                    V
                    s），但这种相关性在地震群伴随着高
                    V
                    p/
                    V
                    s。我们提出了一种类似阀门的密封排水动态过程，其中密封捕获挥发物并提高潮汐敏感性，维持震动活动，直到破裂打开高孔隙度和渗透率通道，从而消除震动，触发微震，并通过热液重新密封重置系统。因此，转换断层可能具有渗透性和潮汐临界性，能量释放在震动和破裂之间振荡，并随着岩浆挥发性供应和愈合而变化。

title: Cross-cohort analysis of expression and splicing quantitative trait loci in TOPMed
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Most genetic variants associated with complex traits are hypothesized to regulate gene expression. To understand the genetics underlying gene expression variability, we characterized 14,324 RNA-sequencing samples from the Trans-Omics for Precision Medicine program and performed expression and splicing quantitative trait locus (e/sQTL) analyses in six tissues and cell types, including whole blood (
                    n
                    = 6454) and lung (
                    n
                    = 1291). We detected tens of thousands of secondary cis-e/sQTLs, showing that secondary cis-e/sQTL discovery remains unsaturated. We fine-mapped UK Biobank–derived genome-wide association study (GWAS) signals from 164 traits and identified e/sQTL colocalizations for 10,611 GWAS signals, including 7096 that colocalize with secondary e/sQTLs. Our results suggest that even larger e/sQTL analyses will uncover additional secondary e/sQTLs, further benefiting GWAS interpretation.
title_zh: TOPMed 中表达和剪接数量性状位点的跨队列分析
abstract_zh:
大多数与复杂性状相关的遗传变异被假设为调节基因表达。为了了解基因表达变异性背后的遗传学原理，我们对来自 Trans-Omics for Precision Medicine 项目的 14,324 个 RNA 测序样本进行了表征，并对六种组织和细胞类型（包括全血）进行了表达和剪接数量性状位点 (e/sQTL) 分析。
                    n
                    = 6454）和肺（
                    n
                    = 1291）。我们检测到了数以万计的次级 cis-e/sQTL，表明次级 cis-e/sQTL 的发现仍然不饱和。我们对来自英国生物银行的 164 个性状的全基因组关联研究 (GWAS) 信号进行了精细绘图，并确定了 10,611 个 GWAS 信号的 e/sQTL 共定位，其中包括 7096 个与次级 e/sQTL 共定位的信号。我们的结果表明，更大规模的 e/sQTL 分析将发现更多的次级 e/sQTL，进一步有利于 GWAS 解释。

title: Direct interaction of Vδ7 TCRs with IL17RA drives the differentiation of TH1-like γδT cells
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Of the three classes of lymphocytes that constitute the adaptive immune system, γδT cells are the only class for which the principles of antigen recognition remain enigmatic. Although endogenous γδT cell antigen receptor (γδTCR) ligands are thought to regulate γδT cell development, their identities are largely elusive. Here, we identified the interleukin 17 receptor A chain (IL17RA) as a γδTCR ligand that drove the differentiation of Vδ7
                    +
                    γδT cells with a T helper 1 (T
                    H
                    1)–like effector program in mice. IL17RA promoted this differentiation through an interaction involving germline-encoded regions of the Vδ7 chain, enabling the selection of cells with a diverse CDR3 repertoire and thus acting as a nonclonotypic γδTCR ligand. Together with the nonclonotypic mode of γδTCR engagement by butyrophilins, these results suggest that such interactions represent a general biological mechanism shaping the γδT cell compartment.
title_zh: Vδ7 TCR 与 IL17RA 的直接相互作用驱动 TH1 样 γδT 细胞的分化
abstract_zh:
在构成适应性免疫系统的三类淋巴细胞中，γδT 细胞是唯一一类抗原识别原理仍然神秘的细胞。尽管内源性 γδT 细胞抗原受体 (γδTCR) 配体被认为可以调节 γδT 细胞发育，但它们的身份很大程度上难以捉摸。在这里，我们确定了白细胞介素 17 受体 A 链 (IL17RA) 作为 γδTCR 配体，驱动 Vδ7 的分化
                    +
                    具有 T 辅助细胞 1 (T
                    H
                    1）类似小鼠的效应程序。 IL17RA 通过涉及 Vδ7 链种系编码区域的相互作用促进这种分化，从而能够选择具有多种 CDR3 库的细胞，从而充当非克隆型 γδTCR 配体。连同嗜丁酸蛋白与 γδTCR 结合的非克隆型模式，这些结果表明这种相互作用代表了塑造 γδT 细胞区室的一般生物学机制。

title: A transcriptional biosensor reveals mechanisms of α-ketoglutarate signaling to chromatin
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: The metabolite α-ketoglutarate (αKG) is required for chromatin demethylation, but mechanisms that control αKG abundance in the nucleus are poorly defined. We designed a biosensor to monitor this metabolite pool in human cells using an αKG-responsive cyanobacterial transcription factor, NtcA, and used it to identify genes that regulate αKG in the nucleus. We defined an interorganelle pathway in which sequential mitochondrial activities of glutamic-pyruvic transaminase 2 (GPT2) and the SLC25A11 transporter supply nuclear αKG. In a mouse model of GPT2 deficiency, an inborn error of metabolism, Gpt2 loss caused histone hypermethylation in the brain and dysregulated neurodevelopmental genes. Restoring αKG counteracted these changes and promoted mouse fitness. Our work provides a tool to directly monitor nuclear αKG and reveals nuclear αKG depletion as a key pathogenic mechanism underlying GPT2 deficiency.
title_zh: 转录生物传感器揭示了 α-酮戊二酸信号传导至染色质的机制
abstract_zh: 染色质去甲基化需要代谢物 α-酮戊二酸 (αKG)，但控制细胞核中 αKG 丰度的机制尚不清楚。我们设计了一种生物传感器，使用 αKG 响应的蓝藻转录因子 NtcA 来监测人体细胞中的代谢物池，并用它来识别细胞核中调节 αKG 的基因。我们定义了一条细胞器间途径，其中谷氨酸-丙酮酸转氨酶 2 (GPT2) 和 SLC25A11 转运蛋白的连续线粒体活性提供核 αKG。在 GPT2 缺乏症（一种先天性代谢缺陷）的小鼠模型中，GPT2 缺失导致大脑中组蛋白高甲基化和神经发育基因失调。恢复 αKG 可以抵消这些变化并促进小鼠的健康。我们的工作提供了一种直接监测核 αKG 的工具，并揭示了核 αKG 耗竭是 GPT2 缺陷的关键致病机制。

title: IVT-free, chemically synthesized protein-encoding RNA oligonucleotides for rapid production of personalized cancer vaccines
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Personalized mRNA neoantigen vaccines demonstrate great potential in cancer therapy, but their customization typically requires more than three months, risking the loss of the optimal therapeutic window for patients. This delay is primarily due to the reliance of current mRNA vaccine production on plasmid fermentation and in vitro transcription (IVT), which involve multiple complex steps. Chemically synthesized RNA oligonucleotides, such as antisense oligonucleotides (ASOs), are produced sparing DNA templates or IVT, thus enabling rapid manufacturing. However, ASOs are limited in length, which precludes their ability to encode proteins. Here, we introduced a 39 nucleotides cap-independent translation enhancer (CITE) element termed BBV that can drive RNA translation. Furthermore, BBV was compatible with efficient rolling circle translation (RCT). We chemically synthesized RNA oligonucleotides containing BBV and gene of interest (GOI) with characteristic 5’-OH and 3’-P termini, which could undergo circularization by endogenous RtcB RNA ligases and efficiently encode proteins through RCT in mammalian cells. We designated these RNA oligonucleotides as Protein-Encoding RNA Oligonucleotides (PEOs). Notably, compared with IVT-produced RNAs, PEOs contained undetectable levels of proinflammatory double-stranded RNAs and exhibited minimal immunogenicity. We further demonstrated that PEO-OVA (encoding OVA antigens) significantly inhibited tumor growth comparable to mRNA vaccine. In an orthotopic glioma model, PEO vaccine also exhibited therapeutic benefits with checkpoint blockade therapy. This study establishes an IVT-free RNA vaccine platform that enables rapid, safe, and highly druggable manufacturing of personalized cancer vaccines, offering substantial potential for clinical application.
title_zh: 无需 IVT、化学合成的蛋白质编码 RNA 寡核苷酸，用于快速生产个性化癌症疫苗
abstract_zh: 个性化 mRNA 新抗原疫苗在癌症治疗中展现出巨大潜力，但其定制通常需要三个月以上的时间，存在患者失去最佳治疗窗口的风险。这种延迟主要是由于当前 mRNA 疫苗生产依赖于质粒发酵和体外转录 (IVT)，其中涉及多个复杂步骤。化学合成的 RNA 寡核苷酸，例如反义寡核苷酸 (ASO)，在生产时无需使用 DNA 模板或 IVT，从而实现快速生产。然而，ASO 的长度有限，这妨碍了它们编码蛋白质的能力。在这里，我们引入了一个 39 个核苷酸的帽独立翻译增强子 (CITE) 元件，称为 BBV，可以驱动 RNA 翻译。此外，BBV 与高效的滚环平移 (RCT) 兼容。我们化学合成了含有 BBV 和目的基因 (GOI) 的 RNA 寡核苷酸，具有特征性 5'-OH 和 3'-P 末端，可以通过内源性 RtcB RNA 连接酶进行环化，并在哺乳动物细胞中通过 RCT 有效编码蛋白质。我们将这些 RNA 寡核苷酸命名为蛋白质编码 RNA 寡核苷酸 (PEO)。值得注意的是，与 IVT 产生的 RNA 相比，PEO 含有不可检测水平的促炎双链 RNA，并且表现出最小的免疫原性。我们进一步证明，与 mRNA 疫苗相比，PEO-OVA（编码 OVA 抗原）可显着抑制肿瘤生长。在原位神经胶质瘤模型中，PEO 疫苗还通过检查点阻断表现出治疗益处

title: IL-7–glucose–Aiolos axis orchestrates pathogenic CD8+ T cell function in spondyloarthritis
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
CD8

                    Aiolos

                    +
                    T cells were enriched in inflamed joints, where CXCL10 may contribute to their recruitment. Increased FDG uptake in inflamed sacroiliac joints further supports enhanced metabolic activity at sites of inflammation. JAK inhibitor therapy was associated with reduced GLUT1 expression and increased Aiolos expression in CD8
                    +
                    T cells, accompanied by decreased effector cytokine production and clinical improvement in patients with spondyloarthritis. Together, these findings support a model in which cytokine signaling, metabolic state, and transcriptional regulation are functionally linked in human CD8
                    +
                    T cells, and suggest that Aiolos may act as a regulatory node integrating these inputs in inflammatory diseases.

title: Virtual ultrasound machine operating in a GHz to MHz frequency range for particle-based biomedical simulations
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Ultrasound–matter interactions underpin numerous biomedical and soft-matter applications, yet simulating these phenomena is challenging due to the large separation of viscous and sonic time scales. Continuum methods capture large-scale wave propagation but cannot resolve microscale interactions, while particle-based approaches offer molecular resolution but struggle with efficiency and stability at larger scales. We introduce a particle-based virtual ultrasound machine that uses a smoothed dissipative particle dynamics variant with an implicit pressure solver and a negative-pressure stabilization scheme, required to mimic acoustic propagation across medically relevant MHz–GHz frequencies. We demonstrate its capabilities by modeling the acoustophoresis of encapsulated microbubbles, a key mechanism in ultrasound-mediated drug delivery. Beyond this application, the approach establishes a generalizable platform for simulating wave–matter interactions in soft and biological materials, opening promising directions for computational studies of acoustics-driven phenomena in science and engineering.
title_zh: 在 GHz 至 MHz 频率范围内运行的虚拟超声机，用于基于粒子的生物医学模拟
abstract_zh: 超声波与物质的相互作用支撑着众多生物医学和软物质应用，但由于粘性和声波时间尺度的巨大分离，模拟这些现象具有挑战性。连续体方法捕获大规模波传播，但无法解决微观相互作用，而基于粒子的方法提供分子分辨率，但在更大尺度上难以提高效率和稳定性。我们引入了一种基于粒子的虚拟超声机，它使用平滑耗散粒子动力学变体以及隐式压力求解器和负压稳定方案，需要模拟医学相关 MHz-GHz 频率的声学传播。我们通过模拟封装微泡的声泳来展示其功能，这是超声介导的药物输送的关键机制。除了这一应用之外，该方法还建立了一个通用平台，用于模拟软材料和生物材料中的波与物质相互作用，为科学和工程中声学驱动现象的计算研究开辟了有希望的方向。

title: Tracing the origins of St Helena’s liberated Africans
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
In the mid-19th century, St Helena became a key receiving point for Africans “liberated” from illegal slave ships by the British Royal Navy. Of the ~27,000 landed, ~8000 died soon after arrival and were buried locally. In connection with a broader community-led commemorative effort, we analyzed tooth enamel strontium isotope (
                    87
                    Sr/
                    86
                    Sr) data for 152 individuals, including high-resolution intratooth profiles, to identify likely origins and infer forced movements before embarkation. Isoscape-based probabilistic assignment, integrated with historical evidence and published ancient DNA data, constrains homelands ranging from coastal Central Africa to far inland areas, revealing long-distance movements, sometimes beginning in childhood. By refining provenance, these data informed local decisions about care and potential repatriation, highlighting the complexities of return and ultimately supporting reburial on St Helena.
title_zh: 追踪圣赫勒拿岛解放非洲人的起源
abstract_zh:
19 世纪中叶，圣赫勒拿岛成为英国皇家海军从非法奴隶船上“解放”出来的非洲人的重要接收点。在约 27,000 名登陆者中，约 8000 人在抵达后不久就死亡并被埋葬在当地。结合更广泛的社区主导的纪念活动，我们分析了牙釉质锶同位素（
                    87
                    锶/
                    86
                    Sr) 152 个人的数据，包括高分辨率的牙内轮廓，用于识别可能的起源并推断登船前的强迫运动。基于等景观的概率分配，结合历史证据和已发表的古代 DNA 数据，限制了从中非沿海到遥远内陆地区的家园，揭示了长距离运动，有时从童年开始。通过细化出处，这些数据为当地有关护理和潜在遣返的决策提供了信息，突出了返回的复杂性，并最终支持在圣赫勒拿岛重新埋葬。

title: Chromatin end–anchored chromosome-sized domains and promoter loops organize a transcriptionally active genome in Tetrahymena
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Three-dimensional (3D) genome architecture shapes gene regulation, yet the folding principles of compact unicellular genomes remain unclear. Among unicellular eukaryotes, the ciliate
                    Tetrahymena thermophila
                    provides a distinctive model, harboring a transcriptionally active somatic macronucleus (MAC) with a genome fragmented into gene-dense minichromosomes and a silent, intact germline micronucleus. To delineate macronuclear chromatin organization, we integrated nucleosome-resolution Micro-C, ATAC-seq, and RNA-seq across the
                    Tetrahymena
                    life cycle. We find that macronuclear chromosomes form chromosome-sized interaction domains rather than canonical A/B compartments or internal TAD-like hierarchical structures. Each macronuclear chromosome behaves as a telomere-bounded structural unit organized by two major features: Highly accessible telomere-capped ends form stable end–end interaction hubs, and promoter-proximal open chromatin sites anchor long-range internal promoter-centered loops whose strength correlates with transcriptional activity. During conjugation, the sexual life cycle of
                    Tetrahymena
                    , long-range internal loops, and promoter–promoter contacts are transiently diminished and subsequently restored in later conjugation stages, whereas chromosome end–end contacts remain relatively stable. A similar architecture is observed in the related ciliate
                    Tetrahymena pyriformis
                    , indicating conservation within the genus. Together, our results define a compact, end-anchored, and promoter-centric genome-folding strategy that organizes a fragmented, gene-dense, transcriptionally active genome without the canonical compartment/TAD hierarchy seen in metazoan genomes. These findings expand the known repertoire of eukaryotic 3D genome architectures and suggest that promoter-associated transcription hubs can evolve independently in divergent eukaryotic lineages.
title_zh: 染色质末端锚定的染色体大小的结构域和启动子环在四膜虫中组织转录活性基因组
abstract_zh:
三维（3D）基因组结构决定了基因调控，但紧凑单细胞基因组的折叠原理仍不清楚。在单细胞真核生物中，纤毛虫
                    嗜热四膜虫
                    提供了一个独特的模型，包含转录活性体细胞大核（MAC），其基因组片段化为基因密集的微型染色体和沉默的完整种系微核。为了描绘大核染色质组织，我们整合了核小体分辨率 Micro-C、ATAC-seq 和 RNA-seq
                    四膜虫
                    生命周期。我们发现大核染色体形成染色体大小的相互作用域，而不是典型的 A/B 区室或内部类似 TAD 的层次结构。每个大核染色体表现为端粒限制的结构单元，由两个主要特征组织：高度可及的端粒加帽末端形成稳定的端-端相互作用中心，启动子近端开放染色质位点锚定远程内部启动子中心环，其强度与转录活性相关。在接合过程中，性生命周期
                    四膜虫
                    、长程内部环和启动子-启动子接触短暂减少，随后在接合后期恢复，而染色体末端-末端接触保持相对稳定。在相关的纤毛虫中观察到类似的结构
                    梨形四膜虫
                    ，表明属内的保护。

title_zh: 压力引起的饮水缓解焦虑的神经回路
abstract_zh:
喝水是哺乳动物在承受压力后的快速本能行为。这种压力引起的饮水行为的作用及其神经机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们确定了两个顺序激活的神经回路，分别介导压力引起的饮酒行为和奖励编码，共同促进小鼠焦虑样行为的消失。具体来说，轻微的短期压力会诱发类似焦虑的行为，并激活内侧前额皮质（mPFC）中的谷氨酸能神经元
                    谷氨酸
                    ）投射到正中视前核（MnPO
                    谷氨酸
                    ），从而驱动小鼠的饮酒行为。这种饮酒行为随后会激活 MnPO 中的 GABA 能神经元（MnPO
                    氨基丁酸
                    ），然后抑制腹侧被盖区（VTA
                    氨基丁酸
                    ），导致奖赏编码多巴胺能 VTA 神经元（VTA
                    DA
                    ），最终调解压力引起的焦虑样行为的消失。本研究定义了饮酒行为缓解焦虑作用背后的皮质-下丘脑-中脑连接，为先天压力应对策略提供了回路基础。

title: Environmental phylogenetics supports a steady diversification of crown eukaryotes starting from the mid-Proterozoic
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Molecular clock and preservation of early microfossil assemblages suggest that eukaryotes were present and already diverse more than ~1600 million years ago (Ma). Yet, the earliest identifiable eukaryotic crown group fossil only appeared around 1050 Ma, leaving a ~600 My gap in the Mesoproterozoic during which the evolution and diversification of early eukaryotes remain poorly understood. Here, we infer a timeline of eukaryote evolution using molecular clock and birth–death diversification models, including the large diversity of environmental sequences to take into account the uncultured majority of microbial life. Our analyses, based on a unique dataset of 75,975 nonredundant Operational Taxonomic Units and 77 well-supported fossil calibrations, indicate a steady diversification of crown group eukaryotes during the Proterozoic after the Last Eukaryotic Common Ancestor. We show that Archaeplastida was one of the earliest diversifying supergroups and the most diverse throughout the Proterozoic, suggesting that the first successful plastid endosymbiosis gave Archaeplastida a measurable evolutionary advantage. Discoba, Amoebozoa, and Rhizaria followed Archaeplastida in phylogenetic diversity throughout the Proterozoic, indicating that crown eukaryotes were already thriving in this Era. These results contrast with the common view that the geologically stable Proterozoic Era experienced little eukaryotic evolutionary innovation and indicate that all current supergroups were already established in the Mesoproterozoic.
title_zh: 环境系统发育学支持冠真核生物从中元古代开始的稳定多样化
abstract_zh: 分子钟和早期微化石组合的保存表明真核生物在大约 16 亿年前就已经存在并且已经多样化 (Ma)。然而，最早可识别的真核冠群化石仅在1050 Ma左右出现，在中元古代留下了约600 My的空白，在此期间早期真核生物的进化和多样化仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们使用分子钟和生死多样化模型推断真核生物进化的时间表，包括环境序列的巨大多样性，以考虑到大多数未经培养的微生物生命。我们的分析基于 75,975 个非冗余操作分类单位和 77 个得到充分支持的化石校准的独特数据集，表明在最后的真核共同祖先之后的元古代期间，冠群真核生物出现了稳定的多样化。我们表明，古质体是最早多样化的超类群之一，也是整个元古代最多样化的，这表明第一个成功的质体内共生给古质体带来了可测量的进化优势。在整个元古代，Discoba、Amoebozoa 和 Rhizaria 在系统发育多样性方面紧随古质体，表明冠真核生物在这个时代已经蓬勃发展。这些结果与人们普遍认为地质稳定的元古代几乎没有经历真核进化创新的观点形成鲜明对比，并表明当前所有的超群都已经在中元古代建立了。

title: Dendritic cells control tertiary lymphoid structure development and maintenance in cancer
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Tertiary lymphoid structures (TLSs) are associated with immunotherapy response, yet the mechanisms controlling their formation and maintenance remain unclear. Using spatial transcriptomics and multiplex imaging across human tumors, we found that CCR7
                    +
                    mature dendritic cells (DCs) accumulate in TLSs. In a mouse non–small cell lung cancer model that forms mature TLSs, we show that early TLS development requires interferon-γ (IFN-γ)–driven type 1 conventional dendritic cell (cDC1) maturation, migration to tumor-draining lymph nodes (tdLNs), and T cell recruitment. As tumors progress, TLSs persist independently of tdLN T cell egress, coinciding with cDC1 accumulation within intratumoral CCL19 stromal hubs. There, cDC1–major histocompatibility complex class 1 (MHC-I) and –MHC-II concomitant antigen presentation, along with CD40 signaling, sustain TLS, T follicular helper (T
                    FH
                    ) cell pool, germinal centers, and tumor-specific immunoglobulin G (IgG). These findings highlight local mature cDC1s as key TLS orchestrators and potential targets to enhance antitumor TLS function.
title_zh: 树突状细胞控制癌症中三级淋巴结构的发育和维持
abstract_zh:
三级淋巴结构（TLS）与免疫治疗反应相关，但控制其形成和维持的机制仍不清楚。通过对人类肿瘤进行空间转录组学和多重成像，我们发现 CCR7
                    +
                    成熟的树突状细胞 (DC) 在 TLS 中积累。在形成成熟 TLS 的小鼠非小细胞肺癌模型中，我们发现早期 TLS 的发育需要干扰素 γ (IFN-γ) 驱动的 1 型常规树突状细胞 (cDC1) 成熟、迁移到肿瘤引流淋巴结 (tdLN) 和 T 细胞招募。随着肿瘤的进展，TLS 独立于 tdLN T 细胞的排出而持续存在，与肿瘤内 CCL19 基质中心内的 cDC1 积累一致。在那里，cDC1-主要组织相容性复合物 1 类 (MHC-I) 和 -MHC-II 伴随抗原呈递，以及 CD40 信号传导，维持 TLS、T 滤泡辅助细胞 (T
                    跳频
                    ) 细胞库、生发中心和肿瘤特异性免疫球蛋白 G (IgG)。这些发现强调了本地成熟的 cDC1 作为关键 TLS 协调器和增强抗肿瘤 TLS 功能的潜在目标。

title: Whistleblowers can contain the unethical externalities of human–AI delegation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Prior work using controlled principal-agent experiments suggests two risks from delegating tasks to AI systems: Human principals are more likely to request profit-maximizing misconduct from AI agents than from human agents, and AI agents are more likely to comply. Here we test whether third-party observers can contain the resulting harm. In an incentivized die-reporting paradigm, principals instructed either a human or an AI agent how strongly to prioritize profit over accuracy, creating potential financial harm to a charity. We first confirm, with human principals (
                    N
                    = 600) and three large language models as AI agents, that delegation to AI produces larger negative externalities than delegation to humans. We then study observers who could pay a personal cost to flag a principal’s instruction, canceling the principal’s gain in favor of the charity, as a laboratory analogue of whistleblowing. In this observer study (
                    N
                    = 300), the probability of flagging increased with how unethical the principal’s request was, but did not depend on whether the request was directed to a human or an AI agent. Because principals made more unethical requests under AI delegation, flagging was more frequent under AI delegation. When combined with agent behavior, this increase in flagging fully neutralized the negative externalities of AI delegation in our experimental setting. These findings support institutional protections for whistleblowers as one potential organizational safeguard against the harms of human–AI delegation.
title_zh: 举报人可以遏制人类与人工智能授权的不道德外部性
abstract_zh:
先前使用受控委托代理实验的研究表明，将任务委托给人工智能系统存在两个风险：与人类代理相比，人类委托人更有可能要求人工智能代理做出利润最大化的不当行为，而人工智能代理更有可能遵守。在这里，我们测试第三方观察者是否可以遏制由此产生的危害。在激励性死亡报告范式中，负责人指示人类或人工智能代理如何强烈地优先考虑利润而不是准确性，从而对慈善机构造成潜在的财务损失。我们首先确认，与人类原则（
                    氮
                    = 600）和三个大型语言模型作为人工智能代理，委托给人工智能比委托给人类产生更大的负外部性。然后，我们研究观察者，他们可以支付个人费用来标记校长的指示，从而取消校长为慈善机构带来的收益，就像实验室中的举报一样。在这项观察者研究中（
                    氮
                    = 300），举报的概率随着委托人请求的不道德程度而增加，但并不取决于请求是针对人类还是人工智能代理。由于校长在人工智能授权下提出了更多不道德的要求，因此在人工智能授权下举报更加频繁。当与代理行为相结合时，标记的增加完全抵消了我们实验环境中人工智能委托的负面外部性。这些发现支持对举报人的制度保护，作为防止人类人工智能危害的一种潜在组织保障措施。

title: A human-specific long noncoding RNA regulator of antigen-presenting cell viability and antimicrobial defense
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Macrophages are essential for both, to clear pathogens and preserve tissue homeostasis, yet the molecular regulators of this equilibrium remain incompletely defined. Here, we identify SAILR (survival associated immune-regulatory RNA), a primate-specific long noncoding RNA (lncRNA), as a critical modulator of macrophage viability under infection conditions. SAILR is induced during monocyte-to-macrophage differentiation, but rapidly downregulated upon bacterial challenge in a nuclear factor kappa B (NF-κB) dependent manner. In both naïve and immune-activated macrophages, SAILR dampens the expression of adhesion, phagocytosis, and invasion factors, which include SIGLEC1 and MMP7. During infection with
                    
                      Salmonella
                    
                    Typhimurium, depletion of SAILR sensitizes macrophages to apoptosis, resulting in loss of intracellular replication niches and reduced bacterial recovery. Conversely, enforced SAILR expression promotes macrophage survival and increases intracellular pathogen burden. Mechanistically, SAILR interacts with the antiapoptotic adaptor protein 14-3-3β to support macrophage survival. Notably, downregulation of SAILR is mirrored in circulating immune cells from patients with severe COVID-19 and sepsis. Together, our findings position SAILR as a central regulator in linking macrophage survival to host–pathogen interaction and disease pathophysiology.
title_zh: 人类特异性长非编码 RNA 调节抗原呈递细胞活力和抗菌防御
abstract_zh:
巨噬细胞对于清除病原体和保持组织稳态都至关重要，但这种平衡的分子调节因子仍未完全确定。在这里，我们确定了 SAILR（生存相关免疫调节 RNA），一种灵长类特异性长非编码 RNA (lncRNA)，作为感染条件下巨噬细胞活力的关键调节剂。 SAILR 在单核细胞向巨噬细胞分化过程中被诱导，但在细菌攻击后以核因子 kappa B (NF-κB) 依赖性方式迅速下调。在幼稚巨噬细胞和免疫激活巨噬细胞中，SAILR 都会抑制粘附、吞噬和侵袭因子（包括 SIGLEC1 和 MMP7）的表达。感染期间
                    
                      沙门氏菌
                    
                    在鼠伤寒杆菌中，SAILR 的消耗会使巨噬细胞对细胞凋亡敏感，导致细胞内复制生态位丧失并减少细菌回收率。相反，强制 SAILR 表达可促进巨噬细胞存活并增加细胞内病原体负担。从机制上讲，SAILR 与抗凋亡衔接蛋白 14-3-3β 相互作用以支持巨噬细胞存活。值得注意的是，SAILR 的下调反映在重症 COVID-19 和脓毒症患者的循环免疫细胞中。总之，我们的研究结果将 SAILR 定位为将巨噬细胞存活与宿主-病原体相互作用和疾病病理生理学联系起来的中央调节器。

title: Productivity gains and work conditions in coercive labor markets: Experimental evidence from the Bangladesh brick sector
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Productivity growth in competitive labor markets can improve worker welfare over time through higher wages or better conditions, but it is unclear if productivity gains benefit workers in coercive labor markets (where force or threats shape employment). We examine this issue in the Bangladesh brick sector using a randomized trial that introduced a more efficient production method. Despite large productivity improvements, we find no reduction in (high) rates of labor trafficking or child labor. These findings suggest that in the short-term, productivity growth alone may be insufficient to improve work conditions in coercive settings.
title_zh: 强制性劳动力市场的生产率提高和工作条件：来自孟加拉国砖业部门的实验证据
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移，竞争性劳动力市场的生产率增长可以通过提高工资或改善条件来改善工人福利，但尚不清楚生产率的提高是否有利于强制劳动力市场（强制或威胁塑造就业）中的工人。我们通过随机试验研究了孟加拉国砖行业的这个问题，该试验引入了更有效的生产方法。尽管生产率大幅提高，但我们发现劳动力贩运或童工的（高）比率并没有减少。这些发现表明，在短期内，仅靠生产率增长可能不足以改善强制性环境中的工作条件。

title: Rapidly evolving composition of nebular infall recorded by magnesium isotopes in refractory inclusions
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The
                    26
                    Al-
                    26
                    Mg systematics in calcium–aluminum-rich inclusions (CAIs)—the oldest known Solar System solids—has traditionally been used to provide high-resolution temporal constraints on the early Solar System evolution. More recently, the study of variations in the initial Mg isotope composition has emerged as a means to probe for potential compositional heterogeneity in the nascent solar nebula. Here, we report high-precision magnesium isotope data for a collection of 19 CAIs that captures the diversity of refractory inclusions. The data reveal widespread Mg isotope heterogeneity prior to
                    26
                    Al decay, covering a large range from −0.285 to +0.088‰. Combined with literature data, the distribution of Mg isotope heterogeneity in CAIs forms a continuum and no longer defines distinct populations. Our findings therefore suggest a continuous CAI formation process that captured a rapid temporal change in the composition of infalling material from the parental molecular cloud of the Solar System.

title: N-(3-methylbutyl)acetamide mediates male–male courtship in Bactrocera dorsalis through behavioral threshold modulation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Male–male courtship, observed across diverse taxa, is often regarded as an evolutionary paradox. Here, we address this paradox by demonstrating that such behavior in the globally invasive pest
                    Bactrocera dorsalis
                    arises as a byproduct of a context-dependent shift in the mating filter. We identify
                    N
                    -(3-methylbutyl)acetamide (MBA) as a critical signal that accumulates under high male density and female scarcity. At a threshold amount (~ 1,800 ng), MBA broadens the male’s mating filter, lowering the acceptance threshold for potential partners, thereby elevating courtship motivation and inducing hyperactivity. This broadened filter enables males to court suboptimal but potentially available females (e.g., mated or older individuals) that would otherwise be ignored, while also incidentally triggering male–male courtship. This behavioral shift is rapidly reversible upon encounter with virgin and young females, preserving an innate preference for these optimal partners. By identifying MBA as a chemical signal of mate unavailability, we reinterpret male–male courtship as a neutral byproduct of an adjustment of the mating filter under female scarcity, a trade-off between maximizing mating opportunities and accepting the incidental cost of misdirected courtship. This work bridges behavioral ecology with physiology, offering a mechanistic framework for how social environments dynamically reshape mate acceptance thresholds.

                    橘小实蝇

                    氮
                    -(3-甲基丁基)乙酰胺（MBA）是在雄性密度高和雌性稀缺的情况下积累的关键信号。在阈值量（约 1,800 ng）下，MBA 拓宽了雄性的交配过滤器，降低了对潜在伴侣的接受阈值，从而提高了求爱动机并诱发多动症。这种扩大的过滤器使雄性能够向次优但可能可用的雌性（例如，已交配的或年长的个体）求爱，否则这些雌性可能会被忽视，同时也顺便触发雄性之间的求爱。这种行为转变在遇到处女和年轻雌性时会迅速逆转，从而保留了对这些最佳伴侣的天生偏好。通过将 MBA 识别为配偶不可用的化学信号，我们将男性与男性的求爱重新解释为女性稀缺情况下交配过滤器调整的中性副产品，是最大化交配机会和接受错误求爱的附带成本之间的权衡。这项工作将行为生态学与生理学联系起来，为社会环境如何动态重塑配偶接受阈值提供了一个机制框架。
